t: 申請更換服務保險顧問的指引 (只限個人保險產品) 1. 所需文件  客戶申請書正本 2. 客戶申請書所載資料  保單持有人姓名  保單編號  新服務保險
s: 申請更換服務保險顧問的指引 (只限個人保險產品) 1. 所需文件  客戶申請書正本 2. 客戶申請書所載資料  保單持有人姓名  保單編號  新服務保險顧問姓名  新服務保險顧問編號  保單持有人簽署  簽署日期 3. 保障規定  該保單現有服務保險顧問 (Current Servicing Insurance Advisor) 將獲給予為期十四 日的保障期。  更換服務保險顧問保障規定通知，將透過宏利全接觸的「保險顧問通訊系統 (Agent Notification System - ANS）」發送至現有服務保險顧問 (Current Servicing Insurance Advisor) 、 新 被 委 任 服 務 保 險 顧 問 (Proposed Servicing Insurance Advisor) 及兩人的分區總監 (DD) 。  更換服務保險顧問的申請會於十四日保障期結束後生效。 4. 申請資料齊備  公司會向客戶發出確認函。  更換服務保險顧問確認通知，亦將透過宏利全接觸的「保險顧問通訊系統 (Agent Notification System - ANS ） 」 發 送 至 現 有 服 務 保 險 顧 問 (Current Servicing Insurance Advisor) 、 新委任服務保險顧問 (New Assigned Servicing Insurance Advisor) 及兩人的直屬經理。 5. 申請資料不全  新被委任服務保險顧問會收到申請被拒通知，以與客戶作出相關跟進。 6. 遞交  請將完整的申請書遞交至經銷報酬部(MT 22/F) 。 Confidential To: Manulife (International) Limited This is a fillable form. Please fill it in and print it for signature. 此表格是可輸入的。請輸入及打印以供簽署。 For Indiviual Financial Products Only 只限個人保險產品 Print Reset Save Request for Change of Servicing Insurance Advisor Form 申請更換服務保險顧問表格 Name of Policy Owner 保單持有人姓名 (As shown on Identity Document 如身份證明文件所示) Surname 姓 Given Name 名 Policy No(s) 保單編號 (For Individual Financial Products Only 只限個人保險產品) 1st Policy No 第一份保單編號: - - (For 10 Digits only / 只限 10 位數字) 2nd Policy No (if any) 第二份保單編號 (如有): - - (For 10 Digits only / 只限 10 位數字) 3rd Policy No (if any) 第三份保單編號 (如有): - - (For 10 Digits only / 只限 10 位數字) 4th Policy No (if any) 第四份保單編號 (如有): - - (For 10 Digits only / 只限 10 位數字) 5th Policy No (if any) 第五份保單編號 (如有): - - (For 10 Digits only / 只限 10 位數字) Remark: If more than 5 policies, please use additional form(s). 注意: 如保單數量超逾 5 份，請另加填表格。 On the above policy(ies), I would like to request for the change of servicing insurance advisor to the following person. 本人欲申請將上述保單的服務保險顧問更改為以下保險顧問。 Insurance Advisor's Name 保險顧問姓名: _________________________________________________________________ Insurance Advisor's Code 保險顧問編號: _____________________________________ Signature of Policy Owner 保單持有人簽名 _____________________________________ Date (DD/MM/YYYY) 日期 (日/月/年)

t: Guide to Filling in the “Claim Form For Payment Of MPF Accrued Benefits (“Benefi
s: Guide to Filling in the “Claim Form For Payment Of MPF Accrued Benefits (“Benefits”) On Grounds Of Attaining The Retirement Age Of 65 Or Early Retirement” (“the Form”) Please have the following documents/information ready before filling in the Form: 1. Your/ scheme member’s HKID card copy. / 2. The original statutory declaration form on early retirement (Form-MPF(S)---W(SD1)) [Applicable to Early Retirement Claim Only]. MPF(S)–W(SD1) [ ] 3. Determined withdrawal account(s) and option⬧. ⬧ ⬧ You may withdraw the benefits • either from all accounts or selected account(s) under Manulife Global Select (MPF) Scheme (“the Scheme”), and • either in a lump sum, a specified amount or monthly withdrawal per standing instruction (for Manulife MPF Interest Fund ONLY). 1. Section I - Details Of The Scheme Member / Claimant – Fill in your information as required in this part. 2. Section II – Details Of The Claim – Please tick the appropriate box to indicate the ground of your claim. If you are the scheme member, simply skip this part. BEN-WR Guide (Sep 2024) If you have previously withdrawn the benefits from the same account(s) by instalments with the same ground as stated, you may simply tick this box and do not need to provide the required documents again.  I have previously withdrawn the benefits by instalments on the below grounds from all the accounts specified in Section II(2), therefore, I DO NOT provide the required documents for this claim again. 本人之前曾基於下述理由從第 II(2)部份指明的所有帳戶分 期提M取an權uli益fe ，(In因ter此na毋tio須na就l) L是im次ite申d 索再次提供所需文件。 2. Section II – Details Of The Claim – “ALL” or “Selected” account(s)? Please specify. Scheme member account number can be found on documents/ statements sent by Manulife, e.g. the notice of acceptance, the member benefit statement. The amount specified MUST be in a whole number. If “Option 2” selected, the below must be indicated: Select either ONE option, otherwise the request CANNOT be processed. • (a) One off Withdrawal ; or • (b) Standing Instruction for Monthly Withdrawal (Not applicable to employee contribution account) 3. Section III – Authorization & Declaration Authorization & Declaration – Sign here and the signature must be the same as your specimen signature previously submitted to Manulife. BEN-WR Guide (Sep 2024) Manulife (International) Limited

t: Policy No. 保單編號： CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - STROKE 重病保障索償表格 － 中 風 PART II –
s: Policy No. 保單編號： CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - STROKE 重病保障索償表格 － 中 風 PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense 第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫 1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份證號碼 3. Age 年齡 4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？ No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。 Period of Consultation Past Health History 應診期間 病人過往健康情況 5. a) Date on which you first attended the patient for this disease (Stroke). 首次為病人診治是項病症（中風）之日期。 b) How long do you believe the symptoms had been present when you were first consulted? 於首次診治主要時，閣下相信病徵已出現了多久？ c) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? ( Please give exact date ) 何時通知病人診斷結果？（請填寫準確日期） 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。 7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？ No 否 Yes 有 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。 Name of Attended Physician(s) Date of Consultation Address(es) Exact Diagnosis 應診醫生姓名 診治日期 地址 確實診斷資料 8. Is there anything in the patient's family history which would have increased the risk of Stroke? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上中風機會之事項？ 9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 10. a) Please decribe the initial episode: 請指出病發初期情況： clinical events 臨床情況 b) Duration of acute symptoms 急性病徵出現時間 c) Date of return to normal activities and/or the patient's persent limitations-Physical and mental 恢復從事正常活動之日期及 ／或病人現時之身體及精神限制 11. Please comment on any neurological sequelae which lasted more than 24 hours. Are these sequelae permanent? 請解釋為時二十四小時以上之神經系統後遺症。 該後遺症會否永久存在？ 12. Has there been an intarction of brain tissue, haemorrhage or embolisation from an extra-cranial source? 曾否出現腦組織梗塞、出血及其他頭顱以外的血管根源引致 之腦栓塞？ Yes 有 No否 13. Please supply details of radiological investigations and laboratory evidence as well as any other tests. 請提供有關放射性檢查、化驗證明及其他檢查之資料。 14. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。 (We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available ) （敬請提供任何有關醫療報告副本） Name of Physician(s) and/or Hospital(s) Address(es) Date of Consultation(s) and/or Period of Confinement(s) 醫生姓名及／或醫院名稱 地址 診治及／或留院日期 15. If there is any further information which, in your opinion, will assist us in assessing this claim, please furnish such information below. 閣下認為有否其他資料可協助本公司審核是項索償申請？請提供有關資料。 5 Signature 簽署 Date 日期 Qualification 資格 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C11 (11/2025) Name of Physician (with stamp) 醫生姓名（連印章） Address 地址 Tel. No. 電話號碼 1 of 1

t: CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE SYSTEMIC LUPUS ERYTHEMATOSUS Policy No. 保單編號： 重病保障索
s: CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE SYSTEMIC LUPUS ERYTHEMATOSUS Policy No. 保單編號： 重病保障索償表格 － 紅斑狼瘡 PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense 第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫 1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份證號碼 3. Age 年齡 4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？ No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。 Period of Consultation Past Health History 應診期間 病人過往健康情況 5. a) Date on which you first attended the patient for this disease (S.L.E.). 首次為病人診治是項病症（紅斑狼瘡）之日期。 b) What was the symptom(s) experienced prior to the first consultation? And for how long? 病人首次求診前有何症狀？該等症狀已存在多久？ c) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果？（請填寫準確日期） 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。 7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？ No 否 Yes 有 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。 Name of Attended Physician(s) Date of Consultation Address(es) Exact Diagnosis 應診醫生姓名 診治日期 地址 確實診斷資料 8. Is there anything in the patient's family history which would have increased the risk of S.L.E.? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上紅斑狼瘡機會之事項？ 9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 10. Please describe the underlying cause of S.L.E.. 請指出導致紅斑狼瘡之原因。 11. Is there any kind of internal disorder associated with systemic lupus erythematosus? 紅斑狼瘡是否與任何疾病有關？ 12. Is there any evidence of auto-antibodies directed against various self-antigens? 病人有否產生自體抗體侵襲自體抗原？ 13. Is the S.L.E. involved with kidneys Type III to Type V Lupus nephritis? If renal biopsy is done, please advise the finding(s) and supply a copy of biopsy for reference. 病人的紅斑狼瘡是否涉及第三至第五級狼瘡腎炎？如病人已接受腎活組織檢查，請說明檢驗結果及提供活組織檢查副本以供參考。 14. Is the S.L.E. involved with central nervous system? If yes, please give details of radiological investigations, M.R.I., C T scan, laboratory evidence and any other test results for reference. 病人的紅斑狼瘡是否涉及中樞神經系統？如是，請提供放射檢驗、磁力共振、電腦斷層掃描、實驗室證據或其他檢驗結果的詳情以供參考。 15. Was the diagnosis certified by a specialist in Rheumatology and Immunology? If so, please provide us with the name and address of specialist. 病人是否經風濕病學及免疫學專科醫生診斷患有該疾病？如是，請提供該醫生的姓名及地址。 16. Please give details of radiological investigations, M.R.I., C T scan, laboratory evidence and any other test results for reference. 請提供放射檢驗、磁力共振、電腦斷層掃描、實驗室證據或其他檢驗結果的詳情以供參考。 17. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。 (We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available ) （敬請提供任何有關醫療報告副本） Name of Physician(s) and/or Hospital(s) Address(es) Date of Consultation(s) and/or Period of Confinement(s) 醫生姓名及／或醫院名稱 地址 診治及／或留院日期 18. If there is any further information which, in your opinion, will assist us in assessing this claim, please furnish such information below. 閣下認為有否其他資料可協助本公司審核是項索償申請？請提供有關資料。 5 Signature 簽署 Date 日期 Qualification 資格 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C23 (11/2025) Name of Physician (with stamp) 醫生姓名（連印章） Address 地址 Tel. No. 電話號碼 1 of 1

t: NOTICE OF POTENTIAL CLAIM FOR LONG TERM CARE CONTINUING INCOME BENEFIT 長期護理持續入息保
s: NOTICE OF POTENTIAL CLAIM FOR LONG TERM CARE CONTINUING INCOME BENEFIT 長期護理持續入息保障潛在索償通知書 Personal Details of Insured 受保人個人資料 Branch code 分行編號 Advisor code 保險顧問編號 Advisor’s name 保險顧問姓名 Contact no. 聯絡電話 1. Name of Insured 受保人姓名 2. HKID/Passport No. 香港身份證／護照號碼 3. Sex 性別 Location 地點 Surname 姓 Given Name 名 4. Date of Birth 出生日期 5. Contact No. 聯絡電話： Male 男 Female 女 DD 日 MM 月 YYYY 年 6. Residential Address 住宅地址 Residence 住宅 Mobile Phone 流動電話 Other 其他 7. Current Type of Residence 目前的住宅類別 Private House or Apartment 私人樓宇 Care & Attention Home 療養院 Other (please specify) 其他（請註明）： Government Housing 政府屋苑 Nursing Home 護理院 Home for the Aged 老人院 Hospital 醫院 Hostel 宿舍 Attending Physician Information 主診醫生資料 8. Physician Information 醫生資料： Name of Physician 醫生姓名 Address 地址 Contact No. 聯絡電話 Insured’s Health Conditions 受保人健康狀況 9. Please answer “No” or “Yes” to the right of each Activity of Daily Living listed below, to indicate your current ability to perform each Activity: 在下列日常生活活動中，請在右邊填上「否」或「是」，以反映閣下目前進行每項活動的能力： a) Need assistance transferring in and out of a chair or bed 需要行動協助，才可坐上及離開座椅及上落床 b) Need assistance with toileting, getting to and from and off the toilet, maintaining reasonable level of personal hygiene and care for clothing 需要如廁協助，才可往返洗手間；坐上及離開座廁；整理身上衣物，並保持合理程度之個人衛生 c) Need assistance with bathing, washing self either in tub or shower, or by sponge bath 需要沐浴協助，才可浸浴、 淋浴或以海綿自我清洗 d) Need assistance with dressing, including putting on and taking off braces or artificial limbs 需要更衣協助，包括 穿帶以及解開支架或矯正器 e) Need assistance with managing bowel or bladder functions (continence) 需要協助才可控制肛門及膀胱的功能（自制） f) Need assistance with eating food that has been prepared and made available 需要協助才可進食預先準備妥當之食物 The Chinese version of this claim form is for reference only. In the event of conflicts between the Chinese and English versions, the English version shall prevail. 此索償表格之中文譯本只供參考之用，若與英文有異，一概以英文為準。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C29 (11/2025) 1 of 6 Insured’s Health Conditions (continued) 受保人健康狀況（續） 10. Please provide the following details for each Activity of Daily Living for which “Yes” was checked in Question 9. 如第9題的日常生活活動方面的選項為「是」，請填寫下列資料。 Activity 活動 Date Disability Began 喪失能力的日期 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Who Assists? (Family, Paid Helper) How Often? (number of times per day or week) 由誰人協助？（家人、傭人） 次數（每日或每週的次數） a) Transferring 行動 b) Toileting 如廁 c) Bathing 沐浴 d) Dressing 更衣 e) Continence 自制 f) Eating 進食 11. s: CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE SURGERY TO AORTA/ENDOVASCULAR TREATMENTS OF AORTIC DISEASE OR AORTIC ANEURYSM 重病保障索償表格 － 主動脈手術／ 主動脈疾病或主動脈瘤的血管介入治療 Policy No. 保單編號： PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense 第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫 1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份證號碼 3. Age 年齡 4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？ No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。 Period of Consultation Past Health History 應診期間 病人過往健康情況 5. a) Date on which the patient first consulted you related to the condition (Surgery to Aorta / Endovascular Treatments of Aortic Disease or Aortic Aneurysm). 病人就是項疾病（主 動脈手術/主動脈疾病或主動脈瘤的血管介入治療）首次向閣下求診的日期（DD日/ MM月/YY年）。 b) What were the symptoms? 病人之病徵？ c) How long had the patient been experiencing these symptoms before the first consultation? 病人在首次求診前已患有此病徵多久？ d) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果?（請填寫準確日期） 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。 7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？ No 否 Yes 有 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。 Name of Attended Physician(s) Date of Consultation Address(es) Exact Diagnosis 應診醫生姓名 診治日期 地址 確實診斷資料 8. Is there anything in the patient’s family history which would have increased the risk of the disease specified above? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上上述疾病機 會之事項？ 9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 10. Please describe the extent of the disease 請描述該病之狀況。 i. Date of onset of the aortic condition 主動脈疾病之病發日期 ( / / ) DD/MM/YY 日/月/年 Was the aortic disease confirmed by echocardiogram? 主動脈疾病是否經由心臟超音波檢查確診? Yes 是 No 否 If not confirmed by echocardiogram, by what other imaging tests was aortic disease confirmed? 如不是經由心臟超音波檢查確診, 主動脈疾病是透過什麼影像檢查被確診? Please state the date of the test and where it was performed. 請列出檢查進行之日期及地點。 Date 日期： ( / / ) DD/MM/YY 日/月/年 Place 地點： (Please supplement with relevant scan or imaging reports. 請提供相關的電腦掃描或影像報告以供參考。) ii. Was any surgery performed? 有否施行手術? Yes 有 No 沒有 If “yes”, please specify which aorta was operated and the location? 如“有”, 請註明進行主動脈手術的是哪一條主動脈及進行手術的位置。 Was the surgery performed through thoracotomy or laparotomy? 手術是否經開胸或剖腹手術進行? Yes 是 No 否 Was the surgery performed through minimally Invasive or intra-arterial techniques 手術是否經微創形式進行（即主動脈疾病的血管介入治療）? If “no” for the above 2 questions, please specify: 如以上兩項皆為“否”, 請註明: Yes 是 No 否 Date of the surgery to aorta 手術日期： ( / / ) DD/MM/YY 日/月/年 The hospital where the surgery was performed 手術醫院： Name of Surgeon 手術醫生： The surgery was performed for correction / repair of : 進行之手術用作修補或矯正: Aortic anerysm 主動脈瘤 Obstruction 主動脈阻塞 Coartation / Narrowing 主動脈縮窄/狹窄 Dissection 主動脈夾層分離 Others (please specify) : 其他 (請註明)： Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C41 (11/2025) 1 of 2 Policy No. 保單編號： iii) For the case of Aortic Aneurysm, please specify the type of aneurysm: 就主動脈瘤個案而言，請註明動脈瘤之類別： Abdominal aortic aneurysm 腹主動脈瘤 Abdominal aortic dissection 腹主動脈夾層分離 Thoracic aortic aneurysm 胸主動脈瘤 Thoracic aortic dissection 胸主動脈夾層分離 Others (please specify) : 其他（請註明）： Has the Aorta been enlarged at least 50 mm in diameter? 主動脈的直徑有否增大至少50毫米? Yes 有 No 沒有 Was the diagnosis confirmed by a cardiologist or vascular surgeon? 該疾病是否由心臟專科或血管外科註冊醫生確定? Yes 是 No 否 Please give the Name and Address of the cardiologist or vascular surgeon if it is not the undersigned. 若非由填寫此表格之醫生確認，請提供心臟專科或血管外科 註冊醫生之姓名及地址。 iv) Is there any known underlying causes or precipitating illness leading to the aortic condition? If so, please state any treatment history. 有沒有已知的原因或潛 在的疾病引致主動脈疾病發生? 如有，請列出過往之治療記錄。 11. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。 (We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available ) （敬請提供任何有關醫療報告副本） Name of Physician(s) and/or Hospital(s) Address(es) Date of Consultation(s) and/or Period of Confinement(s) 醫生姓名及／或醫院名稱 地址 診治及／或留院日期 12. t: Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Version 2
s: Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Version 20130401-01) DEFINITIONS 1. “Data access request”, “data correction request”, “data subject”, “data user”, “direct marketing”, “matching procedures” and “personal data” used throughout this Notice shall have the meaning as defined in the Ordinance. For the purpose of this Notice: “customers” shall mean data subjects and include (but not be limited to) existing and prospective insurance policy owners, insured, beneficiaries and other persons designated or entitled to receive moneys and/or other benefits under an insurance policy; and members under an occupational retirement scheme; and scheme members under a mandatory provident fund scheme; and share/unit holders of investment funds. “Hong Kong” shall mean the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. “Manulife” shall mean Manulife (International) Limited, Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, Manulife Asset Management (Hong Kong) Limited, or a Manulife Fund (as the case may be) in respect of its respective customers. “Manulife Fund” shall mean any investment fund sponsored or managed from time to time by a member of the Manulife Group (including but not limited to Manulife Global Fund and Manulife Advanced Fund SPC) and “Manulife Funds” shall mean all such investment funds. “Manulife Group” shall mean Manulife Financial Corporation and its subsidiaries and affiliates (including but not limited to Manulife (International) Limited, Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, Manulife Asset Management (Hong Kong) Limited), and Manulife Funds. The rights and obligations of each member of Manulife Group under this Notice are several and not joint. No member of Manulife Group shall be liable for an act or omission by another member of Manulife Group. “Ordinance” shall mean Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance. COLLECTION 2. From time to time, it is necessary for customers to supply Manulife with personal data in connection with the establishment or continuation of business relationship, or provision of products or services. Failure to supply such data may result in Manulife being unable to establish or continue the business relationship, or provide products or services. 3. It is also the case that personal data are collected or received by Manulife from and/or in respect of customers in the ordinary course of the continuation of the business relationship, for example, when an application is made for a change of beneficiary/insured member under the insurance policy; or when notification is made by the employer of a change of employment/address of an employee member of an occupational retirement scheme/mandatory provident fund scheme; or when a joint share holder of an investment fund applies for investment fund switching. PURPOSES 4. The purposes for which personal data of a customer may be used will vary depending on the nature of the customer’s relationship with Manulife. Such purposes may include the following: (a) processing, assessing and determining applications or requests made by customers for products and/or services; (b) administering, maintaining, managing and operating products and/or services provided to customers; (c) confirming customer’s identity and uniquely identifying customer; (d) confirming the accuracy of the information collected; (e) understanding customer’s financial situation better, evaluating customer application, assessing the risks Manulife is assuming and reviewing claims submitted to Manulife; Manulife (International) Limited (Incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability) 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 （於百慕達註冊成立之有限責任公司） Version 20130401-01 1 (f) any purposes in connection with any claims made by or against or otherwise involving customers in respect of any products and/or services including but not limited to making, defending, analysing, investigating, processing, assessing, determining or responding to such claims; (g) providing investment management services, dealing and advisory services, custody services and other services under the terms and conditions of the accounts a customer holds with Manulife; (h) performing any functions and activities related to products and/or services including but not limited to marketing, audit, reporting, research, analysis, reinsurance, and general servicing and maintenance of online and other services; (i) researching and/or designing products and/or services for customers, and promoting, improving and furthering the provision of products and/or services; (j) conducting matching procedures (as defined in the Ordinance, but broadly includes comparison of two or more sets of the data subject’s data, for purposes of taking actions adverse to the interests of the data subject, such as declining an application); (k) making disclosure under and/or complying with the requirements of any law, rules, regulations, codes of practice, guidelines or guidances binding on or applicable to Manulife or any member of Manulife Group (whether within or outside Hong Kong) including but not limited to making disclosure to local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, industry recognised bodies (whether within or outside Hong Kong) such as federations or associations of insurers, credit reference agencies or auditors; (l) complying with any contractual or other commitment or arrangement with local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or industry recognised bodies (whether within or outside Hong Kong) that is assumed by or imposed on Manulife or any member of Manulife Group by reason of its financial, commercial, business or other interests or activities in or related to the jurisdiction of the relevant local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or industry recognised bodies; Please notify Manulife in writing if recti cation needed. This form should be submitted, for the non-casual employees, within 10 days after the last day of the calendar month in which the 60th day of employment falls. To correct the Date of Employment, please submit a separate written instruction. 若此僱員在本結算書上所載的受僱日期與「僱員參加表格」上的受僱日期有異，宏利將以「僱員參加表格」上所載的資料為準。如需更改，請以書面通知宏利。此表格須於非臨時僱員受僱第60日所在公曆月完結後的10日內遞交。 (2) Payroll period is the period for which an employer pays relevant income to the employee. Employers have to contribute for their employees from the date of employment while the non-casual employees have to start contribution after the payroll period that the 30th day of employment falls. Please state the start date of the payroll period instead of the date of employment for the rst contribution. 支薪期指僱主向僱員支付有關入息的期間。僱主須由僱員受僱日開始供款而非臨時僱員須由其受僱的第30日所在的支薪期後開始供 款。請註明第一期供款起始日，而非受僱日。 (3) For payroll periods ending on or after February 1, 2003, the contribution surcharge is calculated at 5% of the default amount (i.e. the late payment and/ or underpayment of employer’s and/ or employee’s mandatory contributions). For payroll periods ending before February 1, 2003, please call our Employer Hotline on (852) 2108 1234 for details. 就2003年2月1日當日或之後完結的支薪期而言，附加費相等於拖欠供款金額（即僱主及／或僱員之逾期強制性供款及／或強制性供款不足金額）的5%。就2003年2月1日之前完 結的支薪期之附加費詳情，請致電僱主熱線 (852) 2108 1234 查詢。 Declaration 聲 明 I/We con rm that 本人/吾等確認 I/We have read and understood the full details provided on this “Remittance Statement” (“RS”) (including the “IMPORTANT NOTES” on the last page of this RS) and agree to abide by the rules stated herein. 本人/吾等已細讀及明白本「付款結算書」之所有資料及內容（包括本「付款結算書」末頁附載之「重要事項」），並同意遵守所述的規則。 MPF RS NEW (05/2022) 1 of 2 Authorized Signature with Company Chop 獲授權人士簽署及公司印章 Manulife (International) Limited (Incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability) 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（於百慕達註冊成立之有限責任公司） Name & Title (in Block Letters) 姓名及職銜（正楷） Date 日期 Hong Kong Retirement, Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險(國際)有限公司香港退休業務部 Incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability 於百慕達註冊成立之有限責任公司 21/F., Tower A, Manulife Financial Centre, 223-231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong 香港九龍觀塘偉業街223-231號宏利金融中心A座21樓 *CE2205* IMPORTANT NOTES 重要事項 All information collected on the Remittance Statement may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the “Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance” (“Notice”). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice from your Manulife's intermediary or through Manulife's website at www.manulife.com.hk. By writing to the Privacy Officer of Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, members can correct and have access to their personal data. The information of the authorized person(s) is collected in their official capacities. I. Filling In the Remittance Statement ("RS") • Please ensure your new employees have been enrolled into the MPF scheme before making contributions. • Report "0" for those with no relevant income for the concerned payroll period. • Round up the contribution amount to 2 decimal places. • If the "Total" contribution does not tally with the sum of amount reported for all members, the reported amount for individual members will be taken as the employer's final instruction. • For payment by cheque, please clearly mark the cheque number on the RS. II. t: Employee Withdrawal Form for Manulife ORSO Scheme 宏利職業退休計劃僱員利益提取表格 (Not applicab
s: Employee Withdrawal Form for Manulife ORSO Scheme 宏利職業退休計劃僱員利益提取表格 (Not applicable to MPF Exempted ORSO Registered Scheme) （不適用於獲強積金豁免的註冊職業退休計劃） Notes ： (1) Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS and ✔ the appropriate boxes. (2) Please initial next to any corrections you make on this form. (3) This form should be signed by both EMPLOYEE & EMPLOYER and forwarded to the scheme administrator, "Provident Funds Services, Manulife (International) Limited, 21/F., Tower A, Manulife Financial Centre, 223 - 231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong". If Long Service Payment/Severance Payment is involved, you must submit the original copy of this form. (4) Any contribution due prior to the last date of employment MUST BE PAID in full before this withdrawal can be processed. Any contribution deducted from the employee for the period beyond his/her date of employment should be refunded by the employer directly to the employee. (5) Employer is vested with the responsibility to ensure that all accrued benefits that the terminated employee is entitled are accumulated from contributions made pursuant to the statutory and/or employment requirements and not from any unidentified source of fund. (6) The information collected from you and in respect of you can be used by Manulife and the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority ("MPFA") in activities relating to the processing of the claim as requested in this form. The information may be transferred to other division(s) within Manulife or other parties including delegates, intermediaries or any service providers of Manulife, for such purpose(s) or for a purpose directly related to such purpose(s). All data processes may involve a transfer of information to places either within or outside the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. You are required to supply the information in this form and failure to do so may result in your claim being delayed. (7) The MPFA and other regulatory bodies in any jurisdiction shall be authorized to inspect any information under the scheme. (8) By writing to the Privacy Officer of your scheme administrator, you can correct and have access to your personal data. (9) All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the “Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance” (“Notice”). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice from your Manulife’s intermediary or through Manulife’s website at www.manulife.com.hk. 注意事項： (1) 請以正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格內加 ✔ 號 。 (2) 如須作出任何刪改，請於刪改之位置旁簽署。 (3) 此表格需由僱主及僱員共同簽署並送交計劃管理人「香港九龍觀塘偉 業街223 - 231號宏利金融中心A座21樓宏利人壽保險（國際）有限 公司公積金服務部」。如涉及長期服務金 / 遣散費，閣下必須提交本 表格之正本。 (4) 在辦理申索手續之前，必須清繳所有在離職日前到期之供款。若早 前已扣除在離職日後到期之僱員供款，僱主必須直接向僱員退回有 關款項。 (5) 僱主需確保此終止受僱僱員應得的所有累算權益乃根據法定及/或受 聘的條款所規定的供款積存所得，而非不明來歷的資金。 (6) 宏利及強制性公積金計劃管理局（簡稱「積金局」）可使用從閣下收 集及關於閣下的資料以處理閣下在本表格內要求的索償事宜。為達致 該等目的，或直接與該等目的有關的目的，所提供的資料可移轉予宏 利內其他部門或其他人士/團體，包括宏利的受委托者、強積金中介 人或任何服務提供者。所有資料處理過程或會涉及資料移轉至香港特 別行政區及以外地區。請提供本表格所需的資料，否則閣下之索償申 請或會因此而被延誤。 (7) 積金局及任何司法管轄區的其他監管團體將獲授權查看計劃內的任何 資料。 (8) 閣下可以書面向計劃管理人之個人資料主任更改及查閱閣下的個人 資料。 (9) 宏利可按於《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》（「通 知」）所述，處理有關資料。假如閣下未有細閱該通知，閣下可從閣 下的宏利中介人或透過宏利網址www.manulife.com.hk取得該通知。 I. t: Application Supplement 投保申請附加資料 VITA 活得精彩危疾保 EXERCISE OF COVER-ME-AGAIN OPTION 行
s: Application Supplement 投保申請附加資料 VITA 活得精彩危疾保 EXERCISE OF COVER-ME-AGAIN OPTION 行使備用保障權益 PLAN NAME OF THE NEW COVERAGE 新保障計劃名稱 NAME OF INSURED 受保人姓名 POLICY NO. OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE 原有保障保單編號 EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE 原有保障生效日 POLICY NO. OF THE PRIOR COVERAGE (IF ANY) 最初保障保單編號（如適用） EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE PRIOR COVERAGE (IF ANY) 最初保障生效日（如適用） CUSTOMER’S DECLARATION 客戶聲明 Every reference in this declaration to: 於本聲明內提及的: • “Original Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that is being exercised. 「原有保障」指提供有關之備用保障權益之保障。 • “New Coverage” means the coverage issued under the exercise of the Cover-Me-Again option. 「新保障」指根據行使有關之備用保障權益所發出之保障。 • “Prior Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that was exercised for the issuance of the Original Coverage, if the Original Coverage was issued under the exercise of a Cover-Me-Again option. 「最初保障」指提供備用保障權益以發出原有保障之保障，如原有保障為行使備用保障權益而發出的。 • “Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses” refers to the Critical Illness / Illnesses on which Critical Illness Benefit(s) was / were paid for the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage, if any. 「之前的危疾」指於原有保障或最初保障（如適用）之下曾作危疾賠償賠付之危疾。 I, being the policyowner of the New Coverage, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following: 本人﹝新保障之保單持有人﹞謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列條款： PARTICULARS 詳情 In consideration for the exercise of Cover-Me-Again option, the Provision of the New Coverage shall be issued with the following amendments: 當行使有關之備用保障權益時，新保障的條款將加入以下修訂： • No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for “Terminal Illness” and “Total and Permanent Disability”. 本公司不會就「末期疾病」及「完全及永久傷殘」支付新保障之在生利益賠償。 *OBJTSFORM856* *OBJTSFORM856* The Chinese version of this application is for reference only. In the event of conflicts between the English and the Chinese versions, the English version shall prevail. 此申請書之中文譯本只 供參考之用，若與英文有異，一概以英文為準。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險﹝國際﹞有限公司 Form 856_CMA_CQ_CQ (12/2025) Page 1 of 5 Application Supplement 投保申請附加資料 • If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 1 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any), no Critical Illness Benefit or Gender Specific Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness in Group 1 or 2 or on Prostate Cancer and Testicular Cancer defined in the New Coverage if the first diagnosis of such Critical Illness or Gender Specific Disease is made before the end of a 5-year Cancer-free period, as defined below, following the latest of all last completion dates of treatments of Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses from Group 1 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any). 5-year Cancer-free Period must be confirmed by the Insured’s treating Specialist Medical Practitioner(s) for the whole period of the last 5-year period supported by clinical, radiological, histological and laboratory evidence and evidence of all other relevant investigative methods available at that time, to confirm the cancer-free state. The 5-year Cancer-free Period shall start from the date of completion of treatment of cancer, which shall include any surgery, chemotherapy, radiation therapy, immunotherapy, monoclonal antibody therapy or other conventional cancer treatments that have been used as prescribed by the Insured’s treating Specialist Medical Practitioner(s). 如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別一，本公司不會就來自新保障所界定之類別一或二之危疾或 前列腺癌或睪丸癌支付新保障之在生利益賠償或男性及女性疾病賠償，如該危疾或男性及女性疾病的首次診斷於下列定義之「五 年無癌症期」完結前發生，而「五年無癌症期」將根據所有來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別一的之前的危疾之 最後療程完畢日起計算。 「五年無癌症期」必須由受保人之相關主診專科醫生在整個五年期內以臨床、放射學、組織學、實驗室檢驗報告及所有在當 時已有的其他有關查證方法作依據，以證明過去五年內沒有任何癌症徵狀。「五年無癌症期」是癌症療程完畢日起計算。療 程包括任何手術、化療、電療、免疫療法、單克隆抗體療法或其他由主診專科醫生指定的慣常癌症療法。 • If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 1 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any), no Gender Specific Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage for carcinoma-in-situ of breast, cervix uteri, uterus, ovary, fallopian tube or vagina as defined in the New Coverage. 如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別一，本公司不會就乳房、子宮頸、子宮、卵巢、輸卵管或陰 道原位癌支付新保障之男性及女性疾病賠償。 • If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 2, 3, 4 or 5 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any), no Critical Illness Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness in the same group defined in the New Coverage. 如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別二、三、四或五，本公司不會就同一類別之危疾支付新保 障之危疾賠償。 • If any of the Preceding Critical Illness / Illnesses fall into Group 3 as defined in the Original Coverage or Prior Coverage (if any), no Angioplasty Benefit will be payable under the New Coverage. 如任何之前的危疾來自原有保障或最初保障（如適用）所界定的類別三，本公司不會於新保障支付血管成形術賠償。 • The claim amount payable for Death Benefit under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the date of death is within the first 12 months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Death Benefit, the New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the Company. 如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首 12 個月內身故，本公司將賠償身故賠償額的 50%。本公司給 予身故賠償後，在不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司亦不會再作出任何賠償。 • The claim amount payable for Living Benefits under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness, Juvenile Disease or Gender Specific Illness, or the performance of Angioplasty Procedure is within the first 12 months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit, the New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the Company. 如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首 12 個月內被診斷證實患上危疾、兒童疾病或男性及女性疾 病，或進行血管成形術及相關治療，本公司將賠償該項危疾、兒童疾病或男性及女性疾病，或血管成形術及相關治療的在生利 益賠償額 50%。在本公司給予危疾賠償後，在不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司 亦不會再作出任何賠償。 • If the policyowner or life insured

OF THE ORIGINAL POLICY 原有保單之編號 Application Supplement ҳ‫͡ڭ‬ሗ‫̋ڝ‬༟ࣘ NAME OF INSURED 受保人姓名 CUSTOMER’S DECLARATION 客戶聲明 I, being the policyowner of the New Coverage, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following: 本人﹝新保障之保單持有人﹞謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列條款： PARTICULARS 詳情 “Original Coverage” 「原有保障」 Policy Number 保單編號 ： Name of Plan / Beneﬁt 保障計劃名稱 ： Eﬀective Date 生效日 ： “New Coverage” 「新保障」 Policy Number 保單編號 ： Name of Plan / Beneﬁt 保障計劃名稱： MANUGUARD MEDICAL BENEFIT 守護一生醫療保障 The Original Coverage shall be terminated. The “ManuGuard Medical Beneﬁt Provision” for the ManuGuard Medical Beneﬁt (“New Bene t Provision”) shall be issued subject to the following amendments:原有保障將被删除。守護一生醫療保障的「守護一生醫療保障條款」（「新保障條款」）應在作出下列修訂的條件下簽發： (A) The following deﬁnition of “Original Bene t Provision” shall be inserted under Clause 1 (DEFINITIONS) of the New Beneﬁt Provision as follows:“Original Bene t Provision” means (1) the “Hospital Beneﬁt Provision” for the Hospital Beneﬁt or (2) the “Premier Life Hospital Beneﬁt Provision” for the Premier Life Hospital Beneﬁt or (3) the “Golden Lifestyle Hospital Beneﬁt Provision” for the Golden Lifestyle Hospital Beneﬁt as indicated above under “Original Coverage”. (A) 新保障之條文1（定義）下應增加「原有保障條款」這個新定義，如下所載： 「原有保障條款」指上列「原有保障」所載的 (1) 住院附加保障的「住院附加保障條款」或 (2) 安康人生住院附加保障的「安康人生 住院附加保障條款」或 (3) 精彩生活住院附加保障的「精彩生活住院附加保障條款」。 (B) Clause 2(EFFECTIVE DATE OF BENEFITS) of the New Beneﬁt Provision shall be deleted in its entirety and replaced by a new Clause 2(EFFECTIVE DATE OF BENEFITS) as follows:- “(1) Death Bene t Eligibility for and coverage under the Death Beneﬁt will commence at the later of (a) the policy year date of this Policy, if this Provision was included when the Policy was issued; or (b) the eﬀective date of reinstatement of this Policy; or (c) the date of endorsement or the eﬀective date of change of this Provision, whichever is later, if this Provision was added after the Policy had been issued. (2) Hospital Bene ts For Accidental Injury, eligibility for and coverage under the Hospital Beneﬁts will commence at the later of (a) the policy year date of this Policy, if this Provision was included when the Policy was issued; or (b) the eﬀective date of reinstatement of this Policy; or (c) the date of endorsement or the eﬀective date of change of this Provision, whichever is later, if this Provision was added after the Policy had been issued. Manulife (International) Limited ҃лɛྪ‫ڭ‬ᎈ਷ყϞࠢʮ̡ Form 856_HB_HC_HD_HN_toHB5 (12/2025) Page 1 of 3 Application Supplement ҳ‫͡ڭ‬ሗ‫̋ڝ‬༟ࣘ Eligibility for and coverage under Major Illness Care provided under Clause 19.2 will commence on (a) the date falling two (2) years after the policy year date of this Policy, if this Provision was included when the Policy was issued; or (b) the date falling thirty (30) days after the eﬀective date of reinstatement of this Policy; or (c) the date falling two (2) years after the date of endorsement or the eﬀective date of change of this Provision, whichever is later, if this Provision was added after the Policy had been issued; whichever is later. Except for Accidental Injury, eligibility for and coverage under the Hospital Beneﬁts (other than Major Illness Care provided under Clause 19.2) will commence at the later of (a) the policy year date of this Policy, if this Provision was included when the Policy was issued; or (b) thirty (30) days after the eﬀective date of reinstatement of this Policy; or (c) the date of endorsement or the eﬀective date of change of this Provision, whichever is later, if this Provision was added after the Policy had been issued.” (B) 新保障之條文2（保障生效日期）應全文刪除，並以下列新的條文2（保障生效日期）所取代： 「(1) 身故賠償保障 身故賠償保障的獲取資格及其保障範圍將於下列日期正式生效（以較後者為準）： (a) 若本條款於保單簽發時即已包括在內，本保單的保單生效日；或 (b) 本保單的保單復效生效日；或 (c) 若本條款是在保單簽發後附加，本條款的批註日期或更改本條款生效日（以較後者為準）。 (2) 醫療保障 若受保人因意外受傷，醫療保障的獲取資格及其保障範圍將於下列日期正式生效（以較後者為準）： (a) 若本條款於保單簽發時已包括在內，本保單的保單生效日；或 (b) 本保單的保單復效生效日；或 (c) 若本條款於保單簽發後附加，本條款的批註日期或更改本條款生效日（以較後者為準）。 條文19.2下提供的主要疾病治療的獲取資格及其保障範圍將於下列日期正式生效（以較後者為準）： (a) 若本條款於保單簽發時已包括在内，本保單的保單生效日起計滿兩(2)年之日；或 (b) 本保單的保單復效生效日起計滿三十(30)日之日；或 (c) 若本條款於保單簽發後附加，本條款的批註日期或更改本條款生效日（以較後者為準）起計滿兩(2)年之日。 除意外受傷外，醫療保障（條文19.2下提供的主要疾病治療除外）的獲取資格及其保障範圍將於下列日期正式生效（以較後者為準）： (a) 若本條款於保單簽發時已包括在内，本保單的保單生效日；或 (b) 本保單的保單復效生效日起計三十(30)日後；或 (c) 若本條款於保單簽發後附加，本條款的批註日期或更改本條款生效日（以較後者為準）。」 (C) Clause 6 (PRE-EXISTING CONDITIONS) of the New Beneﬁt Provision shall be deleted in its entirety and replaced by a new Clause 6 (PRE-EXISTING CONDITIONS) as follows:“Pre-existing Conditions shall mean the Pre-existing Conditions as deﬁned under the Original Beneﬁt Provision provided that (1) any reference to “date of s: Application Supplement ҳ‫͡ڭ‬ሗ‫̋ڝ‬༟ࣘ CONTINUATION OF SUPPLEMENTARY BENEFIT(S) UPON PLAN TERMINATION BY CLAIM PAYMENT 因賠付致計劃終止後延續附加保障 POLICY NUMBER 保單編號 POLICYOWNER 保單持有人 LIFE INSURED 受保人 BASIC PLAN 基本保障 CONTINUED SUPPLEMENTARY BENEFITS 延續之附加保障 CUSTOMER’S DECLARATION 客戶聲明 I, the Policyowner of the policy, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following changes to the Policy: 本人 [ 此保單之保單持有人] 謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列對此保單之改動： PARTICULARS 詳情 Notwithstanding any provisions to the contrary in this Policy or the Basic Plan, with eﬀect from the Change Eﬀective Date, this Policy shall be amended as follows:不論本保單或基本計劃內有任何相反條款，本保單將由更改生效日期起作出以下修訂： (1) The Basic Plan shall be terminated with no further liability on the part of the Company and no further beneﬁts shall be payable under the Basic Plan. 基本計劃終止，而本公司於基本計劃下再無任何責任，亦毋須再支付任何賠償。 (2) The Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) shall remain in force, but no reinstatement thereof shall be allowed. 延續之附加保障維持生效，但不可就其申請復效。 (3) All Supplementary Beneﬁts other than the Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) attached to this Policy shall be terminated. 除延續之附加保障以外，本保單所有附加保障全部終止。 (4) Where any of the Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) is expressed by its provision to be terminated when the Basic Plan is terminated, such Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) shall remain in force notwithstanding such contrary provision. However, the Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) shall in no circumstances remain in force beyond the date which otherwise would have been the maturity of the Basic Plan. 即使任何此等延續之附加保障於其條款中訂明會在基本計劃終止時同時終止，該延續之附加保障仍會維持生效，不論有任何具相反意 義之條款 。然而，不論任何情況下，延續之附加保障於基本計劃的原訂到期日以後不再生效。 (5) Where any of the Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) is expressed by its provision to be terminated when the Basic Plan is fully paid up, such Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) shall remain in force notwithstanding such contrary provision. 即使任何此等延續之附加保障於其條款中訂明會在基本計劃繳清時終止，該延續之附加保障仍會維持生效，不論有任何具相反意義之 條款 。 (6) No further supplementary beneﬁts shall be allowed. 不可再附加其他附加保障。 (7) All Inﬂation Protector Option (attached to the Basic Plan and/or the Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s), if any) shall be terminated. 所有通脹加保權益（附帶於基本計劃及／或延續之附加保障，如有）全部終止 。 (8) No increase in the Protection Amount or beneﬁt amount of any of the Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) shall be allowed. 不可提高任何延續之附加保障之保障金額或賠償金額 。 (9) No plan upgrade or beneﬁt upgrade under the Continued Supplementary Beneﬁt(s) shall be allowed. 不可提高任何延續之附加保障之計劃級別或保障 。 *OBJTSFORM856* Manulife (International) Limited ҃лɛྪ‫ڭ‬ᎈ਷ყϞࠢʮ̡ Form 856_Rider_Continuation (12/2025) *OBJTSFORM856* Page 1 of 2 Application Supplement ҳ‫͡ڭ‬ሗ‫̋ڝ‬༟ࣘ (10) The General Provisions of this Policy shall be deleted in its entirety and replaced by the Company’s standard provisions including the following 本保單之一般條款將會全部被删除，並由本公司之標準條款（包括以下條款）所取代： PAYMENT OF PREMIUMS 繳付保費 Premiums are payable during the life insured’s lifetime in accordance with the premium schedule on the latest policy change endorsement. Any date in the premium schedule which was based on the assumption that the life insured would be a speciﬁed age on such date will be corrected, if necessary, to agree with the life insured’s true age. 保費支付人須於受保人在世期間，按照最新更改保單資料批註上的保費表繳付保費。如有需要，任何列於「保費表」上，假定受保人 將達某特定年齡之日期，將被修訂至與受保人之真實年齡相符。 Premium due date will be the ﬁrst date of the payment cycle corresponding to the payment mode selected by the Policyowner. Failure to pay a premium on or before its due date to the Company in accordance with the Company’s then payment handling procedures will constitute default in payment of that premium. 保費到期日爲按投保人選擇之繳款方式所訂繳款週期的首日。若未能於每個到期日或之前，按本公司之繳款處理手續繳交保費予本公 司，便作不清償保費論。 A grace period of 31 days from its due date will be allowed for payment of a premium in default, during which time this policy will continue to be in force. If a premium remains unpaid after expiration of the grace period, then, without the necessity of sending or giving to the Owner any notarial or other notice, insurance under the policy will cease to be in force. 保費若於到期日仍未繳清，將有三十一天寬限期，期間保單仍然有效。若保費在寛限期後仍未繳交，則此保單將告失效，而本公司毋 須向保單持有人發出通知書。 Notwithstanding any other provision, premium in default will be deducted from any beneﬁt payable under this policy. 不論有否其他條款，拖欠的保費將從應支付利益中扣除。 SUICIDE 自殺 If the life insured commits suicide, whether sane or insane, before the date 1 year after this policy’s date of issue, the Company’s liability under the policy will be limited to the amount paid to the Company less any amount paid by the Company, the amounts being those paid under this policy. 於本保單簽發日起計一年內，若受保人自殺身亡，不論事發時精神是否健全，本公司之責任只限於將已繳交之保費，在扣除本公司對 本保單之支出後退還。 If the life insured commits suicide, whether sane or insane, before the date 1 year after the date of any reinstatement, the Company’s liability under the policy will be limited to the liability had there been no reinstatement, increased by the amount paid to the Company after reinstatement, excluding the repayment of default premium to the Company, and decreased by any amount paid by the Company, the amounts being those paid under this policy. 以本保單復效日起計一年內，若受保人自殺身亡，不論事發時精神是否健全，本公司之責任只限於保單復效前之責任，如同保單從未 復效，以及退還在保單復效後繳交之保費 ( 不包括不清償保費 ) 扣除本公司對本保單之支出後之餘額。 Please put a “P ” in the to the above-mentioned policyowner. 本人﹝下列簽署人﹞謹此聲明本人已向上述保單持有人清楚解釋本聲明之內容。 ✕ Signature of Insurance Advisor 保險顧問簽署 (Name 姓名： ) Date (DD/MM/YYYY) 日期﹝日 / 月 / 年﹞ Manulife (International) Limited t: MANULIFE GLOBAL SELECT (MPF) SCHEME – EMPLOYER PARTICIPATION AGREEMENT ҃лᐑଢၚ፯੶ጐ
s: MANULIFE GLOBAL SELECT (MPF) SCHEME – EMPLOYER PARTICIPATION AGREEMENT ҃лᐑଢၚ፯੶ጐ‫ ྌࠇږ‬Ñ ྇˴ਞၾ՘ᙄ ERA Go Green with E-Submission for Eﬃciency ‫މ‬һϞࣖଟ ሗԴ͜ཥɿ‫ࣸڌ‬ Internal use only ʫ௅ਖ਼͜ eMPF Received Date: ERA eMPF Web Portal ጐ‫׸ږ‬ၣɪ̨̻ BETWEEN: (1) Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, whose registered oﬃce is at 22/F., Manulife Financial Centre, 223 - 231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong (the "Trustee"); and (2) the applicant, whose name and address are given in this Participation Agreement (the "Employer"). RECITALS: (A) The Trustee is the Trustee of the MANULIFE GLOBAL SELECT (MPF) SCHEME (the "Master Trust Scheme"), which was established by a deed made by the Trustee (as may be amended from time to time, the "Deed"). (B) The Employer wishes to join the Master Trust Scheme in order to establish a retirement beneﬁts scheme (the "Sub-Scheme") for the beneﬁt of its employees. (C) The Sub-Scheme shall be governed by the Deed and the rules attached thereto (the "Rules") and this Participation Agreement. (D) Unless otherwise stated words and expressions used in this Participation Agreement shall have the meanings given to them in the Deed. PROVISIONS: 1. The Employer hereby establishes the Sub-Scheme with eﬀect from the commencement date as speciﬁed in this Participation Agreement. The Sub-Scheme shall be governed by the terms of the Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement. 2. The Employer hereby covenants with the Trustee to comply with and be bound by the provisions of the Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement and all applicable law and regulations. 3. The Employer warrants that the information contained in this Participation Agreement and any other information from time to time to be provided by the Employer in relation to contributions and as to the age, salary, length of service, beneﬁts, Contribution Investment Instruction, Fund Switching Instruction and otherwise in relation to each Employee Member will be correct in all respects. 4. Subject to the provisions of the Master Trust Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement, the Employer undertakes and agrees, to hold the Trustee (and any Investment Manager who may be appointed under the Deed by the Trustee) indemniﬁed against any and all proceedings, costs, charges, liabilities and expenses occasioned by any and all actions, claims, demands or proceedings in connection with the Trust or the Sub-Scheme arising: (i) out of the breach by the Employer of the warranty referred to in paragraph 3; or (ii) as a result of any failure or omission on the part of the Employer to duly and punctually perform or observe any obligations pursuant to the Master Trust Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement or otherwise so far as they relate to the Employer and Employee Members of the Sub-Scheme (whether they relate to the Employer and such Employee Members alone or together with another Employer and Employee Members of other Sub-Schemes). 5. The Employer undertakes and agrees to pay all fees and expenses which are payable by it under the terms of the Master Trust Deed, the Rules and this Participation Agreement. 6. The Trustee and the Employer hereby conﬁrm and acknowledge that the details speciﬁed in this Participation Agreement shall apply for the purposes of the Sub-Scheme. 7. The Employer hereby agrees that the Trustee may, in its sole discretion, deduct the fees and expenses as speciﬁed in Clause 19.5.1 of the Deed from the Reserve Account of the Employer under the Sub-Scheme. 8. The amount of Employer's Regular Voluntary Contribution and Employee's Regular Voluntary Contribution are to be speciﬁed by the Employer to the Trustee in such form / manner as prescribed by the Trustee from time to time. 9. The vesting scale(s) referred to in Rule 7.3 of the Deed are speciﬁed in such form / manner as prescribed by the Trustee from time to time. 10. This Participation Agreement shall be terminated in accordance with Rule 19.5 of the Deed. 11. 下的任何一段、或不同意以下的任何特定段落、或閣下的持牌保險中介人的講述與閣下所閱讀或理解本聲 明的內容有異，請勿簽署確認或繳付此額外投資保費。 閣下可向銷售的持牌保險中介人索取本文件的英文版本。You may request the English version of this statement from your licensed insurance intermediary. 此乃重要資料 現不理想等），此情況可能啟動保單自動提早終止。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 (9)持牌保險中介人的酬勞：若閣下選擇購買此投連壽險保單，持牌保險代理人將會就閣下每繳付$100 美元保費金額中，獲取平均$2.7美元的酬勞。若閣下選擇繳付後續定期增額保費，持牌保險代理人 將會就閣下每繳付$100美元保費金額中，獲取平均$2.6美元的酬勞。 持牌保險中介人的酬勞是基於閣下會在整個保費繳付期內繳付所有供款的假設下，計算所得的平均 值。該酬勞包括所有直接因銷售此保單（包括定期增額保費，如適用）而向持牌保險代理人支付的 款項（包括前期及其後的佣金、花紅及其他獎金）。 **持牌保險代理人每年實際上可獲取的酬勞金額可能有所不同，而酬勞金額於保單首年╱初期會較 高。 某些無關重要、並非直接因銷售此保單（包括定期增額保費，如適用）而支付及難以兌現為現金的 酬勞並不包括在計算當中。 如果閣下希望進一步了解持牌保險代理人就此保單（包括定期增額保費，如適用）可能取得的酬 勞，閣下有權向閣下的持牌保險代理人查詢。 **只適用於首次整付保費 本人（「客戶」）現確認已閱讀及明白，並同意受以上各段之約束。 < IFSAD_MIPLUS2_CHI (11/2025) > (11/2025) > 《重要資料聲明書》及《申請人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（“投連壽險”）保單（續） 乙部：合適性聲明 本人（「客戶」）明白並同意（只可選一項）： A  根據本人於「財務需要分析」及「風險承擔能力問卷」所披露的現時需要及風險承擔能力等資料， 此投連壽險保單之特點和其風險水平，及本人所選擇的相關投資選項組合均適合本人。 或 B  儘管根據本人於「財務需要分析」及「風險承擔能力問卷」所披露的現時需要、風險承擔能力及知 識（包括對衍生產品的相關投資知識）等資料，此投連壽險保單之特點及／或風險水平及／或本人 所選擇的相關投資選項組合（例如，投資選項連繫的相關基金具有衍生工具成份）可能並不適合本 人，但本人確認基於下述原因，本人打算及意欲申請此投連壽險保單： （如選擇「B」項，客戶必須於此欄內提供原因。） 本人完全明白從每筆已繳保費的保費存入日起計算的首5年內，對此投連壽險保單提取部份款項或退保此 保單（因受保人身故而導致者除外），本人所選定的投資選項之單位會按「先進先出」的原則進行贖回， 而本人須支付提早贖回費，而適用的提早贖回費率按每筆已繳保費的相關保費存入日起計的年數而定。 本人預計本人的可支配收入及╱或儲蓄（此投連壽險保單的利益除外）將足以應付在未來5年的可預期或 突發的開支。可預期及突發的開支包括（但不限於）以下項目： • 家庭生活開支、按揭供款、租金、貸款還款、保險費用及物業維修費用等； • 門診醫療開支及定期身體檢查費用等； • 緊急資金以應付各種突發及不幸的情況，例如患上任何一種嚴重疾病、家庭成員身故或喪失定期收入 等。 本人確認本人已考慮此投連壽險保單的提早贖回費及本人的財政能力以應付在未來5年內可預期及突發的 開支，並願意申請此投連壽險保單。 本人確認，除非本人清楚了解此投連壽險保單（包括定期增額保費，如適用）及／或所選擇的相關投資 選項組合，並已獲解釋此投連壽險保單的合適性；否則，本人不應購買此投連壽險保單（包括定期增額 保費，如適用）及／或選取相關的投資選項組合。本人擁有最終的決定權。 請勿撕去 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 IFSAD_MIPLUS2_CHI [此權益只適用於如申請人所參與的團體保險計劃保單載有醫療保險轉保權益，並列明於宏利所發出的現行及有效的福利賠償表內] Notes : 注意事項： (1) You must complete and sign this Form and send it to Manulife at the address shown below within 31 calendar days prior to your last date of employment. Please ensure the Form reaches Manulife on or before your last date of employment. (2) In order to process your request to exercise the Medical Insurance Conversion Privilege, please provide the below information. After Manulife has received the information, the assigned insurance advisor will contact you regarding the medical insurance conversion process. (3) Dependent(s) (if applicable) who ful ll the eligibility requirements as stated on the provisions of the Medical Insurance Conversion Privilege must elect for the Medical Insurance Conversion Privilege together with the Applicant. If the Applicant is not eligible for this Privilege, his/her dependent(s) are deemed to be ineligible. (b) Please use BLOCK LETTERS to complete this Form and initial next to any corrections you make. (c) *means delete whichever is inappropriate. Please insert "N.A." if not applicable. (d) The information collected from you and in respect of you in support of this election of transfer can be used by Manulife, trustee(s), relevant service provider(s), and the government or regulatory bodies including the MPFA in activities relating to the processing of your election(s) of transfer as requested in this Form. The information may be transferred to other division(s) within Manulife, the relevant trustee(s), government or regulatory bodies including the MPFA or other parties including delegates, intermediaries or any service providers of Manulife or the relevant trustees, for such purpose(s) or for a purpose directly related to such purpose(s). All data processes may involve a transfer of information to places either within or outside the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. You are required to supply the information in this Form and failure to do so may result in your transfer being delayed. (e) The MPFA and other regulatory bodies in any jurisdiction shall be authorized to inspect any information under the scheme. (f) By writing to the Privacy Of cer of Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, you can correct and have access to your personal data. (g) All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the "Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance" ("Notice"). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice through Manulife's website at www.manulife.com.hk. t: Entity Tax Residency Self-Certi cation Form (CRS) 實體稅務居民身份自我證明表格 《共同匯報標準》 Notes
s: Entity Tax Residency Self-Certi cation Form (CRS) 實體稅務居民身份自我證明表格 《共同匯報標準》 Notes ： (1) This is a self-certiﬁcation provided by you to Manulife for the purpose of Automatic Exchange of Financial Account Information (“AEOI”) in compliance with tax law and regulations (including but not limited to the Inland Revenue Ordinance (Cap.112) and regulations based on the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) Common Reporting Standard (CRS) for automatic exchange of information). The data collected may be transmitted by Manulife to the Inland Revenue Department which may further exchange such information to the competent authority of another reportable jurisdiction. (2) Please complete this form where you need to self certify on behalf of an entity account holder. Entity refers to all corporations or partnerships (excluding sole proprietors). If you are a sole proprietor, please complete a "Individual Tax Residency Self-Certiﬁcation Form (CRS)". (3) As a ﬁnancial institution, Manulife is not allowed to give tax or legal advice. If you have any questions regarding your tax residency, please consult your tax adviser or visit the OECD and Inland Revenue Department’s AEOI website respectively for more CRS and related information. (4) This self-certiﬁcation will remain valid unless there is any change in circumstances relating to your status of tax residency(ies). You must notify Manulife within 30 days if there is any change in circumstances that makes any of the information provided in any parts of this self-certiﬁcation form incorrect or incomplete and provide an updated self-certiﬁcation form. (5) Each Controlling Person of a Passive Non-Financial Entity is required to submit a separate self-certiﬁcation form. (6) Please read the Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (the latest version made available by Manulife) ("Notice") before you provide the information. The Notice is also available on Manulife's website (www.manulife.com.hk). The Notice will cover all information collected hereunder and such other information under Manulife’s record from time to time. By submitting the information/documents requested in this form, you agree to the usage and transfer of such information/documents as described in the Notice which shall include any data usage/transfer for CRS purpose. s: Minimum MPF Benefits Transfer Form for MPF Exempted ORSO Registered Scheme 最低強積金利益轉移表格－獲強積金豁免的職業退休註冊計劃 Notes : (1) This Form should be used when a scheme member wishes to transfer the minimum MPF benefits from MPF exempted ORSO registered scheme to a MPF scheme. (2) Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS and tick the appropriate boxes. (3) * Means delete whichever is inappropriate. (4) Please initial next to any corrections you make on this Form. (5) Leave it blank if a member has newly joined the scheme and is not aware of the account number for his/her new account. (6) If there are contributions outstanding, accrued benefits will not be transferred until all of the outstanding contributions and contribution surcharges, if any, have been paid to Manulife or the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority ("MPFA") has given its written consent for Manulife to effect the transfer, whichever is earlier. (7) Transfer will be done upon receipt of full evidence and information. (8) The information collected from you and in respect of you in support of this election of transfer can be used by Manulife, approved trustee(s), relevant service provider(s), and the government or regulatory bodies including the MPFA in activities relating to the processing of the transfer as requested in this Form. The information may be transferred to other division(s) within Manulife, the relevant approved trustee(s), government or regulatory bodies including the MPFA or other parties including delegates, intermediaries or any service providers of Manulife or the relevant approved trustees, for such purpose(s) or for a purpose directly related to such purpose(s). All data processes may involve a transfer of information to places either within or outside the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. You are required to supply the information in this Form and failure to do so may result in your request being delayed. (9) The MPFA and other regulatory bodies in any jurisdiction shall be authorized to inspect any information under the scheme. (10) By writing to the Privacy Officer of Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, you can correct and have access to your personal data. (11) All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the "Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance" ("Notice"). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice through Manulife's website at www.manulife.com.hk. (12) Upon completion of this Form, a scheme member should submit this Form to : (a) New Employer : For election to have the benefits transferred to a contribution account in the new employer's scheme. the New CIES. 客戶/控股公司將開設一個資本投資者入境計劃戶口（如下所定義），以購買和/或持有獲許金 融資產，以滿足新資本投資者入境計劃的相關要求。 (3) Manulife is an insurer permitted to carry on Class C business as specified in Part 2 of Schedule 1 under the Insurance Ordinance (Cap. 41 of the Laws of Hong Kong). 宏利是一家獲准根據香港法例第41章《保險業條例》附表1第2部分進行類別C業務的保險公司。 NOW IT IS HEREBY AGREED as follows: 茲達成協議如下： 1. DEFINITIONS AND INTERPRETATION 定義及解釋 1.1 "Approval-in-Principle" means a preliminary and provisional grant of approval in writing given by Director of Immigration to the Customer to enter Hong Kong and/or remain in Hong Kong pursuant to the New Capital Investment Entrant Scheme. 「原則上批准」是指入境事務處處長根據新資本投資者入境計劃，向客戶發出的書面初步和臨 時批准，以進入和/或逗留在香港。 "CIES Account" means an account opened by and operated in accordance with the instructions of the Customer/Holding Company at Manulife for the purpose of buying and/or holding Permissible Financial Assets in order to fulfill the relevant requirements under the New Capital Investment Entrant Scheme. 「資本投資者入境計劃戶口」指客戶/客戶的公司為符合資本投資者入境計劃的有關要求而於宏利 開立及跟據客戶指示操作以作買入及/或持有獲許金融資產的戶口。 "CIES IP" means the CIES Investment Portfolio, which is set up and managed by the Hong Kong Investment Corporation Limited. 「資本投資者入境計劃投資組合」 指由香港投資管理有限公司成立和管理的資本投資者入境計劃 投資組合。 "DGIP" means the Direct-General of Investment Promotion of Invest Hong Kong. 「 投資推廣署署長」 指香港投資推廣署署長。 "Director of Immigration" or "DoI" means the Director of the Immigration Department. 「 入境事務處處長」 指入境事務處的處長。 "Eligible Policies" means "Manulife Investment Plus 2" or such other investment linked assurance schemes which are underwritten and designated as Eligible Policies by Manulife and accepted by the DGIP and/or Director of Immigration as Eligible Collective Investment Schemes. 「合格保單」 指「宏利投資計劃2」或宏利承保和指定為合格保單的及被投資推廣署署長及／或 入境事務處處長接受為合資格的集體投資計劃的其他與投資相連的保險計劃。 Page 2 of 22 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 New_CIES_FI_AGT (12/2025) "Entry Application" means an entry application submitted to DoI for a visa/entry permit to enter Hong Kong and/or remain in Hong Kong for residence under the New Capital Investment Entrant Scheme. 「入境申請」是指根據新資本投資者入境計劃以進入香港及/或逗留在香港居留為目的向入境事務 處處長提交的入境簽證/進入許可申請。 "Formal Approval" means a confirmed grant of approval in writing given by the DoI to the Customer to enter Hong Kong and/or remain in Hong Kong pursuant to the New Capital Investment Entrant Scheme. 「正式批准」是指入境事務處處長發出批准申請人依據新資本投資者入境計劃進入香港及/或 在香港逗留的書面確認。 "Hong Kong" means the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People’s Republic of China. 「 香港」 指中華人民共和國香港特別行政區。 "HKIC" means the Hong Kong Investment Corporation Limited. 「 香港投資管理有限公司」指香港投資管理有限公司。 "Immigration Department" means the Immigration Department of the Hong Kong government. 「 入境事務處」 指香港政府入境事務處。 "Indemnified Persons" has the meaning ascribed to it in Clause 5.2 of this Agreement. 「受償人」具有本合約第5.2條給予該詞的涵義。 "Insurance Ordinance" means the Insurance Ordinance, Cap. 41 of the laws of Hong Kong. 「保險業條例」指香港法例第41章

If more than one instruction of the same type from the same employer is received by Manulife on the same business day*, only the rst one will be processed. Instruction received later on the same business day* will be treated as submission on the next business day*. 宏利一般會在收件後四個工作天*內處理以指定格式遞交的書面指示。如宏利在同一個工作天*內收到僱主多於一個同類書面指示，宏利只會處理首個收到的指示。而在同 一個工作天*較後收到的同類書面指示，將被視為於下一個工作天*提交。 2. Given the time required to process the instruction, there is a time gap between the date Manulife receives the instructions and the date of completion. During the time gap, investment market could uctuate signi cantly where fund unit prices may go down or up. Please carefully consider your own risk tolerance level and nancial circumstances (as well as your own retirement plan) before making any investment choices. 由宏利接獲至完成處理指示有一定的時間差距，期間投資市場可以出現顯著的波動，而基金單位價格可跌可升。在作出投資選擇前，您必須小心衡量個人可承受風險的程度、財 政狀況及您的退休計劃。 5. t: Let’s Work Together on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing 攜手打
s: Let’s Work Together on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing 攜手打擊洗錢及 恐怖分子資金籌集活動 For ORSO Policy 公積金適用 As one of the major financial centres in the world, it is very important for Hong Kong to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) and counter-terrorist financing (CTF) regime, which is vital for maintaining the integrity and stability of our financial system. Hong Kong is committed to fighting against money laundering and terrorist financing activities and introduced the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (AMLO), which came into effect on April 1, 2012 and the latest amendment effective on November 1, 2018. The Insurance Authority has issued Guideline on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Guideline) and Manulife, as an authorized long term insurer, is required to comply with the AMLO and the Guideline. As required by the AMLO and the Guideline, we need to identify and verify our customers as part of our due diligence process. In this respect, we seek your kind cooperation in providing the following documents/information for fulfilling the requirements. 香港作為國際主要的金融中心之一，於打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集活動方面，必須實行有效措施，以確保本港的金融 體制維持穩定健Ό。香港一直致力打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集活動，並於二○一二年四月一日實施〈打擊洗錢及恐怖 分子資金籌集條例〉法例，而最新修訂條例亦於二○一八年十一月一日生效。 保險業監管局已對此法例發出打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集指引。而宏利作為獲授權經營長期業務的保險公司，亦須遵 守有關法例及指引。 因應有關條例及指引，宏利須採用盡職審查措施以確認及核實客戶的身份。因此，代理人及客戶須根據法例規定提供以 下所需之文件及資料。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 This checklist summarizes most of the required documents / information for due diligence and does not mean that it is exhaustive. Manulife may request additional documents / information under different situations. 以下文件清單列表只綜合大部分盡職審查之所需文件／資料要求，但並非盡錄所有要求。宏利會因應不同情況要求客戶提供額外的補充文件／資料。 Important Notes 重要事項： a) The documents / information submitted should be valid as of the time of submission (if applicable). 所提供的文件／資料於遞交當時必須為有效(如適用)。 b) For documents that are not in English or Chinese, translation provided by a professional third party is required. 如所提供的文件並非以英文或中文刊載，請提供由專業第三者翻譯之譯本。 For ORSO Policy 公積金適用 Documents / Information required 所需文件／資料 Company Type 公司ᗳ別 Sole Proprietorships 獨資公司 Partnerships and Unincorporated Bodies (e.g. association and societies) 合夥公司及非法人團體 （如：會社及社團） Corporations Incorporated in HK 於香港成立之法團公司 Corporations Incorporated Overseas 於海外成立之法團公司 Application Form 申請表 Authorized Person 獲授權人士 (i) ID Note 1 copy of the authorized person 獲授權人士身份證明文件註 1副本 (ii) Copy of Board Resolution / Authorization letter 董事會決議案副本／授權書 Copy of Business Registration Certi cate (BR) 商業登記證副本 Copy of Certi cate of Incorporation (CI) / Certi cate of Registration of Non-Hong Kong Company (CR) 公司註冊證書／非香港公司註冊證明書副本 Copy of Memorandum & Articles of Association (M & A) 公司組織章程大綱及細則副本 N/A 不適用 N/A 不適用 Note註 2 Note註 3 or equivalent 或等同文件 or equivalent 或等同文件 For Corporations 法團公司： (i) the latest Annual Return to identify and verify the names of the Company Directors and Shareholders of the Policyholder 最近之周年報表副本以識別及核實保單持有公司的董事及 股東姓名 For Sole Proprietorships 獨資公司： (i) the latest Electronic / Certi ed Extract of information on the Business Register to identify and verify the name of the owner; For individual who does NOT hold a HK Permanent Identity Card, other identi cation documents such as a copy of valid passport or a current national (i.e. Government or State-issued) identity card, which bear the individual's photograph must be provided. The nationality reported should match with the information shown on the copy of identity proof submitted. 倘若有關人士屬非香港永久性居民身份證持有人，則必須提供‫ڝ‬有其個人照片的其他身份證明文件，如有效護照或國民(即由政府或國家簽發)身份證明文件副本。申報之國籍必須與提交之 身份證明文件副本所表示相同。 2. If it is not available, please provide the copy of Certi cate of Registration of a Society or Certi cate of Exemption from Registration of a Society under the Societies Ordinance in HK or equivalent. 如未能提供上述文件，請提供根據香港社團條例發出的社團註冊證明書或社團豁免註冊證明書或等同文件副本。 3. In the event where there is no business registration or registration/certi cation under the Societies Ordinance, please provide the partnership deed or the constitution of the organization as a replacement of M & A. 如未有商業登記或未有根據社團條例已獲得註冊／證明，請提供合夥契約或相關機構的組織章程。 4. In the event where there is no reliable and independent source to identify the Person-In-Charge or equivalent, please provide the constitution of the policyholder for inspection. Manulife reserves the right to obtain further information to identify the name of the Person-In-Charge or equivalent of the policyholder. 如未有可靠及獨立來源以確實最高負責人或同等人員，請提供保單持有公司的組織章程以作查核。宏利保留要求取得更多資料的權利，以確實保單持有公司的最高負責人或同等人員的姓名。 5.
