Print Reset Save Application for Participation in Manulife Global Select (MPF) Scheme (Flexi Retirement Contribution Member) ҃ л ᐑ ଢ ၚ ፯ ੶ ጐ ‫ ͡ ྌ ࠇ ږ‬ሗ ‫ ࣸ ڌ‬І ፯ ৗ ; Զ ಛ ϓ ࡰ Notes ： (1) This form must be issued in conjunction with the “Essential documents and guide for persons joining the Manulife Global Select (MPF) Scheme” (“the Guide”) containing the MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document of the Manulife Global Select (MPF) Scheme ("the Scheme") and other essential documents which you should read carefully before completing the form. You may also visit Manulife website to read such documents. (2) All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the “Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (the latest version made available by Manulife)” ("Notice"). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice from your Manulife's intermediary or through Manulife website. (3) Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS and tick the appropriate boxes. (4) Please initial next to any corrections you make on this form. (5) Manulife will process this request upon receipt of this completed form and all pertinent document(s), if any. (6) Only relevant employees as de ned in Section 2 of the MPFS Ordinance who are of 18 years of age or over and below retirement age (i.e. age 65) are eligible to make Flexi Retirement Contribution. (7) No receipt will be issued upon contribution payment. The relevant acknowledgement will be included in the welcome package upon sub-scheme set up. Member account will be set up within 30 days upon receipt of this completed application form, attachment(s) and payment (if applicable). The date of joining scheme will be taken as the rst calendar date of the month when the sub-scheme set up is completed. (8) You are required to submit a copy of your HKID card with this application. If you do not possess a HKID card or your HKID card is NOT a permanent identity card, a copy of your passport (only the page(s) with personal particulars and passport number is required) should be provided. 注意事項： ͉‫ࣸڌ‬඲ஹΝࠠࠅ˖΁ʿܸˏ ቇ͜‫׵‬ਞ̋҃лᐑଢၚ፯ ੶ጐ‫ྌࠇږ‬ɛɻܸˏɓԻ೯̈f෬ᄳ͉‫ࣸڌ‬ ‫̀ۃ‬඲˺୚ቡᛘܸˏɪ‫ה‬༱ٙ҃лᐑଢၚ፯੶ጐ‫ږ‬ ࠇྌࠇྌ੶ጐ‫ྌࠇږ‬Ⴍ‫ࣣ׼‬e˴ࠅࠇྌ༟ࣘ˖΁ʿ Չ˼ࠠࠅ˖΁fઆ͵̙‫҃׵‬лၣࠫᓭᚎ༈ഃ˖΁f ҃л̙ܲ‫׵‬Ϟᗫࡈɛ༟ࣘӷᒯૢԷٙ‫˒܄‬ஷٝ ҃͟л౤Զʘ௰อ‫͉و‬ஷٝ‫ࠑה‬dஈଣϞᗫ༟ ࣘf৿νઆ͊Ϟ୚ቡ༈ஷٝdઆ̙੽આٙ҃лʕʧɛ‫ீא‬ཀ ҃лၣࠫ՟੻༈ஷٝf (3) 請用正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格內加 號。 (4) 如需作出任何刪改，請於刪改之位置旁簽署。 (5) 宏利將於收訖已填妥表格及有關文件(如有)後處理是項申請。 (6) 只有符合強制性公積金計劃條例第二條所述之有關僱員之定 義，年齡屆乎18歲或以上至退休年齡（即65歲）者，方有資 格參與自選退休供款。 (7) 收訖您的供款後，我們將不會發出任何收據。於附屬計劃設立 後發出的歡迎文件中將隨附有關確認。成員帳戶將於收訖本填 妥表格、其附件及付款（如適用）後的30天內設立。而成員 參加計劃日期會設定為附屬計劃完成設立該月之首個公曆日。 (8) 此表格必須ஹΝ࠰ಥԒ΅ᗇਓ͉一併提交。如您沒有香港身 份證或您的香港身份證並非香港永久性居民身份證，則必須 提供護照副本（只需附有個人資料及護照號碼等頁）。 A. s: ੶ጐ‫˴྇ږ‬ਞၾࠇྌቇ͜ 客戶補充資料收集表格（強積金） 聲明 - 適用於合夥公司及非法人團體 （會社、會所、社團、慈善組織、宗教組織、院校、友好互助社團、合作社或公積金社團） 註： 1. 請用正楷填寫本表格，並於適當空格內加「P」號。如有任何修改，請在旁簽署作實。 2. 請把填妥的表格郵遞至計劃管理人「香港九龍觀塘偉業街223-231號宏利金融中心A座21樓宏利人壽保險(國際)有限公司香港退休業務部」。 3. 如以下填寫空間不足，請撰用另一張紙繼續填寫。 4. 如有意索取本表格之英文版本，請致電僱主熱線2108 1234與我們客戶服務主任聯絡。 附屬計劃編號： (如適用) 本人（姓名 ）為（僱主／公司名稱 ）「有關僱主」 之最終擁有人/控制人，職銜為 /獲授權人士/合夥人 *（請刪去不適用者），謹此確認及聲明： 1. 根據香港商業登記記錄或於香港社團條例下註冊的記錄，有關僱主乃為合理/合法目的而存在及組成。 營業地址： 以上資料如有缺漏，宏利可參閱已提交的登記文件副本上的資料及/或宏利可參照香港商業登記冊內電子摘錄上的資料（如適用）。 如未有商業登記或未有根據社團條例已獲得註冊/證明，請提供合夥契約或相關機構的組織章程。 2. 如適用，請提供有關僱主之專業或行業協會的會員註冊/會員編號。（請提供有關註冊/會員證明。） 專業或行業協會名稱 註冊號碼或會員編號 3. 所有(i)直接或間接擁有／控制多於25%的資本或利潤或投票權；或參與及行使管理控制權；或(ii)最終擁有/控制有關僱主的個人姓名資料如下： 姓氏 名字 有關僱主管理權性質 £ 直接或間接擁有／控制多於25%的資本或 利潤或投票權；或參與及行使管理控制權 £ 最終擁有/控制有關僱主 £ 直接或間接擁有／控制多於25%的資本或 利潤或投票權；或參與及行使管理控制權 £ 最終擁有/控制有關僱主 £ 直接或間接擁有／控制多於25%的資本或 利潤或投票權；或參與及行使管理控制權 £ 最終擁有/控制有關僱主 重要提示： 如未有提供商業登記或未有根據社團條例已獲得註冊/證明及/或任何合夥單位為合夥法團，經評估已提交的文件後，宏利可要求額外的文件 / 資料 及此聲明及有關文件 / 資料的核實證明書 / 報告。 本人確認 (1) 所有已提交或將提交的文件均已經及將被本人核實該等文件的正本；及 (2) 本人已經由宏利的中介人提供或宏利的網站 www.manulife.com.hk 閱畢《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知（20130401-01版本）》及遵守有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉就任何監管目的收集及透露相關資料予 宏利。 MPF SDD - any) if no option is specified or the specified option is invalid 如未有指明或所選擇的付款方法無法被使用，預設電子 提取付款方法（如有）將採用為是次付款方法 For withdrawal instruction(s), please complete this section. 若申請提取金額，請填寫此部份。 By e-Payout If payment is exceeding HKD1,000,000 (or equivalent), or the instruction cannot be executed, it will be issued by cheque. 經轉數快之付款，每份保單每日最高存款交易不能超逾港元1,000,000 (或等值)。如交易金額超逾港元1,000,000 (或 等值) ，或無法執行有關付款指示，總額將以支票形式支付。 - For payout through Direct Credit, only applicable to payment with maximum daily transaction limit not exceeding HKD300,000/USD37,500 per policy. If payment is exceeding HKD300,000/USD37,500, or the instruction cannot be executed, it will be issued by cheque. 經直接存入銀行帳戶之付款，每份保單每日最高存款交易不能超逾港元300,000／美元37,500。如交 易金額超逾港元300,000／美元37,500，或無法執行有關付款指示，總額將以支票形式支付。 - The above instruction will replace the existing default e-Payout method (if any). 以上指示將取代現有之電子預設付款指示(如有)。 - If there is no default e-Payout method set in our record, it will be issued by cheque. 如未有設立電子預設付款方法，總額將以支票形式支付。 £ For ALL policies - Paid by Cheque in Hong Kong Dollar(a) 適用於所有保單 - 以港幣支票支付(a) £ For USD/CNY policy - Paid by Cheque in policy currency(b) (drawn in Hong Kong) 適用於美元／人民幣保單 - 以保單貨幣支票支付(b（) 由香港的銀行付款） £ For USD policy only - Paid by Cheque in USD(b) (drawn in United States) 只適用於美元保單 - 以美元支票支付(b（) 由美國的銀行付款） £ For AUD/CAD/GBP/SGD policy - Paid by cheque in policy currency(b) (drawn in respective country) 適用於澳元／加元／英磅／新加坡元保單 - 以保單貨幣支票支付(b（) 由各國的銀行付款） Cheque collection method支票交付方式 £ Through my Insurance Advisor 經由本人的保險顧問轉交 £ By mail to my latest correspondence address with Manulife 寄往本人於宏利紀錄的最新通訊地址 £ By registered mail to my latest correspondence address with Manulife (only applicable to payment cheque amount of HKD1,000,000 or above or equivalent in other currency.) (c) 以掛號方式寄往 本人於宏利紀錄的最新通訊地址（只適用於支票金額為港元1,000,000或以上或相等的其他貨幣）(c) Notes 註： (a) For polic

Print Reset Save APPLICATION FOR CHANGE OF LIFE INSURED 更改受保人申請表 Branch code 分行編號 Location 地點 Advisor’s Code 保險顧問編號 Advisor’s Name 保險顧問姓名 Advisor’s Contact no. 保險顧問聯絡電話 Policy no. 保單編號 Full name of Policyowner 保單持有人姓名 Full name of Current Life Insured 現受保人姓名 Points to Note 申請須知： • This Application for Change of Life Insured form ('Form') is used for change of Life Insured under the policy with Change of Life Insured Provision. 此更改受保人申請表（「申請表」）於附有更改受保人條款之保單用作更改受保人。 • Please provide the full name as shown on Identity Card or Passport or Business Registration Certificate or other relevant Identity Document. 請提供身份證或護照或商業登記證或其他有關身份證明文件所示之全名。 • Please complete this Form in English BLOCK letters legibly with Policyowner’s signature that corresponds with the Company record. Any amendments to this Form should be clearly indicated and countersigned by the Policyowner. 請用英文正楷清楚地填寫此表格，並由保單持有人簽署，而簽名必須與本公司檔案相符。 在此表格內如有任何更改，保單持有人必須清楚註明並在更改的位置簽署作實。 • Manulife shall have the right to revise this Form from time to time and to accept or reject the Form submitted by you if you fail to fulfill the Company’s requirements. 宏利有權隨時更改表格內容，如閣下未能符合本公司的有關規定，宏利將保留接受或拒絕閣下遞交之申請表的權利。 • In this Form, ‘Manulife’ and the ‘Company’ refer to Manulife (International) Limited. 於此申請表內，「宏利」，「本公司」及「貴公司」是指宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司。 • After your change request is processed, you will receive a digital confirmation notice/endorsement (if digital version is available) if you have opted for e-statements/e-notices under “Other statements/notices/endorsement” and respective paper notice/endorsement will not be provided. You can access your e-Notices and e-Endorsements by logging in to our website or app. 在您的申請處理完成後，如您在「其他結單／通知／批註」類別下選擇了電子結單／通知，您將收取電子版通知／批註（如電子版可供提供），而該通知／批註將不會獲發紙本。您可以 登入我們的網站或流動應用程式，查看您的電子通知及電子批註。 Important Notes for the Change of Life Insured application 更改受保人申請的重要事項： (1) “Effective Date of Change” means the effective date of change of Life Insured under the policy as recorded in the relevant Endorsement issued by the Company. 「更改生效日」指由本公司簽發的有關批註上記錄的更改保單受保人之生效日期。 (2) The Policyowner may apply for change of Life Insured under the policy starting from the first policy anniversary or one year from the policy is issued, whichever is the later. 保單持有人可於第一個保單周年日或保單簽發一年後（以較後者為準）提出更改受保人的申請。 (3) As at the Effective Date of Change, the New Life Insured must meet either one of the following conditions : 於更改生效日，新受保人必須符合以下其中一個條件： i. the actual age of the New Life Insured is 60 or below; or 新受保人的實際年齡為60歲或以下；或 ii. the actual age of the New Life Insured is not greater than that of the Current Life Insured and is not greater than 75 (only applicable for ManuGrand Saver, ManuImperial Saver or ManuCentury) or the age limit that specified in the eligible products Change of Life Insured provision if otherwise. 新受保人的實際年齡不大於現受保人的年齡及不大於75歲（只適用於豐譽傳承保障計劃、創富傳承保障計劃或世紀傳承保障計劃）或適用產品之更改受保人條款內所指定歲數之上限。 (4) If the Effective Date of Change falls on a policy anniversary date, the “Age” of the New Life Insured means the age nearest birthday as at the relevant policy anniversary date. If the Effective Date of Change does not fall on a policy anniversary date, the "Age" of the New Life Insured means the age nearest birthday (i) as at the Effective Date of Change for the period from the Effective Date of Change up to the end of the policy year in which the Effective Date of Change falls, and (ii) as at the relevant policy anniversary date for the next policy year onwards. Premium will be calculated based on the age nearest birthday so applied. 如更改生效日在保單週年日，新受保人的「年齡」是指相關保單周年日當天最接近一個生日所達之歲數。如更改生效日不是在保單週年日，則新受保人的「年齡」(i) 由更改生效日至更改生 效日所屬之保單年度完結期間，是指更改生效日當天最接近一個生日所達之歲數；及 (ii) 由下一保單年度開始，是指相關保單周年日當天最接近一個生日所達之歲數。保費將根據相應的 最接近一個生日所達之歲數計算。 (5) Both Current Life Insured and New Life Insured must be alive at the time of change of Life Insured. 於更改受保人生效時，現受保人及新受保人必須同時在世。 (6) The coverage on the New Life Insured shall commence on the Effective Date of Change, and the coverage on the Current Life Insured shall cease at the same time when the coverage on the New Life Insured commences. 新受保人的保障將於更改生效日開始生效，而現受保人的保障將於新受保人的保障生效的一刻同時終止。 (7) Change of Life Insured is not available to policies with irrevocable beneficiary(ies) designation. 更改受保人不適用於已指定不可撤換受益人的保單。 (8) Upon the change of Life Insured of the policy, any beneficiary designation previously made will be automatically revoked on the Effective Date of Change. 於更改保單受保人後，任何較早前所指定的受益人將於更改生效日自動被撤銷。 (9) (Only applicable to ManuGrand Saver/ManuImperial Saver) Upon the change of Life Insured of the policy, all the existing supplementary benefits (if any, with the exception of Payor Benefit provided that the following conditions are met as at the Effective Date of Change) under the policy will be automatically terminated on the Effective Date of Change. Where the following conditions are met, the premium (calculated based on the prevailing premium rate) and the coverage period of Payor Benefit (if any) may be adjusted based on the Age of the New Life Insured: （只適用於豐譽傳承保障計劃／創富傳承保障計劃）於更改保單受保人後，附加於保單上之所有附加保障（如有，除保費支付人利益附加保障於更改生效日時符合以下情況外）將由更改 生效日起自動終止。如符合以下情況，保費支付人利益附加保障（如有）之保費(根據當時的保費率計算）及保障年期將根據新受保人的年齡而可能有所調整： i. The age nearest birthday of the New Life Insured is below 16, and the New Life Insured was born for at least 15 days; and 新受保人之最接近一個生日所達之歲數為16歲以下，以及新受保人已出生不少於15日；及 ii. The difference in age (as determined based on the age nearest birthday) between the New Life Insured and the Payor under the Payor Benefit is 45 years or below. 新受保人與保費支付人利益附加保障下的保費支付人以最接近一個生日計算所達歲數差距為45年或以下。 (10) Unless otherwise mentioned under Important Notes (9) above, all the existing supplementary benefits (if any) under the policy will be automatically terminated on the Effective Date of Change and no subsequent addition of any supplementary benefits is allowed upon the change of Life Insured of the policy. 除以上重要事項(9)提及外，於更改保單受保人後，附加於保單上之所有附加保障（如有）將於更改保單受保人的生效日起自動終止，其後亦不可附加任何附加保障。 (11) The 2-ye

Print Policy No. 保單編號 Apollo Protection Linked Plan Investment Choice Services Form 傲宏保障投資相連計劃 投資選項服務申請表 Branch code 分行編號 Insurance Advisor code 保險顧問編號 Insurance Advisor's name 保險顧問姓名 Contact no. 聯絡電話 Full name of Policyowner 保單持有人姓名 Reset Save Location 地點 Important Notes 重要事項： (1) All dollar amounts are stated in US dollar unless otherwise stated. 除特別指明外，所有金額皆以美元為貨幣單位。 (2) Please ensure the correct Code is used by referring to the Investment Choice Table and read the remarks before form filling (if applicable). 請參考投資選項表以便填上正確的編號，並於填寫此表格前參閱有關部分之註釋（如適用）。 (3) Any amendments should be endorsed by the policyowner in full signature. 任何資料如有更改，保單持有人必須在更改的位置簽署作實。 (4) Manulife (International) Limited (the "Company" or "Manulife") shall have the right to update this form from time to time and to accept or reject the form submitted by you if you fail to fulfill the Company’s requirements. 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（「本公司」或「宏利」）有權隨時更新表格內容，如閣下未能符合本公司的有關規定，本公司將保留接受或拒絕閣下遞交之申請表格的權利。 (5) Please indicate the type of investment choice service requested by putting a “  ” in the appropriate box. 請註明所要求之投資選項服務並於適當方格內填上「  」號。 (6) Allocation percentage of each investment choice selected should be in whole number. 所選每項投資選項分配百分比必須為整數。 (7) To effect the instruction, this form should be completed, signed and received by the Company by 3:00 p.m. Hong Kong time provided that the day is a business day. 如欲辦理有關指示，須填妥並簽署本表格，並於營業日內香港時間下午3時前送達本公司。 (8) Please provide the information required in this form, otherwise, the Company would not be able to comply with the relevant regulatory requirements. If you do not provide us the necessary information / forms in timely manner, the Company may not be able to process your application or may even reject your application and we will not bear any loss that may arise. 請根據此表格提供所需資料，否則，本公司將無法遵從相關規管要求。如閣下未能及時提交需要的資料／表格，本公司可能無法處理閣下的申請甚或拒絕閣下的申請，亦不會承擔任何可 能因此引致的損失。 (9) Please read the Investment Choice Brochure of Apollo Protection Linked Plan and the offering documents of the underlying funds corresponding to the investment choices to understand the nature and risks of the underlying funds. 請參閱傲宏保障投資相連計劃的投資選項手冊及投資選項的相關基金的銷售文件，以了解相關基金的性質及風險。 (10) You should select the investment choice(s) only if you understand the nature and risks of the investment choice(s) and its underlying fund(s), and have sufficient net worth to be able to assume the risks and bear the potential losses of trading in relation to the investment choices selected. 閣下在選擇投資選項前，請閣下必須了解該投資選項及相關基金的性質及風險，並需要持有足夠的淨資產承擔與所選投資選項有關的相關風險並承擔有關的潛在損失；否則，閣下不應 選擇該投資選項。 (11) You may be exposed to the additional associated risks if the selected mix of underlying investment choices you intend to allocate through top-up premiums or switch in, after policy inception, is inconsistent with your risk profile and knowledge (including investment knowledge in derivatives). 如果閣下打算在保單生效後，就增額保費所選擇分配的相關投資選項組合或轉入的相關投資選項組合，與閣下的風險承擔能力及知識（包括對衍生產品的相關投資知識）不相符，則閣下 可能需承受額外相關風險。 (12) You may be exposed to additional associated risks if you are investing in investment choice(s) of which underlying fund(s) is/are classified as derivative fund(s). The volatility of these underlying fund(s) may increase or decrease from their derivative usage, and may suffer losses. Please refer to the offering documents of the respective underlying fund(s) for details. 如閣下所選的投資選項連繫至的相關基金被歸類為衍生產品基金，閣下或因而可能需承受額外相關風險。此等相關基金的波幅或因衍生產品的使用而上升或下降，或因而出現虧損。詳 情請參閱各相關基金的銷售文件。 (13) Please contact your advisor or visit our Customer Website at www.manulife.com.hk for ascertain the latest available investment choices. 請聯絡閣下的顧問或瀏覽宏利網站 (www.manulife.com.hk) 查閱最新可供選擇的投資選項。 (14) You are advised to complete the Risk Profile Questionnaire to assess your risk profile before investing. If there are any material changes to the information in the questionnaire provided previously and / or the questionnaire provided was submitted over 12 months, please complete the Risk Profile Questionnaire to assess your risk profile again. Please visit our website or contact your licensed insurance intermediary for details of the risk level of the respective investment choice. 我們建議閣下於投資前填寫「風險承擔能力問卷」以評估閣下之風險承受程度。如閣下於較早前遞交的「風險承擔能力問卷」內所提供的資料有重大變更及/或閣下所提供的問卷已超過12 個月，我們建議閣下重新填寫該問卷以評估閣下之風險承受程度。有關各相關投資選項的風險級別詳情，請瀏覽本公司網頁或聯絡閣下的持牌保險中介人。 (15) Please read the Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance ("Notice") before you complete this form. Manulife (International) Limited ҃лɛྪ‫ڭ‬ᎈ਷ყϞࠢʮ̡ U64 (11/2025) Page 1 of 2 Preparing for Insurance Tele-Medical Examination A. Booking Tele-Medical Examination Service • Advisor calls medical centre at 2572-2121 or 2192-7022 to book appointment. Upon verbal confirmation of appointment date and time, please fill in the details in Tele-Medical Exam Requisition Form and send together with Underwriting Progress Report (UPR) to medical centre by fax/email. • Medical centre’s staff will send the appointment confirmation to Proposed Insured’s email address through medical centre mailbox (reception.tst@trinitymedical.com.hk) in 1 working day with below information: – Manulife bear the cost: The Zoom link with password – At Insured’s own cost: Medical centre will provide the online payment method and instructions. Once payment has been made, Zoom link with password will be sent in 1 working day • Tele-Medical Examination will be conducted on Zoom. • In case of cancellation/rescheduling, please inform the medical centre at least 1 working day prior to the confirmed appointment. • No refund will be arranged if Proposed Insured is absent for Tele-Medical Examination. B. During the Tele-Medical Examination • Proposed Insured is recommended to sit in 5 minutes before the appointment to set up the Zoom call. • Proposed Insured and Policyowner (if Proposed Insured is below age of 18) will be asked to present the original of identity documents (identity card/passport with photo page/birth certificate) during the video call for verification. • Medical centre’s staff will send the completed Tele-Medical Examination Form (P.1 – P.2) to Proposed Insured/Policyowner for signature by email, Advisor has to collect the signed form to Manulife. C. Points to note • All Tele-Medical Examination must be conducted in Hong Kong, it means that Insured must stay in Hong Kong Territory. • No video recording is allowed. • Proposed Insured is reminded to use a stable internet connection for making Zoom call. • Policyowner is reminded to attend with Proposed Insured if he/she is below the age of 18. • Advisor is not allowed to join the call. US Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act Are you a United States person, being a U.S. citizen, U.S. resident for U.S. federal income tax purposes or U.S. Resident Alien (i.e. a so-called U.S. Green Card holder)? Yes 是 (Please provide your consent to report and U.S. TIN. by submitting the prescribed form/substitute Form W-9 as requested by Manulife. Please also complete your U.S. jurisdiction of tax residency and TIN in Part 2. No Important Notes - You must answer “Yes” if you are a U.S. citizen even though you reside outside of the U.S. - You must answer “Yes” if you hold multiple citizenships, one of which is U.S. citizenship. - You must answer “Yes” if you were born in the U.S. (or U.S. Territory) and have not legally surrendered U.S. citizenship. - You may be considered a U.S. resident for U.S. federal income tax purposes (and therefore, must answer “Yes”) if you meet the “Substantial Physical Presence Test”. You will meet this test if, for instance, during the current year, you were present in the U.S. for at least 183 days under a specified formula. For more details, please refer to the information on the IRS’ websi te http://www.irs.gov/Individuals/International-Taxpayers/Substantial-Presence-Test. - You must answer “Yes” if the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Service (USCIS) has issued you a U.S. alien registration card as a lawful permanent resident of the United States. - You must answer “Yes” irrespective of your Green Card’s expiration date and irrespective of whether such expiration date has passed as of the date you sign and complete this form. - You should answer “No” if your Green Card has been officially abandoned, revoked, or relinquished as of the date you sign and complete this form and you are not a US citizen or a U.S. resident for U.S. federal income tax purposes for any other reason. - The above certification is mandatory for enrolment on or after July 1, 2014. （http://www.irs.gov/Individuals/International-Taxpayers/Substantial-Presence-Test）。 Highly Confidential Agent Name 代理人姓名: 2. s: Personal Assistant (PA) Registration Application Form Important Note: 1. Please submit : (i) duly completed and signed PA Registration Application Form and the attached 2 copies of “Non-Disclosure Agreement”, (ii) a photocopy of the PA’s Hong Kong Identity Card (HKID) and (iii) 2 recent color passport-sized photos (L: 2.9 cm, W: 2.5 cm) to Agency Support at MT22. 2. □ Please tick the appropriate box. 3. # Please delete as appropriate. Part A: Type of PA Registration Application □ New Registration Application for Personal Assistant. □ New Registration Application for District Secretary, only 1 District Secretary is allowed for each District □ Application for Changing/Removing Hiring Agent(s): Existing PA Code: ______________________ Photo 1 L: 2.9 cm W: 2.5 cm Photo 2 L: 2.9 cm W: 2.5 cm Part B: PA Information Name in English: Name in Chinese: HKID Card No.: Gender#: (same as HKID Card) (same as HKID Card) Other Name: MT / MFC / MP / LMC ( Office Location#: GW Tower ( ),Suite ( () Contact No.: Male / Female )/F ) (Mobile) Part C: Hiring Agent(s) Information (Maximum 4 Hiring Agents) NamePrimary*: Mobile: Agent Code: Name2nd: Mobile: Agent Code: Name3rd: Mobile: Agent Code: Name4th: Mobile: Agent Code: District Code: District Code: District Code: District Code: * Each primary hiring agent will be granted one PA Manutouch account for their PA. Regardless of the number of PAs an agent hired, only one PA will be granted access to the PA Manutouch account. Additionally, the PA will only have access rights to the PA Manutouch account associated with their primary hiring agent. Therefore, even if a PA is hired by multiple agents, they can only access the PA Manutouch account of their primary hiring agent. Terms and Conditions: 1. The PA Card and Access Card should not be borrowed / used by anyone other than the PA or the agent(s) who employ(s) or appoint(s) the PA (the “Hiring Agent(s)”) 2. This Application should be countersigned by District Director or above. 3. If the PA is employed or appointed by more than one Hiring Agent (maximum 4 Hiring Agents) at the same time, unless provided otherwise, the liabilities of the Hiring Agents to Manulife (International) Limited (“Manulife”) under these Terms and Conditions shall be joint and several. 4. One agent can hire maximum 4 PAs. 5. Only one PA is allowed as District Secretary in a District. 6. The PA must carry his/her PA Card and Access Card at all times within the office premises of Manulife for identification purpose. 7. A handling fee of HK$200 shall be charged to the Primary Hiring Agent for re-issuing a replacement PA Card and a handling fee of HK$100 shall be charged to the Primary Hiring Agent for re-issuing a replacement Access Card. For termination of the employment or appointment of the PA or resignation of the PA, the Primary Hiring Agent shall notify Manulife by submitting PA Deregistration Form no less than 7 working days before the PA’s last working day. The Primary Hiring Agent shall return the PA Card and Access Card to Manulife on or before the PA’s last working day. Failure to return or delay in returning the PA Card and Access Card shall lead to a HK$200 penalty fee for the PA Card and a HK$100 penalty fee for the Access Card payable by the Primary Hiring Agent immediately. 8. Both the PA and the Hiring Agent(s) shall be liable for all improper usages of the PA Card, Access Card and if applicable the PA Manutouch Account granted by Manulife. The PA and the Hiring Agent(s) shall indemnify Manulife for all demands, claims, loss, damages and expenses arising out of any improper and/or illegal use of the PA Card, Access Card and PA Manutouch Account. The liability of the PA and the Hiring Agent(s) is joint and several. 9. The provision of the information required in this form is a condition for the issuance of the PA Card and Access Card. The Hiring agent(s) must ensure that they have complied with all the necessary requirements under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance in obtaining and/or transferring the PA’s personal data to Manulife. The PA and the Hiring Agent(s) hereby declare that they have verified the correctness of the PA’s personal data. 10. PA Training Guide: 10.1 The Primary Hiring Agent must download the PA Training Guide from Manutouch (Resources > Document library > Agency Support > Personal Assistant > PA Training Guide (Compliance Section)) and provide a copy of such to PA for his/her perusal upon commencement of the PA’s employment. 10.2 The Primary Hiring Agent must read and understand the PA Training Guide and has properly explained to the PA his/her role and Page 1 of 6 AS03 (01/2026) responsibilities. 10.3 The PA is required to sign and acknowledge his/her receipt and understanding of the PA Training Guide prior to the issuance of the PA Card and Access Card by Manulife. 10.4 The PA is required to complete the Annual Compliance Refreshment Training for PA every year in accordance with the Company’s schedule. 10.5 PA who failed to fulfill the above compliance training requirements will be subject to de-registration. 11. The Hiring Agent(s) undertake all responsibilities in managing and supervising the PA in proper/confidential handling of personal data, including but not limited to that of Manulife’s clients (including potential and past clients), Manulife’s employees, Manulife’s agents and other PAs, prevention of Company and personal data information leakage, his/her proper conduct and behavior when the PA performs assigned duties upon the instructions of his/her Hiring Agent(s). 12. Manulife shall terminate the PA’s registration and access to Manulife’s systems without explanation and notice as a result of any misconduct, and/or non-compliance in the opinion of Manulife by the PA or violation of applicable laws and regulations by the PA or the PA takes part in any conduct, which in the opinion of Manulife, is detrimental or injurious or prejudicial to Manulife’s interests or reputation carried out during

t: CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - APLASTIC ANAEMIA 重病保障索償表格 － 再生障礙性貧血 Policy No. 保單
s: CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - APLASTIC ANAEMIA 重病保障索償表格 － 再生障礙性貧血 Policy No. 保單編號： PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense 第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫 1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份證號碼 3. Age 年齡 4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？ No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。 Period of Consultation Past Health History 應診期間 病人過往健康情況 5. a) Date on which the patient first consulted you related to the condition (Aplastic Anaemia). 病人就是項疾病（再生障礙性貧血）首次向閣下求診的 日期（DD日/ MM月/YY年）。 b) What were the symptoms? 病人之病徵？ c) How long had the patient been experiencing these symptoms before the first consultation? 病人在首次求診前已患有此病徵多久？ d) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果?（請填寫準確日期） 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。 7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？ No 否 Yes 有 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。 Name of Attended Physician(s) Date of Consultation Address(es) Exact Diagnosis 應診醫生姓名 診治日期 地址 確實診斷資料 8. Is there anything in the patient’s family history which would have increased the risk of the disease specified above? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上上述疾病機 會之事項？ 9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 10. Please describe the severity of the patient’s bone marrow failure and advise if it resulted in anaemia, neutropenia and thrombocytopenia of this patient? 請詳述病 人骨髓機能衰竭的嚴重程度及有否引致貧血、中性白血球減少或血小板減少。 11a. What was the underlying cause(s) leading to aplastic anaemia of this patient? Please advise the cause(s) in details. 什麼原因引致病人的障礙性貧血? 請詳述原因。 11b. What is/are the reading of the followings: 請提供下列各項的讀數： i) Haemoglobin levels 血色素 ii) Red blood cell counts 紅血球細胞指數 iii) White blood cell counts 白血球細胞指數 iv) Platelet counts 血小板 Please provide a copy of the diagnostic test results for our reference, if any. 請提供有關診斷檢驗報告副本。 11c. Which of the following treatments is/are provided to the patient? Please describe the extent of the treatment given. 病人是否需要接受以下治療? 請述治療詳情。 i) Blood product transfusion 輸入血液產品 ii) Marrow stimulating agents 骨髓刺激劑 iii) Imunosuppressive agents 免疫抑制劑 iv) Bone marrow transplantation 骨髓移植 11d. What tests were performed to confirm the diagnosis? (Please enclose copies of all laboratory reports and relevant medical reports that are available) 有什麼檢驗結果 讓閣下能確定此診斷?（請提供有關檢驗報告及醫療報告副本） Test Date (DD/MM/YY) Test Item Result / Diagnosis 檢驗日期(日/月/年) 檢驗項目 結果/診斷 11e. Was the diagnosis confirmed by a haematologist? 診斷是否血液專科醫生確認？ Yes 是 No 否 Please give the Name and Address of the haematologist if it is not the undersigned. 若非由填寫此表格之醫生確認，請提供血液專科醫生之姓名及地址。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C33 (11/2025) 1 of 2 Policy No. 保單編號： 12. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。 (We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available ) （敬請提供任何有關醫療報告副本） Name of Physician(s) and/or Hospital(s) Address(es) Date of Consultation(s) and/or Period of Confinement(s) 醫生姓名及／或醫院名稱 地址 診治及／或留院日期 13. If there is any further information which, in your opinion, will assist us in assessing this claim, please furnish such information below. 閣下認為有否其他資料可協助本公司審核是項索償申請？請提供有關資料。 5 Signature 簽署 Date 日期 Qualification 資格 Name of Physician (with stamp) 醫生姓名（連印章） Address 地址 Tel. No. 電話號碼 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C33 (11/2025) 2 of 2

Is there anything in the patient’s family history which would have increased the risk of the disease specified above? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上上述疾病機 會之事項？ 9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 10. Details of treatment rendered. 治療詳情： i. Has the patient undergone any surgery due to head injury? 病人有否就頭部創傷接受任何手術？ If yes, the type of surgery performed? 如有，進行了何種手術？ (a) Burr Hole Surgery to the head 於頭部鑽孔手術 Yes 是 No 否 If yes, please state the purpose of the surgery. 如是, 請列明進行鑽孔手術的目的？ Yes 是 No 沒有 (b) Others, please specify. 其他, 請註明手術名稱。 Date of the surgery 手術日期：( / / ) DD/MM/YY 日/月/年 The hospital where the surgery was performed 手術醫院： Name of Surgeon 手術醫生： Was the surgery certified to be medically necessary by a neurologist? 否手術是否由腦神經專科醫生證實為醫療所需？ Yes 是 No 否 Please give the Name and Address of the neurologist if it is not the undersigned. 若非由填寫此表格之醫生確認，請提供腦神經專科醫生之姓名及地址。 ii. If no surgery was done, please state what other treatment has been rendered for the insured. 如沒有進行手術, 請列出受保人曾接受的其他 治療項目。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C45 (11/2025) 1 of 2 Policy No. 保單編號： 11. Such authorization shall survive me and shall be irrevocable. A photocopy of this authorization shall be valid as the original. 本人確認，同意並授權宏利進行任何調查或檢查，並有權從任何醫生、醫學界執業人士、醫院、診所或其他與醫療有關的機構、保險公司或其 他組織、機關或人士 （「第三方」），將其所有關本人及受保家屬的記錄或健康狀況資料，提供予宏利 並且本人在此同意並授權第三方提供 任何上述的資料予宏利。 此授權書是不可撤銷的，即使本人去世，此授權仍然生效。此授權書的影印本將與正本同樣有效。 I acknowledge that my completion of this declaration shall not in any way determine the liability of Manulife in any relevant claims settlement. Manulife has reserved all rights to reverse / claw back any payment made or to be made if a claim was or will be paid by any other ins urance companies. I also understand that the provision of any false declaration may entail criminal liability. 本人確認，本人作出以上聲明並不代表宏利必須就任何有關索償負上理賠責任。倘若其他保險公司曾經或將會就上述理賠個案作出賠償，而宏 利保留所有權利要求受保人退回任何已賠償或將會賠償之金額。本人理解，作出任何虛假聲明可能會涉及刑事責任。 I shall indemnify and keep Manulife indemnified against all liabilities, costs, expenses, damages and losses suffered or incurred by Manulife arising out of or in connection with any false, incorrect or inaccurate statements made in this declaration. 本人將會並一直會就因爲本聲明中任何虛假、不正確或不準確的陳述而產生或與之有關之宏利所遭受或蒙受之所有法律責任、費用、開支、損 害和損失對宏利作出彌償。 Signature of Policyowner / Insured 保單持有人 / 受保人簽署 Sign Date (dd/mm/yyyy) 簽署日期(日 / 月 / 年) Individual Financial Products Manulife (International) Limited 22/F., Manulife Financial Centre, 223-231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong. s: < CORP FNA_CHI (05/2026) > 保單編號 （公司專用） 請以正楷填寫，並在適當的地方加上 ✓。 財務需要分析表格（適用於商業客戶） 重要說明 此財務需要分析為確定申請人的理財需要和目標。此分析是基於由申請人（保單持有人）提供的資料而進行。如有未披露任何重要事實或資 料，可能會影響申請人的需要評估。請定期評估申請人的財務需要。如對申請人的財務需要有任何問題，請諮詢申請人的理財顧問之意見。宏 利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（簡稱「宏利」）不保證所提供的結果的資料準確性和可靠性。 請申請人填寫此表格前，細閱《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」）。該通知可於宏利網址 (www.manulife.com.hk) 或向申請人的 宏利顧問索取。透過填妥及交回此表格，即表示申請人同意該通知之內容。本財務需要分析表格旨在協助尋找適合的保險產品，以滿足申請人 就每次投保申請的需要及情況。如申請人計劃提交多於一份投保申請，請就另一份申請填寫另一份財務需要分析表格以作更全面的分析。請回 答本表格所述的所有問題。請勿於未完成回答本表格的所有問題或於任何問題被刪除的情況下簽署本表格。請勿在空白的表格上簽署。如在本 表格中提供的資料有任何重大變更，請告知宏利。如果申請人不按照規則填寫此表格，我們可能無法處理申請人的申請甚或拒絕申請人的申 請。 第一部分 — 申請人資料 公司名稱： 第二部份 — 財務目標及需要分析 1.1 申請人選購保險產品的目標為？（就下列目標 A – F 申請人可選多於一項） 註：就保單簽發後的更改（例如萬用壽險額外供款或傳統產品之保險金額改變）而言，基於其目標為加強現有保障，因此將一併考慮額外 供款 / 保險金額改變及現有計劃的整體金額。 A) 為應付不時之需提供財務保障（例如：身故、意外、殘疾等） A1 如申請人需要為未來準備人壽（身故）保障，考慮到現已持有的保單後，此次投保的淨人壽（身故）保障需要約為 港幣 。 B) 為未來提供定期的收入（例如：退休收入等） C) 為未來需要作儲蓄（例如：子女教育，退休等） C1 就此次投保，申請人期望達至約港幣 蓄目標。 的儲 C2 為達至上述的儲蓄目標，申請人的目標儲蓄期為多久？（請只選一項） a) 1-5 年 b) 6-10 年 c) 11-15 年 d) 16-20 年 e) > 20 年 f) 終身 D) 投資 D1 為實現上述「投資」的目標，您希望如何管理保險產品下的不同投資選項（如有）？（請只選一項） i. 本人願意按個人決定（毋須獲授權保險人及 / 或持牌保險中介人提供任何專業意見的情況）選擇及管理保險產品項下的 不同投資選項（如有），並且願意在保險產品的目標利益 / 保障期的整個期間作出此決定。 ii. 本人願意按個人決定（經獲授權保險人及 / 或持牌保險中介人提供專業意見的情況）選擇及管理保險產品項下的不同投 資選項（如有），並且願意在保險產品的目標利益 / 保障期的整個期間作出此決定。 iii. 本人不願意選擇或管理保險產品項下的不同投資選項（如有）。 E) 為應付醫療保健需要（例如：危疾，住院等） E1 如申請人需要為未來準備危疾保障，考慮到現已持有的保單後，就此次投保，申請人的淨危疾保障需要約為 港幣 。 F) 其他（若有別於上述各項，請詳述： ） 請勿撕去 *OBJTFNA* *FNAVP* Manulife (International) Limited 互惠基金、外匯、債券、商品（例如黃金）、分紅保險產品、投資相連保險產品、其他投資等。） 是，我有意考慮具非保證回報的保險產品及我具有相關知識及 / 或經驗。 否，我無意考慮具非保證回報的保險產品； 或我有意考慮此類保險產品，但沒有相關知識及經驗。 如果「是」，請填寫以下問題 1.2.1 如果「否」，請轉至問題 2 1.2.1 （如問題 1.2 的答案為是）您是否接受在保險產品的有關 / 相關投資中，非固定收入資產組成比例可能超過 50% ？（注意：非固定收 入資產通常預期比固定收入資產波動性更高。） 是 否 2. 申請人投購保單的目標利益 / 保障年期為多久？（請只選一項）（如在問題 1 只選擇了選項 C，可跳過此問題） a) 1-5 年 b) 6-10 年 c) 11-15 年 d) 16-20 年 e) > 20 年 f) 終身 第三部份 — 財務負擔能力及評估 3. 申請人繳付保費的能力及意願： 可動用收入 3.1 在過去兩年內，申請人的每月平均淨利潤不少於 港幣 。 註：每月平均淨利潤 = 計入所有收入來源（包括流動資產的收入）之每月平均收入 — 每月平均開支（包括所有財務支出及持有的 所有保單之保費） 請勿撕去 < CORP FNA_CHI (05/2026) > 3.2.1 就申請人於宏利此次的投保（包括申請人正在投保的所有宏利保單），在整個保單期內，申請人能夠及願意以 % （百分比）的每月淨利潤繳付保費。 3.2.2 請註明申請人的資金來源（可選多於一項）： a) 業務收入 b) 其他（請註明： ） 流動資產（如申請人不願意以流動資產繳付保費，可跳過此部分） 3.3 在扣除用作從申請人的流動資產中支付營運費用（如有）所需的備用資金後，申請人現時累積的流動資產約不少於 注意：以下申請人提供的所有資料將用作評估申請人的財務負擔能力（不論建議及最終選購的保險產品是否可使用保費融資，以及是否使 用保費融資） 3.5 如果建議及最終選購的保險產品可使用保費融資，申請人是否打算使用保費融資作為申請人正在投保的保單 1 全部或部分保費的支付 方式？ 是 否 如果「是」，請填寫以下問題 如果「否」，請轉至問題 4 的列表第一欄下就各介紹產品所填寫的選購目標。 於推介任何投資相連保險計劃前請完成填寫風險承擔能力問卷。 （由保險顧問填寫）保險顧問建議原因（可選多於一項）： 本人（保險顧問）確認上述產品建議表中所顯示的保險產品建議是基於本人對申請人需求和情況的評估（根據申請人在本次財務需求分析中 提供的資料）作出， 並考慮了相關因素， 包括申請人的年齡、 任何現有的有效保單記錄及以下所指明的原因（如有）。 1) 附加保障的保障年期與目標年期不同，因申請人已考慮了其理財目標、全面保障的需要、各需要的優先重要性及財務預算而作 出，申請人期望以上各方面取得平衡。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 CORP FNA_CHI (05/2026) 第3頁/共4頁 *OBJTFNA* *FNAVP* 保單編號 （公司專用） 2) 此建議保障額低於申請人的全面保障需要，因為申請人有其他更優先之財務目標。 3) 此建議的儲蓄金額低於申請人的儲存目標，因為申請人有其他更優先之財務目標。 4) 申請人明白投資相連壽險保單 (ILAS) 的身故賠償金額取決於申請人所選擇的投資選項之相關基金表現以及相關的收費，因此可 能與申請人的目標身故保障額有所不同甚或遠低於其目標保障額。基於申請人優先考慮投資偏好，即使人壽保障額與目標保障 額不同仍決定作出此申請。 5) 保險顧問已向申請人解釋而且申請人明白所建議的分紅產品為滿足申請人的投資目標之投資相連壽險 (ILAS) 產品以外的另一選 擇，而該分紅產品的保費支付期較申請人所選擇的目標保費支付期長。保險顧問已披露當中的分別，並解釋由於宏利現時沒有 任何分紅產品能同時滿足申請人的投資偏好以及目標保費支付期，此分紅產品已為最接近的另一選擇。申請人明白該等分別， 並考慮到申請人自身需要及情況而決定作出此申請。 6) 由於申請人表示若所建議及選購之保險產品可使用保費融資，申請人有意使用保費融資作為是次擬購買保單的資金，顧問已向 申請人展示《重要資料聲明書 - 保費融資》及詳盡解釋了《重要資料聲明書 - 保費融資》內所包含的重要說明及影響，包括對申請人 的影響及相關風險。申請人亦確認了解他 / 她對償還貸款及任何相關利息的義務並同意他 / 她如繼續保費融資申請時應預留資金 以償還該等款項。 7) 保險顧問已向申請人解釋而且申請人明白所介紹的投資相連壽險 (ILAS) 產品在受保人年滿 65 歲的保單年度之後，將不再提供高 額人壽保障（即身故賠償最少為應繳總定期保費的 150%），而應付身故賠償金額可能會大幅減少。然而，即使 (i) 高額人壽保障並 非在整個保單年期內提供，而是只在受保人年滿 65 歲的保單年度或之前提供，及 (ii) 此投資相連壽險 (ILAS) 產品所提供的高額 人壽保障的實際年期可能未達到申請人就高額人壽保障的目標保障年期，但申請人仍因考慮到他 / 她自身需要及情況而決定作出 此申請。 8) 其他（請詳述）： 請勿撕去 < CORP FNA_CHI (05/2026) > 警告： 請小心細閱及填寫本財務需要分析表格。請不要留空任何問題。如有任何未回答的問題未被刪去，請不要在表格上簽署。 申請人確認有關商討乃以申請人熟悉的語言進行，並無任何人士不當地影響申請人作出投保的決定。 申請人確認申請人已收到並細閱《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」）。申請人清楚明白及同意該「通知」之內容。 申請人確認上述產品建議是根據申請人在本財務需求分析所提供的資料及申請人確認已獲得並詳細解釋該建議產品的資料。 申請人完全明白申請人必須持續繳付保費才能享有持續保障。若申請人不繳付到期的保費，申請人將失去保障。申請人明白，適用於部分保險 產品並受限於保單的條款，在保費繳付期內，保費率可能隨受保人年齡改變及 / 或宏利可能有權不時調整保費率，而調整後的保費率可能超出 申請人於本表格的第三部分中所提供有關申請人繳付保費的能力及意願的資料並且申請人可能因此無法負擔。在此情況下，如果申請人未能支 Print Reset Save PRE-AUTHORIZATION FOR CREDIT SERVICE FOR HOSPITALIZATION FORM 代缴住院费用服务初步授权申请表格 ManuMaster Healthcare Series/Bene t, ManuShine Healthcare Series/Bene t, Manulife Supreme VHIS Flexi Plan and Manulife Supreme Lite VHIS Supplementary Bene t (“Eligible Products”) 晋领医疗保障系列／附加保障、活亮人生医疗保障系列／附加保障、宏利晋悦自愿医保灵活计划及宏利晋逸自愿医保附加保障（「合资格产品」） We understand that hospitalization and inpatient treatments often come with the burden of unexpected medical expenses. The Credit Service for Hospitalization is designed exclusively for Eligible Products’ customers, and you can submit pre-authorization request prior to admission. Once approved, we will pay the approved credit amount of eligible hospitalization and surgical expenses on your behalf. Let us take care of the bills for you so you can focus on treatment. 我们深明住院及住院治疗往往会带来突如其来的财政压力。代缴住院费用服务专为「合资格产品」客户而设，您可于入院前提交初步授权申请，一经批核，我们 将代表您支付批核之合资格住院及手术费用代缴费用金额。让我们为您处理账单，以便您专注接受治疗，回复健康。 6 simple steps to request for pre-authorization for credit service for hospitalization 6 个简单步骤即可就代缴住院费用服务作初步授权申请 Complete the form (Page 2-3 by attending physician/surgeon, Page 4 by policy holder/insured person). 填妥表格（第2-3页由主诊医生填写，第4页由保单持有人／受保人填写）。 – Be sure to have the attending physician/surgeon provide the medical information in the form, at the policy holder’s/insured person’s expense (if any). 请确保由主诊医生或外科医生于申请表提供医疗详情，并由保单持有人／受保人自行承担填写表格费用（如有）。 Submit the completed form and any diagnostic report(s) and other related clinical information to Manulife website or mobile app - Claims & Services at least 5 working days before admission to hospital. 于入院前不少于五个工作天将填妥的表格、诊断报告及其他相关临床资料经 宏利网站或应用程式 - 索偿及服务 提交。 – This form is only applicable for Manulife website or mobile app submission. If you would like to submit by other channels, please contact your Manulife advisor/customer service hotline (852) 2510 3941 for assistance. 此表格仅适用以宏利网站或应用程式提交申请。如欲于其他渠道提交申请，请联络您的宏利顾问或致电客户 服务热线(852) 2510 3941寻求协助。 Upon approval, we will send you a Letter of Conﬁrmation and inform the hospital concerned of the approved credit amount.** 一经批核，我们将向您发出「批核确认书」，并将批核之代缴费用金额通知医院。** Upon admission, please present hospital with insured person’s identiﬁcation document for veriﬁcation. 入院时，请向医院出示受保人的身份证明文件以作核实。 At discharge, please settle any deductible** and/or net balance that exceeds the approved credit amount, then submit a completed “Medical Insurance - Hospitalization and Surgical Claim Form” (C13_S) to us in accordance to our “Individual Insurance claims procedures”. When we receive the invoice from the hospital and complete the claims assessment, if there is any shortfall amount, we will send you a written notiﬁcation requesting payment of the shortfall. 出院时，请缴付任何自付额**及／或超出批核之代缴费用金额的费用，及依照「个人保险索偿程序」交回已填妥 的「医疗保险-住院及手术赔偿表」（C13_S）给我们。当我们接获医院账单及完成索偿评估后，若有任何差额，我 们会向您发出书面通知要求缴付有关差额。 If the Credit Service for Hospitalization is used, reimbursements for the relevant medical expenses will be applied to the Eligible Products ﬁrst, then to any other medical plans covering the insured person during the claims assessment. 如使用代缴住院费用服务，在理赔评估过程中，宏利将先从「合资格产品」赔偿相关医疗费用，然后才透过受保 人的其他医疗计划作出赔偿。 ** For the application of credit services for hospitalization at public hospitals in Chinese Mainland, please refer to the terms and conditions as set out in the Appendix to this Form. 在中国内地公立医院申请代缴住院费用服务时，请参阅本表格附录所载的条款及细则。 If you have any questions, please contact your Manulife insurance advisor. 如有任何疑问，请联络您的宏利顾问。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人寿保险（国际）有限公司 C_PA01_S (06/2026) 1 of 5 Details of Treatment and Estimated Expense 治疗详情及预算费用表格 (To be completed by the Insured Person’s attending Physician/Surgeon at the Policy holder's/Insured person’s expenses if any) (由受保人之主诊医生或外科医生填写，如有需要保单持有人或受保人需自行承担填写表格费用) Patient’s Information & Hospitalization Details 病人及入院资料 Name of Patient 病人姓名： HKID of Patient 病人香港身份证： Sex 性別： Male 男 Hospital name 医院名称： Room Class 住房级别**： Day Ward 日间病房 Female 女 Ward 普通病房 Semi-private 半私家房 Private 私家房 ICU 深切治疗 days日, Date日期 Isolation room 隔离病房 days日, Date日期 Other 其他 Room Price (per day) 住房价格（每日）： Planned Date of Admission (DD/MM/YYYY) 预计入院日期（日／月／年）： Planned Number of days of Conﬁnement 预计住院日数： Medical Condition 医疗详情 1. If you are unsure of whether a particular accommodation option meets the relevant ward class deﬁnitions under these policy/beneﬁt provisions, please contact Manulife before conﬁnement. 医院提供不同设备的病房选项，而医院就病房的分类可能与于相关保单／保障条款下病房之释义有所不同。若你对个别病房选项是否符合于该等保单／保障条款就相关病房 级别的释义存疑，请在住院前向宏利查询。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人寿保险（国际）有限公司 C_PA01_S (06/2026) 2 of 5 11. t: For GLH Policy Use Only 團體人壽及醫療保險保單適用 Let’s Work Together on Anti-Money Launderi
s: For GLH Policy Use Only 團體人壽及醫療保險保單適用 Let’s Work Together on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing 攜手打擊洗錢及 恐怖分子資金籌集活動 As one of the major ﬁnancial centres in the world, it is very important for Hong Kong to maintain an eﬀective anti-money laundering (AML) and counter-terrorist ﬁnancing (CTF) regime for the integrity and stability of our ﬁnancial system. Hong Kong is committed to ﬁghting against money laundering and terrorist ﬁnancing activities and has introduced the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (AMLO), which came into eﬀect on April 1, 2012 and the latest amendment e ective on September 1, 2019. The Insurance Authority has issued Guideline on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Guideline) and Manulife (International) Limited (“Manulife”), as an authorized long term insurer, is required to comply with the AMLO and the Guideline. As required by the AMLO and the Guideline, we need to identify and verify our customers as part of our due diligence process. In this respect, we seek your kind cooperation in providing the following documents/information for fulﬁlling such regulatory requirements. 香港作為國際主要的金融中心之一，以確保本港的金融體制維持穩定健全，維護有效措施以打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌 集活動是最為重要的。香港一直致力打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集活動，並於二○一二年四月一日實施〈打擊洗錢及恐 怖分子資金籌集條例〉法例，而最新修訂條例亦於二○一九年九月一日生效。 保險業監管局已發出打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集指引。而宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（「宏利」）作為獲授權經營 長期業務的保險公司，亦須遵守有關法例及指引。 因應有關條例及指引，宏利須採用盡職審查措施以確認及核實客戶的身份。因此，客戶須根據法例規定提供以下所需之 文件及資料以符合相關法例要求。敬希合作。 Issued by Manulife (International) Limited. 由 宏 利 人 壽 保 險（ 國 際 ）有 限 公 司 刊 發。 Illustration of the requirements on Customer Due Diligence assessment for di erent company types 各公司類別就客戶盡職審查的要求說明 This checklist summarizes most of the required documents / information for due diligence and does not mean that it is exhaustive. Manulife may request additional documents / information under diﬀerent situations. 此文件清單列表只綜合大部分盡職審查之所需文件／資料要求， 但並非盡錄所有要求。宏利會因應不同情況要求客戶提供額外的補充文件／資料。 Important Notes 重要事項： a) The documents / information submitted should be valid as of the time of submission (if applicable). 所提供的文件／資料於遞交當時必須為有效（如適用）。 b) For documents that are not in English or Chinese, translation provided by a professional third party is required. 如所提供的文件並非以英文或中文刊載，請提供由專業第三者翻譯之譯本。 Documents / Information required 所需文件／資料 Application Form 申請表 Company Type 公司類別 Non - Listed Company 非上市公司 Incorporated in Hong Kong 於香港成立 Incorporated Overseas 於海外成立 Sole Proprietorships 獨資公司 Partnership 合夥公司 Listed Company/Financial Institutions 上市公司／金融機構 Incorporated in Hong Kong 於香港成立 Incorporated Overseas 於海外成立 Unincorporated Bodies (e.g. association or societies) 非法人團體 （如：會社及社團） Authorized Person 獲授權人士 (i) Board resolution to prove that the signatory(ies) is/are authorized to operate the group insurance policy; t: Entity Tax Residency Self Certification Form (FATCA and CRS) 公司納稅居住地⾃⾏證明書 （FATCA
s: Entity Tax Residency Self Certification Form (FATCA and CRS) 公司納稅居住地⾃⾏證明書 （FATCA 及 CRS） Please read these instructions before completing the form. 填寫自行證明書前，請先參閱下列指引。 Regulations based on Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (“FATCA”) and Organisation for Economic Co‐ operation and Development (“OECD”) Common Reporting Standard (“CRS”) require financial institutions to collect and report certain required information based on an account holder’s tax residence. Each jurisdiction has its own rules for defining tax residence. In general, for entities tax residence is defined as the jurisdiction where the entity has its place of management. Special circumstances may cause the entity to be resident elsewhere or resident in more than one jurisdiction at the same time (multiple residencies). For more information on tax residence, please consult your tax adviser or the information at the following link for FATCA and CRS at https://www.irs.gov/ and http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic‐exchange/crs‐implementation‐and‐ assistance/ respectively. 根據採用外國帳戶稅務遵從法（「FATCA」）及經濟合作與發展組織（OECD「經 合組織」）共同申報準則（Common Reporting Standard／CRS）的法規，要求金融機構按照帳戶持有人 的納稅居住地收集及匯報若干所需資料。每個司法管轄區均按其本身的規則釐定納稅居住地的定義。一 般來說，公司納稅居住地定義為公司管理業務地的司法管轄區。若干特別情況可能會導致公司成為其他 地方的居民，或同時成為超過一個國家的居民（多重居住地）。有關納稅居住地的詳情，請諮詢您的稅 務 顧 問 ， 或 分 別 瀏 覽 下 列 有 關 FATCA 及 CRS 網 頁 的 資 料 : https://www.irs.gov/ 及 http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic‐exchange/crs‐implementation‐and‐assistance/ If the tax residence of the account holder is located outside of the country in which this account is maintained, we may be legally obliged to pass on the information in this form and other financial information with respect to your financial accounts to the tax authorities in the country where the financial institution is located. 若帳 戶持有人的納稅居住地位處的國家與開設本帳戶的國家不同，我們在法律上可能有責任把此自行證明書 內的資料及與您的財務帳戶有關的其他財務資料，轉交金融機構位處國家的稅務機關。 This form will remain valid unless there is a change in circumstances relating to the account holder’s tax status, (e.g. a change in the ownership structure of the entity adding controlling person) or other mandatory fields included on this form. You must notify us within 30 days if there is a change in circumstance that makes any of the information provided in this form incorrect or incomplete and provide an updated self‐certification form. 此自行證明書將一直有效，直至出現與帳戶持有人的稅務狀況（例如加入控權人士改變擁有權結構）或 此自行證明書內必須填寫的其他欄目資料有關的情況變動為止。若出現任何可導致自行證明書所提供的 資料失實或不完整的情況變動，您必須於 30 日內通知我們，並提交最新的自行證明書。 This form is intended to request information only where such request is not prohibited by applicable local law or regulations. 此自行證明書僅擬作要求提供資料之用，而有關要求不受適用的當地法律或法規所禁 止。 Please complete this form where you need to self‐certify on behalf of an entity account holder. 若您代表公 司帳戶持有人作出自行證明，請填妥此自行證明書。 If you are an individual account holder or sole trader or sole proprietor do not complete this form. Instead please complete an “Individual/Controlling Person Self Certification Form (FATCA and CRS)”. 若您是個人帳戶 持有人或唯一交易商或獨資經營者，請勿填寫此自行證明書。請您改為填寫「個人╱控權人士自行證明 書 (FATCA 及 CRS)」。 Where the account holder is a passive non‐financial entity (“NFE”), or an investment entity located in a non‐ participating jurisdiction managed by another financial institution. 若帳戶持有人為非實質營運的非金融實 體，或位處不參與的司法管轄區並由另一家金融機構管理的投資公司 Please provide information on the natural person(s) who exercise control over the account holder (such individuals referred to as “Controlling Person(s)”) by completing an “Individual/Controlling Person Self Certification Form (FATCA and CRS)” for each Controlling Person. This information should be provided in respect of any account holder which is a passive NFE or investment entities located in a non‐participating jurisdiction and managed by another financial institution. 請就每名控權人士填寫一份「個人╱控權人士自 行證明書 (FATCA 及 CRS)」，提供有關可對帳戶持有人行使控制權的自然人的資料（該等個人稱為「控 ESCF (10/2019) 1 of 7 權人士」Controlling Person）。所提供的有關資料應與任何屬於非實質營運的非金融公司或位處不參與 的司法管轄區並由另一家金融機構管理的投資公司的帳戶持有人有關。 If you are completing the form on the account holder’s behalf 若您代表帳戶持有人填寫自行證明書 You should indicate the capacity in which you have signed in Section 4. s: Application Supplement 投保申請附加資料 CRITICAL ILLNESS LIVING BENEFIT 一世無憂危疾附加保障 EXERCISE OF COVER-ME-AGAIN OPTION 行使備用保障權益 PLAN NAME OF THE NEW COVERAGE 新保障計劃名稱 NAME OF INSURED 受保人姓名 POLICY NO. OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE 原有保障保單編號 EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE 原有保障生效日 CUSTOMER’S DECLARATION 客戶聲明 Every reference in this declaration to: 於本聲明內提及的: • “Original Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that is being exercised. 「原有保障」指提供有關之備用保障權益之保障。 • “New Coverage” means the coverage issued under the exercise of the Cover-Me-Again option. 「新保障」指根據行使有關之備用保障權益所發出之保障。 I, being the policyowner of the New Coverage, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following: 本人﹝新保障之保單持有人﹞謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列條款： PARTICULARS 詳情 In consideration for the exercise of Cover-Me-Again option, the Provision of the New Coverage shall be issued with the following amendments: 當行使有關之備用保障權益時，新保障的條款將加入以下修訂： • No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness which existed or the cause or signs or symptoms of which existed before the date of endorsement or the effective date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. 本公司不會就新保障的批註日或新保障的生效日前（以較後者為準）已經存在的任何危疾或男性及女性疾病，或引致有關危疾 或男性及女性疾病的已存在成因、症狀或病徵支付在生利益賠償。 • No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness claimed under the Original Coverage and related illnesses determined by the Company. 本公司不會就任何曾於原有保障提出索償的危疾或男性及女性疾病及本公司釐定的相關疾病支付在生利益賠償。 • The life insured must survive a period of 28 days or the period stipulated in the Provision of the New Coverage, whichever is longer, following the diagnosis of Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness covered under the New Coverage before any benefit with respect to which is payable. 受保人在被診斷證實患上新保障包括的危疾或男性及女性疾病之日起計的首28天或新保障條款指定的期限（以較長者為準）， 必須仍然在世，本公司方會支付有關賠償。 • The claim amount payable for Living Benefits under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness is within the first 12 months from the date of endorsement or the effective date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit on any Critical Illness other than “Angioplasty and Other Invasive Treatments for Coronary Artery Disease”, the New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the Company. 如受保人在新保障的批註日或新保障的生效日後（以較後者為準）的首12個月內被診斷證實患上危疾，本公司將賠償該項危疾 或男性及女性疾病的在生利益賠償額50%。在本公司給予「血管成形術及其他冠狀動脈之創傷性治療」以外之任何危疾賠償後，在 不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司亦不會再作出任何賠償。 *OBJTSFORM856* Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險 (國際) 有限公司 Form 856_CMA_CLB (12/2025) 1年 2年 3年 4年 5年 提早贖回費比率 # 6% 5% 4% 3% 2% * 年期由每次認購的實際日期起計算。 # 提早贖回費會首先適用於最早的認購（即「先進先出」基準）。 (b) 周年獎賞：若閣下符合指定的要求，可享有周年獎賞。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料 文件。 (4) 費用及收費：某些費用／收費將從閣下投連壽險保單價值中扣減，並會減少可供投資的金額。因此， 閣下投連壽險保單的整體回報有可能遠低於閣下所選取的相關基金的回報。詳情請參閱此投連壽 險保單的產品資料文件。 (5) 轉換投資選項：若閣下轉換投資選項，可能需要支付相關收費，而閣下所承受的投資風險亦有可能 因而增加或減少。 (6) 與風險承擔能力不相符的相關風險：如果閣下打算在保單生效後選擇認購的相關投資選項組合或 者在保單生效後轉入的相關投資選項組合，與閣下的風險承擔能力及知識（包括對衍生產品的相關 投資知識）不相符，則閣下可能需承受額外相關風險。 (7) 有關以定期派發現金股息為目的之投資選項之相關風險：若閣下選擇任何以定期派發現金股息為 目的之投資選項，請注意有關的現金股息分派並非保證。此外，現金股息的分派亦有可能從／實際 上從投資選項之相應基金的資本中支付，因而或會導致投資選項的單位價格下跌。 (8) 提早終止風險：若有任何啟動保單自動提早終止的情況出現，閣下的投連壽險保單或會被自動提早 終止，而閣下亦會因此損失所有已繳付保費及累算權益。如閣下的保單價值降至零（例如：投資表現 不理想等），此情況可能啟動保單自動提早終止。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 2 IFSADTU_MIPLUS_CHI s: < IFSAD_FIP/VIP+/JIP_CHI (12/2025) > 保單編號 靈活投資保／萬利保障計劃／宏寶 - 增加按期保費／額外保費 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（＂投連壽險＂）保單 第一部 : 重要資料聲明書 閣下應細閱本聲明書及產品資料文件（包括產品說明書及投資選項手冊）。若閣下不明白以下的任何一段、 或不同意以下的任何特定段落、或閣下的持牌保險中介人的講述與閣下所閱讀或理解本聲明的內容有異， 請勿簽署確認或購買此增加按期保費／額外保費。 閣下可向銷售的持牌保險中介人索取本文件的英文版本。You may request the English version of this statement from your licensed insurance intermediary. 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱 (1) 目標概要：請閣下列出購買此增加按期保費／額外保費的原因／考慮因素。持牌保險中介人必須就 閣下列明的原因／考慮因素，以及其他相關資料，一併評估此增加按期保費／額外保費是否適合閣 下。（申請人必須列出自己的原因／考慮因素。） (2) 沒有資產擁有權及沒有投資回報保證：對於此投連壽險保單的相關投資資產，閣下均沒有任何權利 或擁有權。任何追索只可向宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（「宏利」）提出，而閣下亦須承擔宏利的信 貸風險。投資回報並非保證。 ሗʶᅣ̘ *OBJTIFS* Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 IFSAD_FIP/VIP+/JIP_CHI (12/2025) 1 *OBJTIFS* 保單編號 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（＂投連壽險＂）保單（續） 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱（續） (3) 費用及收費：某些費用／收費將從閣下支付的保費及／或閣下投連壽險保單價值中扣減，有關費用 及收費並會減少可供投資的金額。因此，閣下投連壽險保單的整體回報有可能遠低於閣下所選取的 相關基金的回報。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 (4) 轉換投資選項：若閣下轉換投資選項，可能需要支付相關收費，而閣下所承受的投資風險亦有可能 因而增加或減少。 (5) 與風險承擔能力不相符的相關風險：如果閣下打算在保單生效後選擇認購的相關投資選項組合或 者在保單生效後轉入的相關投資選項組合，與閣下的風險承擔能力及知識（包括對衍生產品的相關 投資知識）不相符，則閣下可能需承受額外相關風險。 (6) 保費假期：請向持牌保險中介人查詢及參閱產品資料文件，以確認此投連壽險保單是否設有保費假 期（即在此期間可暫停保費供款），以及行使保費假期權利所需符合的指定條件。若閣下的投連壽險 保單設有保費假期，閣下必須注意以下事項： (a) 保費假期指閣下可在該期間暫時停止定期保費供款，但並不表示閣下只須在最初的供款期內 繳付保費。 (b) 由於在保費假期內所有費用及收費仍會繼續從閣下的投連壽險保單價值中扣除，因此，閣下的 投連壽險保單價值或會因此而大幅減少。 (7) 提早終止風險：若有任何啟動保單自動提早終止的情況出現，閣下的投連壽險保單或會被自動提早 終止，而閣下亦會因此損失所有已繳付保費及累算權益。此可能啟動保單自動提早終止的情況包 括：閣下未能支付保費（定期保費），或閣下的保單總值處於十分低或負數的水平（例如：投資表現不 理想或於行使保費假期後等）。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 2 IFSAD_FIP/VIP+/JIP_CHI (12/2025) 保單編號 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（＂投連壽險＂）保單（續） 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱（續） (8) 持牌保險中介人的酬勞：若閣下選擇繳付增加按期保費，或繳付額外保費，持牌保險代理人將會獲 取平均的酬勞如下（以閣下每繳付$100元美元（適用於美元保單）或$100元港元（適用於港元保 單）保費金額計）： 按期保費 額外保費 靈活投資保/萬利保障計劃 $3.00 $3.00 宏寶 $5.44 $3.00 持牌保險中介人的酬勞是基於閣下會在整個保費繳付期內繳付所有供款的假設下，計算所得的平 均值。該酬勞包括所有直接因銷售此保單而向持牌保險代理人支付的款項（包括前期及其後的佣 金、花紅及其他獎金）。 持牌保險代理人實際應收取的酬勞金額可能會因年度而異，並且在第一個保單年度╱早期保單年 度較高。 某些無關重要、並非直接因增加按期保費／額外保費而支付及難以兌現為現金的酬勞並不包括在 計算當中。 此保單涉及終生保費供款，計算總保費及總酬勞金額時採用三十年為供款期的假設。 如果閣下希望進一步了解持牌保險代理人就此增加按期保費／額外保費可能取得的酬勞，閣下有 權向閣下的持牌保險代理人查詢。 本人（「保單持有人」）現確認已閱讀及明白，並同意受以上各段之約束。 保單持有人全名 持牌保險中介人姓名 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 IFSAD_FIP/VIP+/JIP_CHI (12/2025) 保單持有人簽署 t: Individual/Controlling Person Self Certification Form (FATCA and CRS) 個人╱控權人士自行證
s: Individual/Controlling Person Self Certification Form (FATCA and CRS) 個人╱控權人士自行證明書 （FATCA 及 CRS） Please read these instructions before completing this form. 填寫自行證明書前，請先參閱下列指引。 General 總則 Regulations based on Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (“FATCA”) and Organisation for Economic Cooperation and Development (“OECD”) Common Reporting Standard (“CRS”) require financial institutions to collect and report certain required information based on an individual account holder’s or controlling person of an entity account holder’s tax residence. 根據採用外國帳戶稅務遵從法（「FATCA」）及經濟合作與發展 組織（OECD/「經合組織」）共同申報準則（Common Reporting Standard／「CRS」）的法規，要求金 融機構按照個人帳戶持有人或公司帳戶持有人的控權人士的納稅居住地收集及匯報若干所需資料。 Each jurisdiction has its own rules for defining tax residence. In general, tax residence is the territory or country in which you live. Special circumstances (such as studying abroad, working overseas, or extended travel) may cause you to be resident elsewhere or resident in more than one territory or country at the same time (multiple residencies). The territory/territories or country/countries in which you pay income tax are likely to be your territory/territories or country/countries of tax residence. For more information on tax residence, please consult your tax adviser or the information at the following link for FATCA and OECD CRS at https://www.irs.gov/ and http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/ respectively. 每個司法管轄區均按其本身的規則釐定納稅居住地的定義。一般來說，納稅居住地是指您 居住的地區或國家。若干特別情況（例如海外留學、海外工作或延長旅遊）可能會導致您成為其他地 方的居民，或同時成為超過一個地區或國家的居民（多重居住地）。您的納稅居住國可能會是您須繳 納入息稅的一個或多個地區或國家。有關納稅居住地的詳情，請諮詢您的稅務顧問，或分別瀏覽下列 有 關 外 國 帳 戶 稅 務 遵 從 法 及 經 合 組 織 的 共 同 申 報 準 則 網 頁 的 資 料 : https://www.irs.gov/ 及 http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/crs-implementation-and-assistance/ If your tax residence (or the account holder, if you are completing this form on their behalf) is located outside of the territory or country in which your Manulife InvestChoice Account(s) and/or your Account(s) with Manulife Global Fund, Manulife Advanced Fund SPC and/or Manulife Hong Kong Series is/are maintained, we may be legally obliged to pass on the information in this form and other financial information with respect to your financial accounts to the tax authorities in the territory or country where the financial institution is located. 若 您的納稅居住地（或帳戶持有人，如您代其填寫自行證明書）位處的地區或國家與開設的宏利智晰投 資服務帳戶及/或 宏利環球基金/ 宏利盈進基金 SPC / 宏利香港系列帳戶的國家不同，我們在法律上可能 有責任把此自行證明書內的資料及與您的財務帳戶有關的其他財務資料，轉交金融機構所屬地區或國 家的稅務機關。 This form will remain valid unless there is a change in circumstance relating to your tax status. You must notify us within 30 days if there is a change in circumstance that makes any of the information provided in this form incorrect or incomplete and provide an updated self-certification form. 此自行證明書將一直有效，直至出現 與您的稅務狀況有關的情況變動為止。若出現任何可導致自行證明書所提供的資料失實或不完整的情 況變動，您必須於 30 日內通知我們，並提交最新的自行證明書。 This form is intended to request information only where such request is not prohibited by applicable local law or regulations. 此自行證明書僅擬作要求提供資料之用，而有關要求不受適用的當地法律或法規所禁 止。 As a financial institution, we are not allowed to give tax or legal advice. 作為一家金融機構，我們不得提供 稅務或法律意見。 If you have any questions about this form, these instructions, or defining your tax residency status, please speak to your tax adviser or domestic tax authority. 如對此自行證明書、指引或釐定您的納稅居住地狀況 有任何疑問，請與您的稅務顧問或當地稅務機關聯絡。 INTERNAL ISCF (12/2024) Page 1 of 7 Filing Instruction 申報指引 Please use this form 請填妥此自行證明書： • If you are an individual/joint account holder, sole trader, sole proprietor holding an existing account(s) with us and you are notifying us of a change in circumstances. Please complete Section 1, 2, 3 and 5. 若您是個人／聯名帳戶持有人、唯一交易商、獨資經營者，而您的個人資料於 開戶後有所改變。請填妥第 1、2、3 及 5 部分。 or 或 • If you are a controlling person of a passive non-financial entity and you are either opening a new account(s) with us or you are notifying us of a change in circumstances. Please complete all Sections. 若您是非實質營運的非金融實體的控權人士，請於開戶或於開戶後有所改變時填妥此自行證 明書。 Below is only applicable to controlling person of an entity account holder 以下只適用於公司帳戶持有人 的控權人士： Since you are a controlling person of a passive non-financial entity, or an investment entity located in a nonparticipating jurisdiction managed by another financial institution (such individual(s) referred to as “Controlling Person(s)”), please provide your information in the Sections below. 由於您是非實質營運的非 金融實體的控權人士，或位處不參與的司法管轄區並由另一家金融機構管理的投資公司（該等個人稱 作「控權人士」），請在以下部分提供您的資料。 Generally, a controlling person is a natural person that holds more than 25% of the shares of the entity or otherwise exercises ultimate control of an entity. However, if you are an investor in the Manulife Advanced Fund SPC or the Manulife Investment Trust, the threshold used is 10%. For further guidance see: http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/common-reporting-standard/common-reporting-standardand-related-commentaries/#d.en.345314. 一般來說，控權人士是指持有一個公司超過 25%股份或可對 一個公司行使最終控制權的自然人。但是，若您是宏利盈進基金 SPC 或宏利投資信託的投資者，其 起點則為 10%。有關指引的詳情，請瀏覽：http://www.oecd.org/tax/automatic-exchange/commonreporting-standard/common-reporting-standard-and-related-commentaries/#d.en.345314 If you are the entity account holder filling in this form on behalf of your controlling persons 若您是公司帳 戶持有人並代表您的控權人士填寫此自行證明書 : Please tell us in what capacity you are signing in Section 5. For example, you may be the custodian or nominee of an account(s) on behalf of the entity account holder, or you may be completing this form under a power of attorney. 請註明您是以甚麼身份在第 5 部分作出簽署。舉例說，您可能是代表公司帳戶持有人的帳戶保管人或 代名人，或者您可能是根據授權書填寫自行證明書。 Please return the completed and signed form to Manulife Investment Management (Hong Kong) Limited 請把填妥及簽署的自行證明書交回宏利投資管理（香港）有限公司 : Manulife Investment Management (Hong Kong) Limited 23/F., Manulife Tower, One Bay East, 83 Hoi Bun Road, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong Telephone : (852) 2108 1110 Facsimile : (852) 2810 9510 宏利投資管理（香港）有限公司 香港九龍觀塘海濱道83號 宏利大樓23樓 電話：(852) 2108 1110 傳真：(852) 2810 9510 INTERNAL ISCF (12/2024) Page 2 of 7 Section 1: Account Hold

Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS and check the boxes where appropriate. Please initial any correction you make on this form. 2. Change form should be submitted to Manulife within 31 days from the effective date of change. 3. Please return completed form to us either by email to group_ins_admin_hk@manulife.com or by fax to (852) 2234 5371 or by mail to our address as appeared at the bottom of this form. DO NOT send the form again if you have emailed or faxed it already. 4. Your employee should submit “Change of Personal Particulars Form” or “Change of Contact Details Form” for updating his/her personal particulars and contact information. The forms can be downloaded in Manulife’s website at www.manulife.com.hk. 5. Manulife will process this change request upon receipt of this completed form and all pertinent document(s), if any. 6. Manulife shall assume no responsibility to verify or advise on the changes. Employers are advised to take independent professional advice to determine the appropriate instructions to Manulife. 注意事項： 1. 請用正楷填寫本表格，並於適當空格內加P 號。請於任何刪改之 位置旁簽署。 2. 更改表格須於有關更改生效日期後31日內遞交給宏利。 3. 請將填妥的表格電郵至group_ins_admin_hk@manulife.com或傳真至 (852) 2234 5371或交回本表格底部之宏利通訊地址。如電郵或已傳真 本表格，閣下毋須再次寄交。 4. 如僱員欲更改個人及聯絡資料，僱員可遞交「更改個人資料表格」或「更 改聯絡資料表格」。表格可於宏利網站www.manulife.com.hk下載。 5. 宏利將於收訖本填妥表格或有關文件(如有)後處理是項申請。 6. 宏利將不承擔核實更改之責任或就此提供意見。本公司建議僱主 尋求獨立的專業意見，以決定向宏利發出適當的指示。 Policy No. 保單編號 Employer Name － － 僱主名稱 A. (2) Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS and tick the appropriate boxes. (3) Please initial next to any corrections you make to avoid delays in processing your instructions. (4) Please note your account balance cannot be less than $5,000 after any partial withdrawal. (5) You are required to attach a copy of your HKID card along with this form. If you do not possess a HKID card, a copy of your passport (only the page(s) with personal particulars and passport number is required) should be provided for veri cation. Or you may present the ID card / passport in person at Manulife’s Customer Service Centres for veri cation. (6) The information collected from you and in respect of you in support of this instruction can be used by Manulife, approved trustee(s), relevant service provider(s), and the government or regulatory bodies including the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority ("MPFA") in activities relating to the processing of your instruction as requested in this Form. The information may be transferred to other division(s) within Manulife, the relevant approved trustee(s), government or regulatory bodies including the MPFA or other parties including delegates, intermediaries or any service providers of Manulife or the relevant approved trustees, for such purpose(s) or for a purpose directly related to such purpose(s). All data processes may involve a transfer of information to places either within or outside the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. You are required to supply the information in this Form and failure to do so may result in your instruction being delayed. (7) The MPFA and other regulatory bodies in any jurisdiction shall be authorized to inspect any information under the scheme. (8) By writing to the Privacy Of cer of Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, you can correct and have access to your personal data. (9) All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the "Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance" (the latest version made available by Manulife) ("Notice"). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain a copy through Manulife's website at www.manulife.com.hk. 注意事項： (1) 本表格只適用於作為提取自選退休供款之用。 (2) 請用正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格內加 號。 (3) 為免延誤處理您的指示，如須作出任何刪改，請於刪改之位 置旁簽署。 (4) 請注意，於任何部份提取後，您的帳戶結餘不得少於5,000港元。 (5) 本表格必須與香港身份證副本一併遞交。如您沒有香港身份證， 則必須提供護照副本（只需附有個人資料及護照號碼等頁）以作 核實。您亦可親臨宏利客戶中心提交身份證/護照以供核實。 (6) 宏利、核准受託人、相關服務提供者及政府或規管機構，包 括強制性公積金計劃管理局（簡稱「積金局」）可使用從您 收集及關於您的資料以處理您在本表格內之指示。為達致該 等目的，或直接與該等目的有關的目的，所提供資料可移轉 予宏利內其他部門、有關核准受託人、政府或規管機構，包 括積金局，或其他人士/團體，包括宏利或有關核准受託人的 受委託者、強積金中介人或任何服務提供者。所有資料處理 過程或會涉及資料移轉至香港特別行政區或以外地區。請提 供本表格所需的資料，否則您的指示或會因此而被延誤。 (7) 積金局及任何司法管轄區的其他監管團體將獲授權查看計劃 內的任何資料。 (8) 您可以書面向宏利公積金信託有限公司之個人資料主任更改 及查閱您的個人資料。 (9) 宏利可按於《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》 （由宏利提供之最新版本）（「通知」）所述，處理有關資 料。假如您未有細閱該通知，可透過宏利網址 www.manulife.com.hk取得該通知。 Important Notes 重要事項 1. MPF contributions serve to help you plan for your long-term nancial needs. It is advisable for you to consider if any pre-retirement bene t withdrawal is suitable to your personal nancial plan. For members who are executing a withdrawal from the Stable Fund, please make reference to section 6.2.2 of the MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document of the Scheme on the potential effect on the guarantee entitlement by any partial/total withdrawal from the Stable Fund. 強積金乃為保障退休後生活所需而設，涉及長遠的投資計劃。請審慎考慮於退休前所作出的款項提取是否配合您的理財計劃。成員如選擇自穩健基金提取權益， 請參考本計劃之強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件第6.2.2章所述有關自該基金行使部份/全數提取可能對有關保證帶來之潛在影響。 2. Flexi Retirement Contribution member may be entitled to bonus units based on the asset level and fund choice under the account. For the 12 months immediately following a withdrawal, NO bonus unit will be released in respect of the entire Flexi Retirement Contribution balance (including new contributions made during the period). For details about our prevailing bonus unit offer for making Flexi Retirement Contribution, please call our Member hotline at (852) 2108 1388. Terms and conditions applies. 現時自選退休供款可按資產結存金額及基金選擇享有不同程度的紅利單位優惠。然而於任何提取後，宏利將不會於其後之12個月內就您的自選退休供款帳戶內之 全數結餘（包括期間之新增供款）發放紅利單位。如需查詢有關自選退休供款現時之紅利單位優惠詳情，請致電成員服務熱線(852) 2108 1388。請注意有關之條 款及條件。 3. The Manulife MPF 2025 Retirement Fund, the Manulife MPF 2030 Retirement Fund, the Manulife MPF 2035 Retirement Fund, the Manulife MPF 2040 Retirement Fund and the Manulife MPF 2045 Retirement Fund will be closed on their maturity dates as de ned in the MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document of the Scheme. Details on any special procedures in handling contribution investment instructions or other instructions to subscribe or redeem units of these funds due to fund maturity can be found in the latest MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document of the Scheme. 宏利MPF2025退休基金、宏利MPF2030退休基金、宏利MPF2035退休基金、宏利MPF2040退休基金及宏利MPF2045退休基金將於本計劃之強積金計劃說明書及 主要計劃資料文件內所定義的期滿日結束，請參閱本計劃之最新的強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件以了解因基金期滿就處理該等基金的供款投資指示、或其 他認購或贖回單位的特別程序。 4. If you have reached, or are approaching, the age of 50 and your accrued bene ts are currently invested according to the default investment strategy (“DIS”) of the scheme, you should be aware that the de-risking mechanism of the DIS starts at the age of 50. When one or more instruction(s) from members, such as subscription, redemption or switching instructions, are also being processed and with units to be issued/redeemed (except for the Interest Fund where investment to be made in or monies to be withdrawn from) on the same dealing day as the dealing day scheduled for the annual de-risking, such instruction(s) and the annual de-risking in respect of such member will take place on the same day. In such case,

e) confirm that in relation to my instruction(s) pursuant to these regulated activities, I have not been offered any rebates/gifts/incentives which are not approved by Manulife; f) hereby give my express consent to the MPF intermediary(ies) for receiving monetary and non-monetary benefits; g) read and understood the Personal Information Collection Statement printed on the back page of this Form; h) confirm that I have received a copy of the document(s)/form(s) and this Form which are signed by me for record. 在簽署本表格，本人： a) 明白強積金中介人所提供及討論的資料，及本人所作出的決定； b) 明白本人終止投資於原有強積金計劃下的任何保證基金的後果； c) 明白如本人的指示關乎計劃下的任何保證基金的投資，有關保證 需受制於保證特點及保證條件； d) 確認下頁所列的強積金中介人已履行本表格D部分所列項目的要求； e) 確認本人就此等受規管活動而作出的指示，本人並沒有獲提供未 經宏利核准的任何回Щ/禮物/優待； f) 在此就強積金中介人收取金錢利益及非金錢利益給予明示同意； g) 閱讀及明白本表格背頁的收集個人資料聲明； h) 確認本人已收取本人簽署的文件/表格及本表格之副本作存檔。 Note to client : If you are in doubt about your instruction(s), you should seek independent professional advice. 客戶備註：如您對所作出的指示有疑問，請徵詢獨立專業人士的意見。 Acknowledged by client 由客戶確認 MPF IFF (07/2026) 1 of 3 Signature of client 客戶簽署 REMINDER: Please sign only when the form is fully completed. ౤ͪjሗස‫ࣸڌ׵‬෬Ѽ‫̙˙ܝ‬ᖦ໇f Date 日期 (dd/mm/yyyy 日/月/年) # Any client who is not, or may not be, able to fully understand the type of information to be provided and discussed or able to make that key decision(s)* independently, e.g.(i) with primary education level or below, or (ii) visually or otherwise impaired, will be considered by the Guidelines on Conduct Requirements for Registered Intermediaries (the “Guidelines”) as a client with special needs that require extra care/support. 任何客戶如不能完Ό明白或也許不能完Ό明白所提供及討論的資料，或不能獨立作出有關的重要決定*，例如(i)教育水平為小學或以下，或(ii)有視障或其他障礙，則按註冊中介人操守要求指引（「指引」） 被視為有特別需要而需特別照顧/支援的客戶。 *DEFKM-IFF* Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 D. (下文之英文版本參見本表格背頁。) 強積金中介人在進行受規管活動時應已履行以下要求： 關於資料披露 本人/吾等已： a) 向客戶提供披露所需資料聲明的陳述及指引要求下所有計劃相關的所需資料； b) 解釋與客戶指示相關的計劃之特點； c) 向客戶解釋若計劃成員沒有選擇任何成分基金及/或在強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件或相關行政表格內所註明的特定情況下，其供款/從其他計劃轉移 之累算權益將會按計劃下之預設安排作出投資，以及有關預設安排的特點； d) 在如關乎累算權益轉移，詢問客戶現時有否投資於原有強積金計劃下的保證基金，及(i)警告客戶如從其原有強積金計劃下的保證基金轉出累算權益，可能會因 未能符合部分或Ό部的保證條件而導致喪失保證，及(ii)建議客戶先行查閱其原有強積金計劃的強積金計劃說明書及主要計劃資料文件，或向其原有強積金計 劃的受託人查詢詳情後，才由保證基金轉出累算權益； 關於客戶指示的行政措施 本人/吾等已： e) 在如客戶要求轉移累算權益，向其講解轉移程序所需的時間，除另有訂明外當中會相隔一段時間而其間該等累算權益將不作任何投資； f) 知會客戶由積金易平台就其指示的處理狀況而作出任何通知，將表示本人/吾等已把客戶的指示文件/表格，如有遞交至積金易平台； 關於其他項目 本人/吾等已： g) 沒有邀請/誘使客戶作出關乎某成分基金的選擇，亦沒有提供作出關乎某成分基金的選擇的受規管意見； h) 沒有就關於提早提取累算權益或作出自願性供款的款額的決定而提供任何詳細意見，而本人/吾等並不知悉有任何其他需進行評估的特定情況； i) 已核對客戶的身份證明文件以核實其身份證明資料。 Acknowledged by MPF intermediary 由強積金中介人確認 Acknowledged by another MPF intermediary (if applicable) 由其他強積金中介人確認（如適用） Signature of MPF intermediary 強積金中介人簽署 For Agent Use Only ˾ଣɛਖ਼͜ eMPF reference no. 積金易參考編號： Signature of other MPF intermediary 其他強積金中介人簽署 MPF IFF (07/2026) 2 of 3 Please the type(s) of document(s)/form(s) received by you 請以 註明接獲之文件/表格ᗳ別： Personal Account application/transfer (including Employee Choice Arrangement) 個人帳戶申請/轉移（包括僱員自選安排） The number of PA accounts transferred from other trustee(s) 客戶從其他受託人轉移至宏利的個人帳戶數目： Self-employed Person application/transfer 自僱人士申請/轉移 Participating Employer application/transfer 參與僱主申請/轉移 Number of employees 僱員數目： This is a transfer of accrued benefits upon intra-group transfer/change of business ownership 這是有聯繫

If you do not provide us the necessary information / forms in timely manner, the Company may not be able to process your application or may even reject your application and we will not bear any loss that may arise. 請根據此表格提供所需資料，否則，本公司將無法遵從相關規管要求。如閣下未能及時提交需要的資料／表格，本公司可能無法處理閣下的申請甚或拒絕閣下的申請，亦不會承擔 任何可能因此引致的損失。 (9) Please read the Investment Choice Brochure of Manulife Investment Plus 2 and the offering documents of the underlying funds corresponding to the investment choices to understand the nature and risks of the underlying funds. 請參閱宏利投資計劃2的投資選項手冊及投資選項的相關基金的銷售文件，以了解相關基金的性質及風險。 (10) You should select the investment choice(s) only if you understand the nature and risks of the investment choice(s) and its underlying fund(s), and have sufficient net worth to be able to assume the risks and bear the potential losses of trading in relation to the investment choices selected. 閣下在選擇投資選項前，請閣下必須了解該投資選項及相關基金的性質及風險，並需要持有足夠的淨資產承擔與所選投資選項有關的相關風險並承擔有關的潛在損失；否則，閣下 不應選擇該投資選項。 (11) You may be exposed to the additional associated risks if the selected mix of underlying investment choices you intend to allocate through top-up premiums or switch in, after policy inception, is inconsistent with your risk profile and knowledge (including investment knowledge in derivatives). 如果閣下打算在保單生效後，就增額保費所選擇分配的相關投資選項組合或轉入的相關投資選項組合，與閣下的風險承擔能力及知識（包括對衍生產品的相關投資知識）不相符， 則閣下可能需承受額外相關風險。 (12) You may be exposed to additional associated risks if you are investing in investment choice(s) of which underlying fund(s) is/are classified as derivative fund(s). The volatility of these underlying fund(s) may increase or decrease from their derivative usage, and may suffer losses. Please refer to the offering documents of the respective underlying fund(s) for details. 如閣下所選的投資選項連繫至的相關基金被歸ᗳ為衍生產品基金，閣下或因而可能需承受額外相關風險。此等相關基金的波幅或因衍生產品的使用而上升或下降，或因而出現虧損。 詳情請參閱各相關基金的銷售文件。 (13) Please contact your advisor or visit our Customer Website at www.manulife.com.hk for ascertain the latest available investment choices. 請聯絡閣下的顧問或瀏覽宏利網站(www.manulife.com.hk)查閱最新可供選擇的投資選項。 (14) You are advised to complete the Risk Profile Questionnaire to assess your risk profile before investing. If there are any material changes to the information in the questionnaire provided previously and / or the questionnaire provided was submitted over 12 months, please complete the Risk Profile Questionnaire to assess your risk profile again. Please visit our website or contact your licensed insurance intermediary for details of the risk level of the respective investment choice. 我們建議閣下於投資前填寫「風險承擔能力問卷」以評估閣下之風險承受程度。如閣下於較早前遞交的「風險承擔能力問卷」內所提供的資料有重大變更及/或閣下所提供的問卷已超過 12個月，我們建議閣下重新填寫該問卷以評估閣下之風險承受程度。有關各相關投資選項的風險級別詳情，請瀏覽本公司網頁或聯絡閣下的持牌保險中介人。 (15) Please read the Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance ("Notice") before you complete this form. The Notice is available on Manulife's website (www.manulife.com.hk) or upon request from your Manulife Advisor. By completing and returning to Manulife the form, you are agreeing to the Notice. 當閣下填寫此表格前，請閱畢《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》。該通知可於宏利網址(www.manulife.com.hk)或向閣下的宏利顧問索取。透過填妥及交回此表格，即 表示閣下同意該通知之內容。 Type of Application ͡ሗᗳй Please complete ሗ෬ᄳ Lump-Sum Top-up Premium 一筆過增額保費 • Part A1 第一部份 (A1) Set up Regular Top-up Premium 申請定期增額保費 • Part A2 第一部份 (A2) Change in Regular Top-Up Instruction 更改定期增額保費指示 • Part A3 & C (if applicable) 第一 (A3) 及第三部份（如適用） Type of Application ͡ሗᗳй Please complete ሗ෬ᄳ Switching 轉換 • Part B & C (if applicable) 第二及第三部份（如適用） Partial Withdrawal / Redemption 提取部分款項／贖回 • Part D & F 第四及第六部份 Full Surrender Ό數退保 • Part E & F 第五及第六部份 *PFUNDIRECTFUND* *PFUNDIRECTFUND* Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 MS02 (12/2025) 1 of 8 Policy no. 保單編號 Part A: Lump-Sum Top-up Premium / Regular Top-up Premium ୋɓ௅΅jɓഅཀᄣᕘ‫ڭ‬൬ā֛ಂᄣᕘ‫ڭ‬൬ IMPORTANT NOTES ࠠࠅԫධj (1) The Company may process the top-up premium payment application only after the receipt of nal payment of top-up premium amount(s) in full as stated on the form. 本公司將於收到申請表上所註明的Ό數增額保費後方可處理有關增額申請。 (2) To comply with the regulatory requirements, please complete and return the Financial Needs Analysis, Risk Pro le Questionnaire, Important Facts Statement and Applicant’s Declarations for application for lump-sum top-up premium/regular top-up premium/amount increase of existing regular top-up premium. 為遵守監管機構要求，如申請一筆過增額保費／定期增額保費／增加現有定期增額保費金額均須提交已填妥的財務需

t: ORSO (E) Transfer of Accrued Rights upon Intra-group Transfer/Change of Business
s: ORSO (E) Transfer of Accrued Rights upon Intra-group Transfer/Change of Business Ownership Form 有聯繫公司間或更改業務擁有權時之成員轉移表格 Notes: 1. This Form should ONLY be used in case an Employee Member is transferring the accumulations under his/her Existing Employer's MPF exempted ORSO registered scheme ("exempted scheme") to the New Employer's exempted scheme as a result of transfer of employment between associated companies or change of business ownership. 2. Please complete this Form in Block Letter. 3. Please initial next to any corrections you make on this Form. 4. * Delete whichever is inappropriate. 5. Employee Member should give his/her passport number ONLY when he/she does NOT possess a HKID Card. 6. This Form should be signed by the Employee Member and the Existing Employer and the New Employer with company chops of both Employers. 7. Upon completion of this Form, the New Employer should return this Form to the transferee service provider. 8. To effect the intra-group transfer of the Employee Member, the Existing Employer is not required to submit termination notice for the transfer member. 9. "The Commencement Date for Vesting Entitlement" in Part A is used in determination of vesting of employer contributions under the New exempted scheme on final termination of his/her employment by New Employer. 10. The information collected from you and in respect of you can be used by Manulife, approved trustees and the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority ("MPFA") in activities relating to the processing of the transfer as requested in this Form and providing administration services. The information may be transferred to other division(s) within Manulife, the relevant approved trustees or other parties including delegates, intermediaries or any service providers of Manulife or the relevant approved trustees, for such purpose(s) or for a purpose directly related to such purpose(s). All data processes may involve a transfer of information to places either within or outside the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. You are required to supply the information in this Form and failure to do so may result in your request being delayed. 11. The MPFA and other regulatory bodies in any jurisdiction shall be authorized to inspect any information under the scheme. 12. By writing to the Privacy Officer of your scheme administrator, you can correct and have access to your personal data. 13. All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the “Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance” (“Notice”). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice from your Manulife’s intermediary or through Manulife’s website at www.manulife.com.hk. 14. The information of the contact person(s)/authorized person(s) is collected in their official capacities. 15. If necessary, please seek assistance from the service provider of your scheme. 注意事項： 1. 此表格只適用於有聯繫公司間或因更改業務擁有權而需將計劃之成員及其 於成員帳戶內之積存利益，由現僱主之獲強積金豁免的職業退休註冊計劃 內（下稱「獲豁免計劃」） 轉移到另一間有聯繫公司或現公司的新業務權 擁有人之獲豁免計劃內。 2. 請以正楷填寫本表格。 3. 如須作出任何更改，請於刪改之位置旁簽署。 4. * 表示刪除不適用之處。 5. 護照號碼只適用於沒有香港身份證之計劃成員。 6. 本表格須由成員簽署、現僱主及新僱主簽署及蓋章。 7. 新僱主於填妥本表格後請交回新服務提供者。 8. 為確保有聯繫公司間之轉移能順利進行，現僱主不須為轉移成員遞交僱員 終止受僱通知書。 9. 當成員終止受僱於新僱主時，將根據甲部之歸屬權益開始日期以釐定其在 新獲豁免計劃下的僱主供款歸屬部份。 10. 宏利、核准受託人及強制性公積金計劃管理局(簡稱「積金局」)可使用從閣 下收集及關於閣下的資料以處理閣下在本表格內要求的轉移事宜及提供管 理服務。為達致該等目的，或直接與該等目的有關的目的，所提供的資料 可移轉予宏利內其他部門、有關核准受託人或其他人士/團體，包括宏利或 有關核准受託人的受委托者、強積金中介人或任何服務提供者。所有資料 處理過程或會涉及資料移轉至香港特別行政區及以外地區。請提供本表格 所需的資料，否則閣下之要求或會因此而被延誤。 11. 積金局及任何司法管轄區的其他監管團體將獲授權查看計劃內的任何資料。 12. 閣下可以書面向計劃管理人之個人資料主任更改及查閱閣下的個人資料。 13. 宏利可按於《有關〈個人資料(私隱)條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」）所 述，處理有關資料。假如閣下未有細閱該通知，閣下可從閣下的宏利中介 人或透過宏利網址www.manulife.com.hk取得該通知。 14. 聯絡人／獲授權人士的資料乃因應其職務身份而收集。 15. 如有需要，請向所參與計劃的服務提供者求助。 Part A -
