s: This is a fillable form. You can fill it in and print it for signature. Print Reset Save APPLICATION FOR CHANGE OF LIFE INSURED TO CONTINGENT LIFE INSURED 更改受保人至後備受保人申請表 Branch code 分行編號 Location 地點 Advisor’s Code 保險顧問編號 Advisor’s Name 保險顧問姓名 Advisor’s Contact no. 保險顧問聯絡電話 Policy no. 保單編號 Full name of Policyowner 保單持有人姓名 Full name of deceased Life Insured 已故受保人姓名 Points to Note 申請須知： • This Application form (‘Form’) is used for changing the Life Insured under the policy to the Contingent Life Insured under the policy. 此申請表「( 申請表」)用作更改保單受保人至保單下的後備受保人。 • Please provide the full name as shown on Identity Card or Passport or Business Registration Certificate or other relevant Identity Document. 請提供身份證或護照或商業登記證或其他有關身份證明文件所示之全名。 • Please complete this Form in English BLOCK letters legibly. Any amendments to this Form should be clearly indicated and countersigned. 請用英文正楷清楚地填寫此表格。在此表格内如有任何更改，必須清楚註明並在更改的位置簽署作實。 • Manulife shall have the right to revise this Form from time to time and to accept or reject the Form submitted by you if you fail to fulfill the Company’s requirements. 宏利有權隨時更改申請表內容，如閣下未能符合本公司的有關規定，宏利將保留接受或拒絕閣下遞交之申請表的權利。 • In this Form, ‘Manulife’ and the ‘Company’ refer to Manulife (International) Limited. 於此申請表內，「宏利」，「本公司」及「貴公司」是指宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司。 • After your change request is processed, you will receive a digital confirmation notice/endorsement (if digital version is available) if you have opted for e-statements/e-notices under “Other statements/notices/endorsement” and respective paper notice/endorsement will not be provided. You can access your e-Notices and e-Endorsements by logging in to our website or app. 在您的申請處理完成後，如您在「其他結單／通知／批註」類別下選擇了電子結單／通知，您將收取電子版通知／批註（如電子版可供提供），而該通知／批註將不會獲發紙本。您可以 登入我們的網站或流動應用程式，查看您的電子通知及電子批註。 Please read the Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance ("Notice") before you complete this form. The Notice is available on Manulife's website (www.manulife.com.hk) or upon request from your Manulife Advisor. By completing and returning to Manulife the form, you are agreeing to the Notice. 當閣下填寫此表格前，請閱畢《有關〈個人資料(私隱)條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」）。該通知可於宏利網址(www.manulife.com.hk) 或向閣下的宏利顧問索取。透過填妥及交回此表格，即表示 閣下同意該通知之內容。 Important Notes for the application 申請的重要事項： (1) Once this application is accepted and approved by the Company, the Life Insured under the policy will be changed from the deceased Life Insured to the Contingent Life Insured from the date of death of the deceased Life Insured (“Effective Date of Change”) and the policy shall continue to be in force. The Effective Date of Change will be recorded in the relevant Endorsement issued by the Company pursuant to this Form. 於此申請經本公司接納及批准後，保單的受保人將於已故受保人身故日起（「更改生效日」）由已故受保人更改為後備受保人及保單將繼續生效。更改生效日將記錄於由本公司根據此申 請表簽發的有關批註上。 (2) An application for change of Life Insured to Contingent Life Insured under the policy must be submitted to the Company together with satisfactory evidence of the death of the deceased Life Insured, identity proof of the Contingent Life Insured and any other documents as required by the Company within 180 days from the death of the deceased Life Insured under the policy. Failure to provide any of the above to the Company within the prescribed period will render the application and the contingent life insured arrangement invalid and the death proceeds will be paid to the beneficiary(ies). 更改保單受保人至後備受保人的申請連同本公司認可之已故受保人身故證明、後備受保人的身份證明及任何本公司要求的其他文件須於保單已故受保人身故日起計180日內遞交予本 公司。如未能於指定時間內向本公司提供任何上述的文件，此申請及後備受保人安排將會失效及身故賠償將支付於受益人。 (3) As at the Effective Date of Change, the Contingent Life Insured must meet either one of the following conditions: 於更改生效日，後備受保人必須符合以下其中一個條件： i. the actual age of the Contingent Life Insured is 60 or below; or 後備受保人的實際年齡為60歲或以下；或 ii. the actual age of the Contingent Life Insured is not greater than that of the deceased Life Insured and is not greater than 75 (only applicable for ManuGrand Saver, ManuImperial Saver or ManuCentury) or the age limit that specified in the eligible products Change of Life Insured provision if otherwise. 後備受保人的實際年齡不大於已故受保人的年齡及不大於75歲（只適用於豐譽傳承保障計劃、創富傳承保障計劃或世紀傳承保障計劃）或適用產品之更改受保人條款內所指定歲數之上限。 (4) If the Effective Date of Change falls on a policy anniversary date, the “Age” of the Contingent Life Insured means the age nearest birthday as at the relevant policy anniversary date. If the Effective Date of Change does not fall on a policy anniversary date, the "Age" of the Contingent Life Insured means the age nearest birthday (i) as at the Effective Date of Change for the period from the Effective Date of Change up to the end of the policy year in which the Effective Date of Change falls, and (ii) as at the relevant policy anniversary date for the next policy year onwards. 如更改生效日在保單週年日，後備受保人的「年齡」是指相關保單周年日當天最接近一個生日所達之歲數。如更改生效日不是在保單週年日，則後備受保人的「年齡」（i）由更改生效日至更 改生效日所屬之保單年度完結期間，是指更改生效日當天最接近一個生日所達之歲數；及（ii）由下一保單年度開始，是指相關保單周年日當天最接近一個生日所達之歲數。 (5) An application for changing the Life Insured under the policy to the Contingent Life Insured under the policy is not available to policies with irrevocable beneficiary(ies) designation. 更改保單下的受保人至後備受保人之申請並不適用於已指定不可撤換受益人的保單。 (6) Upon the change of Life Insured of the policy, any beneficiary designation previously made will be automatically revoked on the Effective Date of Change. The Policyowner may designate new beneficiaries by completing a designated form and submitting it to the Company. If no beneficiary is designated under the policy, all relevant benefits will be paid to the Policyowner (or if he or she is deceased, the Policyowner’s estate). 於更改保單受保人後，任何較早前所指定的受益人將於更改生效日自動被撤銷。保單持有人可填寫並提交指定表格予本公司以指派新受益人。若保單未有指派受益人，所有有關賠償將 支付予保單持有人(如保單持有人已身故，則支付予保單持有人的遺產)。 (7) (Only applicable to ManuGrand Saver/ ManuImperial Saver) Upon the change of Life Insured of the policy, all the existing supplementary benefits (if any, with the exception of Payor Benefit provided that the following conditions are met as at the Effective Date of Change) under the policy will be automatically terminated on the Effective Date of Change. The criteria of “Large Case” are as follow: 此預審申請的目的是通過提供初步的評估來加快處理大額個案的時間。“大額”的準則如下： - Notional Amount of the application is at least US$ 500,000; OR 是次申請的名義金額至少為美元 500,000； 或 - Annualized premium is equal or more than HK$ 100,000 年度化保費等於或超過港元 100,000。 (B) Prospect Information 準客戶資料 Name of Proposed Insured 準受保人姓名 Occupation 職業 Annual Earned Income (HKD) 全年勞動收入（港幣） Date of Birth (DD/MM/YY) 出生日期（日/月/年） Gender 性別 Please provide the existing Manulife policy number (if any) 請提供在宏利的現有保單號（如有） Smoking Habit 吸煙習慣  No 無  Yes 有, Type 種類__________________________ / Daily consumption 每日使用量_______________ Reason for Pre-assessment 預審原因 Basic Plan & Notional Amount 基本計劃及其名義金額  Medical requirement 醫療要求  Financial requirement 財務要求  Others, please specify 其他，請註明：________________________________________________  USD 美元  HKD 港元 Supplementary Benefit & Protection  USD 美元 Amount 附加保障及其保障金額  HKD 港元 (C) Health History 健康病歷 Please give details include final diagnosis; onset date, type & date & result of investigation, last follow up date & current condition, and provide copies of the relevant medical report (not submitted the original) 請詳述包括確診，病發日期，檢驗名稱，日期及結果，最後覆診日期，目前狀況。並提供相關醫療報告副本（不要遞交正本） Part A 甲部份 Disease 疾病 Details of Treatment / Test Results 治療詳情及檢查結果 Date of last attack / Current Name of doctor(s), district of the clinic / Status hospital 最後病發日期 / 現況 主診醫生姓名及診所 / 醫院地區 Part B 乙部份 Do you have any further information to provide for pre-assessment? 你是否有其他健康資料供預審之用? U65 (11/2025) INTERNAL Page 1 of 2 (D) Financial Background 財務背景 Existing and concurrent coverage type and total amount (HKD) 已生效和申請中的保障類別和總保額（港幣） Name of Insurance Issue Date Type and Total Amount (Life / Critical Illness / Medical) Company 投保年份 保障類別和總保額 (人壽保險 / 危疾/ 醫療) 承保公司名稱 1 2 Decision 結果 Policy Status 保單狀況 (E) Remarks 備註 Other information 其他資料 Supplementary information attachment 補充資料附件  No 沒有  Yes, type of attachment 有，附件種類 _________________________________________________ (F) Insurance Advisor’s Statement 保險顧問聲明 I hereby declare that I have explained to the proposed insured the contents of the following statement and he/she acknowledged that he/she understood the same, and consented to provide the personal data above for pre-assessment. 本人在此聲明已向準受保人解釋以下聲明的內容，並且確定他/她的理解相同，並同意提供個人資料以進行預審。 Manulife (International) Limited and its reinsurers collect personal data of the proposed insured in this form (the “Personal Data”) for the purposes of conducting pre-assessments and other related purposes. It is voluntary for the proposed insured to provide the Personal Data. Failure to supply the Personal Data may result in Manulife being unable to conduct the pre-assessment. By writing to the Privacy Officer, the proposed insured may request access to and correction of the Personal Data. All information may treated by Manulife in same manner as mentioned in the “Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance”, which can be obtained from Manulife intermediaries or through Manulife’s website at www.manulife.com.hk. 宏利人壽保險 (國際) 有限公司及其再保險公司於本表格收集準受保人的個人資料，以用作進行預審和相關目的。準受保人可自願提供其 個人資料。不提供此等資料可能導致宏利無法進行預審。準受保人可以書面通知宏利個人資料主任，要求索閱及個人更正其個人資料。宏 利可按於《有關個人資料（私隱）條例》的客戶通知(「該通知」)所述，處理有關資料。準受保人可向宏利中介人或透過宏利網站 www.manulife.com.hk 取得該通知。 _____________________________ Date 日期 (DD/MM/YY) _________________________________ Signature of Insurance Advisor 保險顧問簽署 (G) Application Procedure 申請程序 1 Application Submission 遞交申請 i Once advisor completed and signed the form, District Director or above of the advisor send the form with related document (if any) through email with subject line stating “Large Case Enquiry Form” to a. The relevant underwriting representative of your district and copy to your Agency Director; OR b. Email address: underwriting_hk@manulife.com 當保險顧問填妥及簽署申請表格後，請把表格連同其他文件（如有）經電郵主題「大額個案查詢表格」，由分區總監或以上 的電郵傳送至 : a. 所屬區域的核保代表，並抄送副本至所屬經銷總監 ; 或 b. 電郵地址 : underwriting_hk@manulife.com ii Submit to our underwriting representative at the Underwriting clinic 遞交至核保工作坊的核保專員。 2 Underwriting Department will review the case and reply via email within 5 working days after submission. 核保部便會進行評估。大約於五個工作天內經電郵回覆核保結果。 3 Underwriting Department will conduct a one-time enquiry on ‘Large case’ only. After the initial evaluation, we strongly recommend client to submit formal application for complete assessment and please attach the enquiry result to the application form. The insurance advisor can arrange medical examinations and collect other supplement information in accordance to the pre-assessment result. We accept to submit full set of application document without initial premium under this situation. 核保部只會對大額個案查詢進行一次性評估。初步評估過後，我們建議客戶提交正式申請，以繼續進行核保程序。在遞交正式的 申請時，請將查詢結果附加在申請文件之內。保險顧問可根據之前預審的要求替客人安排身體檢查和遞交其他補充資料。此情況 下，我們接受沒有首期保費下遞交投保申請。 4 The validity of this result is 90 days. 該結果的有效期是 90 天。 5 Underwriting department will not bear any medical expense for pre-assessment. 核保部將不會承擔有關預審的醫療費用。 6 We reserve the right to request additional requirements after reviewing the application and the final decision is subject to the risk identified. 在審 核申請後，我們保留要求額外需要的權利，而最終決定是基於可以確定的風險。 U65 (11/2025) INTERNAL Page 2 of 2

t: Form W-8BEN (Rev. October 2021) Department of the Treasury Internal Revenue Serv
s: Form W-8BEN (Rev. October 2021) Department of the Treasury Internal Revenue Service Certificate of Foreign Status of Beneficial Owner for United States Tax Withholding and Reporting (Individuals) ▶ For use by individuals. Entities must use Form W-8BEN-E. ▶ Go to www.irs.gov/FormW8BEN for instructions and the latest information. ▶ Give this form to the withholding agent or payer. Do not send to the IRS. OMB No. 1545-1621 Do NOT use this form if: Instead, use Form: • You are NOT an individual . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . W-8BEN-E • You are a U.S. citizen or other U.S. person, including a resident alien individual . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . W-9 • You are a beneficial owner claiming that income is effectively connected with the conduct of trade or business within the United States (other than personal services) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . W-8ECI • You are a beneficial owner who is receiving compensation for personal services performed in the United States . . . . . . . 8233 or W-4 • You are a person acting as an intermediary . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . W-8IMY Note: If you are resident in a FATCA partner jurisdiction (that is, a Model 1 IGA jurisdiction with reciprocity), certain tax account information may be provided to your jurisdiction of residence. Part I Identification of Beneficial Owner (see instructions) 1 Name of individual who is the beneficial owner 2 Country of citizenship 3 Permanent residence address (street, apt. or suite no., or rural route). Do not use a P.O. box or in-care-of address. City or town, state or province. Include postal code where appropriate. Country 4 Mailing address (if different from above) City or town, state or province. Include postal code where appropriate. Country 5 U.S. taxpayer identification number (SSN or ITIN), if required (see instructions) 6a Foreign tax identifying number (see instructions) 6b Check if FTIN not legally required . . . . . . . . . . . 7 Reference number(s) (see instructions) 8 Date of birth (MM-DD-YYYY) (see instructions) Part II Claim of Tax Treaty Benefits (for chapter 3 purposes only) (see instructions) 9 I certify that the beneficial owner is a resident of within the meaning of the income tax treaty between the United States and that country. 10 Special rates and conditions (if applicable—see instructions): The beneficial owner is claiming the provisions of Article and paragraph of the treaty identified on line 9 above to claim a % rate of withholding on (specify type of income): . Explain the additional conditions in the Article and paragraph the beneficial owner meets to be eligible for the rate of withholding: Part III Certification Under penalties of perjury, I declare that I have examined the information on this form and to the best of my knowledge and belief it is true, correct, and complete. I further certify under penalties of perjury that: • I am the individual that is the beneficial owner (or am authorized to sign for the individual that is the beneficial owner) of all the income or proceeds to which this form relates or am using this form to document myself for chapter 4 purposes; • The person named on line 1 of this form is not a U.S. person; • This form relates to: (a) income not effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business in the United States; (b) income effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business in the United States but is not subject to tax under an applicable income tax treaty; (c) the partner’s share of a partnership’s effectively connected taxable income; or (d) the partner’s amount realized from the transfer of a partnership interest subject to withholding under section 1446(f); • The person named on line 1 of this form is a resident of the treaty country listed on line 9 of the form (if any) within the meaning of the income tax treaty between the United States and that country; and • For broker transactions or barter exchanges, the beneficial owner is an exempt foreign person as defined in the instructions. Furthermore, I authorize this form to be provided to any withholding agent that has control, receipt, or custody of the income of which I am the beneficial owner or any withholding agent that can disburse or make payments of the income of which I am the beneficial owner. I agree that I will submit a new form within 30 days if any certification made on this form becomes incorrect. Sign Here I certify that I have the capacity to sign for the person identified on line 1 of this form. ▲ Signature of beneficial owner (or individual authorized to sign for beneficial owner) Date (MM-DD-YYYY) Print name of signer For Paperwork Reduction Act Notice, see separate instructions. Cat. No. 25047Z Form W-8BEN (Rev. 10-2021)

t: Policy no. 保單編號 Manulife Investment Solutions/ Manulife Investment Plus China Ma
s: Policy no. 保單編號 Manulife Investment Solutions/ Manulife Investment Plus China Market Investment Choices Application Form 宏利智富錦囊／ 宏利投資計劃中國市場投資選項申請表格 Branch code 分行編號： Branch name/Location分行名稱／地點： TR/Insurance Advisor code 業務代表/保險顧問編號： TR/Insurance Advisor’s name 業務代表/保險顧問姓名： Contact no. 聯絡電話： (Only applicable to Insurance Advisor 只適用於保險顧問) This Manulife Investment Solutions / Manulife Investment Plus China Market Investment Choices Application Form (the “CMIC Form”) is only for application to the Manulife Inv China A Fund and/or Manulife Inv China Bond Fund (the “China Market Investment Choices”). For new Policyowner(s), it is required to be submitted together with Manulife Investment Plus Application Form and is construed as one document. For existing Policyowner(s), it is required to be submitted together with Investment Choice Services Form and is construed as one document. 宏利智富錦囊／ 宏利投資計劃中國市場投資選項申請表格〔“CMIC 表格”〕只供客戶於宏利智富中國A股基金及／或宏利智富中國債券基金（「中國市場投資選項」）作申請之用。對於新保單持有人，CMIC 表格需連同 宏利投資計劃投保申請書一併遞交，並應將投保申請書及CMIC 表格理解為同一份文件。對於現有保單持有人，CMIC 表格需連同投資選項服務申請表一併遞交，並應將投資選項服務申請表及 CMIC 表格理解為同一份文件。 PART I: PERSONAL DETAILS 第一部份：個人資料 Full name of First Policyowner 第一保單持有人姓名 Full name of Second Policyowner 第二保單持有人姓名 Surname 姓 Given name 名 Surname 姓 Given name 名 Mainland China Persons are restricted from applying for any notional units of the China Market Investment Choices, or being Policyowners or life insured of a Policy that holds any notional units of the China Market Investment Choices. 中國內地人士不得申請任何中國市場投資選項之名義單位，亦不得成為持有任何中國市場投資選項之名義單位的保單持有人或受保人。 Definition of Mainland China Person 中國內地人士的定義 (i) Chinese citizens resident in the People's Republic of China (excluding Hong Kong, Macau and Taiwan) (the "Mainland China"); 居於中華人民共和國（不包括香港、澳門及台灣）（「中國內地」） 的中國公民； (ii) Chinese citizens resident outside the Mainland China who are not permanent residents of another country or Hong Kong, Macau or Taiwan; or 居於中國境外但並非其他國家，或香港、澳 門或台灣永久居民的中國公民；或 (iii) any legal person, corporation, partnership, or other entity registered, incorporated or established in the Mainland China. 於中國內地登記、註冊成立或成立的任何法人、公司、合夥企業 或其他實體。  I/we, the Policyowner and proposed life insured, or the Policyowner and life insured am/are not Mainland China Person(s), and am/are enclosing a copy of my/our non-Mainland China identity/incorporation certificate. 本人／吾等（保單持有人及擬受保人、或保單持有人及受保人）並非中國內地人士，現夾附本人／吾等的非中國內地身份證明文件／公司註冊證書副本。  I/we, the policyowner and proposed life insured, or the Policyowner and life insured, am/are not Mainland China Person(s) and am/are citizens of Mainland China (excluding Hong Kong, Macau and Taiwan), but am/are residing outside of the Mainland China with permanent residency in the jurisdiction as specified below, and am/are enclosing a copy of my/our identity and/or proof of permanent residency. 本人／吾等（保單持有人及擬受保人、或保單持有人及受保人）並非中國內地人士及為中國公民（不包括香港、澳門及台灣），但居於中國境 外，並為以下司法管轄區的永久居民，現夾附本人／吾等的身份證明文件及／或永久居民身份證明文件副本。 Others 其他 (please specify 請註明) PART II: IMPORTANT NOTES TO APPLICANTS/POLICYOWNERS 第二部份：申請人／保單持有人的重要事項 1. To comply with the regulatory requirements, please complete and return the Financial Needs Analysis, Risk Profile Questionnaire, Important Facts Statement and Applicant’s Declarations for single subsequent subscription, regular/ increase of existing regular subscription amount. 為遵守監管機構要求，如申請單次增加認購／定期認購／增加現有定期認購金額均須提交巳 填妥的理財需要分析、風險承擔能力問卷、重要資料聲明書及投保人聲明書。 2. Cheques must be issued by banks in Hong Kong and bank drafts must be drawn in Hong Kong. The Company will reject application requests with cheques/bank drafts issued/drawn out of Hong Kong. 支票必須由香港的銀行開出，而銀行匯票必須於香港開出。本公司將拒絕受理以非香港銀行開出的支票／非香港開出的銀行匯票提交之申請。 3. Cheques/bank drafts for application for any of the above Investment Choices should be separated from that for other Investment Choices, otherwise the application will be rejected. 任何上 述投資選項的支票／銀行匯票應與認購其他投資選項的款項分開，否則本公司將拒絕受理有關申請。 4. Payment transfer from an existing policy under Manulife or existing account of Manulife Global Fund, or switching out amount from any existing Investment Choices under Manulife Investment Solutions / Manulife Investment Plus will not be accepted as an application for the selected China Market Investment Choices. 本公司恕不接受從現有宏利保單或現有宏利環球 基金賬戶之調動款項，或從宏利智富錦囊／宏利投資計劃任何現有投資選項轉出的資金，作為所選擇的中國市場投資選項的申請款項。 5. The minimum premium amount is US$1,500 per Investment Choice, and US$6,000 per Policy. Please make cheque/bank draft payable to "Manulife (International) Limited”. The Company may reject an application if the premium amount per Investment Choice is less than the minimum premium amount. 每項投資選項之最低保費金額為1,500美元，每份保單之最低保費金額 為6,000美元。支票／銀行匯票抬頭人請寫「宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司」。如每項投資選項的保費金額少於最低保費金額，本公司可能拒絕有關申請。 6. Applications should be accompanied by cleared funds. The Company may not be able to execute any of the application requests until it has verified that such premium payment is in cleared fund and all required information along with the complete application is received. In the case that the verification fails or any required information is missing/incomplete in the application, such application is deemed invalid and will be rejected. Should the applicant re-submit any information or premium payment, the Company will only process the application after all required information is provided and any such re-submission is verified in cleared fund. If the quota imposed on any of the selected China Market Investment Choices is exhausted before all required information is received and the premium payment is verified as cleared fund by the Company, such application requests will not be entitled to any allocation. 申請時須附奉已結算 妥當的款項。本公司在確認有關款項已結算妥當及所有申請所需資料已完全收到前，或未能受理保單持有人提出的任何申請。倘若本公司未能成功確認有關款項或任何此申請所需資料有 所欠缺，有關申請將視作無效及被拒受理。如果申請人決定重新提交資料或款項，本公司只會在確認有關新交款項已結算妥當及所有申請所需資料已完全收到後，方會處理申請。保單持有 人謹請注意，倘所選擇的中國市場投資選項之配額在本公司確認有關款項結算妥當及所有申請所需資料已完全收到前已用盡，有關申請不會獲得任何分配。 7. The Company will not accept cancellation of application once the application is submitted to the Company. 申請遞交後，本公司將不接受取消申請。 8. A quota is imposed on the underlying fund of the se

t: Common Reporting Standard (“CRS”) Defined Terms Extracted from The Tax Informati
s: Common Reporting Standard (“CRS”) Defined Terms Extracted from The Tax Information Authority (International Tax Compliance) (Common Reporting Standard) Regulations 2015 of the Cayman Islands. A. Reporting Financial Institution 1. The term “Reporting Financial Institution” means any Participating Jurisdiction Financial Reporting Financial Institution that is not a Non- Reporting Financial Institution. 2. The term “Participating Jurisdiction Financial Institution” means (i) any Financial Institution that is resident in a Participating Jurisdiction, but excludes any branch of that Financial Institution that is located outside such Participating Jurisdiction, and (ii) any branch of a Financial Institution that is not resident in a Participating Jurisdiction, if that branch is located in such Participating Jurisdiction. 3. The term “Financial Institution” means a Custodial Institution, a Depository Institution, an Investment Entity, or a Specified Insurance Company. 4. The term “Custodial Institution” means any Entity that holds, as a substantial portion of its business, Financial Assets for the account of others. An Entity holds Financial Assets for the account of others as a substantial portion of its business if the Entity’s gross income attributable to the holding of Financial Assets and related financial services equals or exceeds 20% of the Entity’s gross income during the shorter of: (i) the three-year period that ends on 31 December (or the final day of a non-calendar year accounting period) prior to the year in which the determination is being made; or (ii) the period during which the Entity has been in existence. 5. The term “Depository Institution” means any Entity that accepts deposits in the ordinary course of a banking or similar business. 6. The term “Investment Entity” means any Entity: a) that primarily conducts as a business one or more of the following activities or operations for or on behalf of a customer: i) trading in money market instruments (cheques, bills, certificates of deposit, derivatives, etc.); foreign exchange; exchange, interest rate and index instruments; transferable securities; or commodity futures trading; ii) individual and collective portfolio management; or iii) otherwise investing, administering, or managing Financial Assets or money on behalf of other persons; or b) the gross income of which is primarily attributable to investing, reinvesting, or trading in Financial Assets, if the Entity is managed by another Entity that is a Depository Institution, a Custodial Institution, a Specified Insurance Company, or an Investment Entity described in subparagraph A(6)(a). An Entity is treated as primarily conducting as a business one or more of the activities described in subparagraph A(6)(a), or an Entity’s gross income is primarily attributable to investing, reinvesting, or trading in Financial Assets for purposes of subparagraph A(6)(b), if the Entity’s gross income attributable to the relevant activities equals or exceeds 50% of the Entity’s gross income during the shorter of: (i) the three-year period ending on 31 December of the year preceding the year in which the determination is made; or (ii) the period during which the Entity has been in existence. The term “Investment Entity” does not include an Entity that is an Active NFE because it meets any of the criteria in subparagraphs D(9)(d) through (g). This paragraph shall be interpreted in a manner consistent with similar language set forth in the definition of “financial institution” in the Financial Action Task Force Recommendations. 1 CRS Defined Terms (Dec 2015) 7. The term “Financial Asset” includes a security (for example, a share of stock in a corporation; partnership or beneficial ownership interest in a widely held or publicly traded partnership or trust; note, bond, debenture, or other evidence of indebtedness), partnership interest, commodity, swap (for example, interest rate swaps, currency swaps, basis swaps, interest rate caps, interest rate floors, commodity swaps, equity swaps, equity index swaps, and similar agreements), Insurance Contract or Annuity Contract, or any interest (including a futures or forward contract or option) in a security, partnership interest, commodity, swap, Insurance Contract, or Annuity Contract. The term “Financial Asset” does not include a non-debt, direct interest in real property. 8. The term “Specified Insurance Company” means any Entity that is an insurance company (or the holding company of an insurance company) that issues, or is obligated to make payments with respect to, a Cash Value Insurance Contract or an Annuity Contract. B. Non-Reporting Financial Institution 1. The term “Non-Reporting Financial Institution” means any Financial Institution that is: a) a Governmental Entity, International Organisation or Central Bank, other than with respect to a payment that is derived from an obligation held in connection with a commercial financial activity of a type engaged in by a Specified Insurance Company, Custodial Institution, or Depository Institution; b) a Broad Participation Retirement Fund; a Narrow Participation Retirement Fund; a Pension Fund of a Governmental Entity, International Organisation or Central Bank; or a Qualified Credit Card Issuer; c) any other Entity that presents a low risk of being used to evade tax, has substantially similar characteristics to any of the Entities described in subparagraphs B(1)(a) and (b), and is defined in domestic law as a Non-Reporting Financial Institution, provided that the status of such Entity as a Non-Reporting Financial Institution does not frustrate the purposes of the Common Reporting Standard; d) an Exempt Collective Investment Vehicle; or e) a trust to the extent that the trustee of the trust is a Reporting Financial Institution and reports all information required to be reported pursuant to Section I with respect to all Reportable Accounts of the trust. 2. (2) The minimum transfer % in any fund must be in whole number and not less than 5%. (3) Some of the funds are for HKD Policy only. (4) If the transfer involved any equity fund, all withdrawals from and transfers to the equity fund will be made on the rst valuation date coincides with or immediately follows the date on which the Pension Operations receives this Form. Please note that if the following situations happened, the request may be delayed. • No active member account in the related currency policy which the account creation is required and the request will handle a er that. • The account status is “Retired-FOD” which the account reactivation is required and the request will handle a er that. (5) If the request involved fund transfer and change of currency at the same time, such request could only process the fund transfer from one fund to another one single fund. The request will be rejected if the fund transfer from one fund to multiple funds Please refer to below example for reference. 注意事項： (1) 如須作出任何刪改，請在刪改之位置旁簽署。 (2) 每項基金之調配百分比最少為百分之五及為整數。 (3) 部分基金只適用於港元保單。 (4) 如基金之調配或提取指示涉及股票基金，有關指示將於公積金營運部接獲本 表格當日或隨後之交易日生效。如遇下列情況，有關指示將延遲處理。 • 沒有相關貨幣保單的成員帳戶，需先處理開設帳戶，有關指示將於開設帳戶 後處理。 • 相關成員帳戶處於“退休-積存”狀態，需先更新帳戶狀態，有關指示將於更新 帳戶狀態後處理。 (5) 如指示涉及調配基金同時更改貨幣單位，則有關指示只能處理由單一基金調 配至另一單一基金。如調配基金由單一基金調配至多於一隻基金，有關指示將 被拒絕。請參閱以下例子。 Example 例子 From Fund 現存基金 To Fund 轉投基金 Transfer % (min. 5%) 調配百分比（最少5%） Accept / Reject 接受 / 拒絕 Example 1 例子一 SHK065 SUS068 SUS071 50 50 REJECT 拒絕 Example 2 例子二 SHK065 SUS075 80 ACCEPT 接受 1. t: 3. 資料更改之具報 • 個人帳戶持有人登入保險中介一站通後，可點擊「資料更改之具報」以開始更改資 料的程序。 • 剔選需要更改之資料，並輸入新資料及生效日期。
f: 持牌保險中介人資料更改之具報N3.pdf
s: 3. 資料更改之具報 • 個人帳戶持有人登入保險中介一站通後，可點擊「資料更改之具報」以開始更改資 料的程序。 • 剔選需要更改之資料，並輸入新資料及生效日期。 10 • 如更改姓名，請提供新的身份證明文件副本（如香港身份證）及改名契副本，以支 持此項更改。 • 個人持牌人確認所有資料為真實及準確後，可點擊「提交」的按鈕，遞交予保監局 處理。 • 一次性密碼會以短訊形式傳送到個人持牌人已登記的手機電話號碼，他/她須在五 分鐘內輸入該一次性密碼。假如帳戶持有人未能接收該一次性密碼，他/她可點擊 「重新發送」按鈕，以取得一個新的一次性密碼。 • 一般來說，如具報於中午十二時前提交，而更改的項目不需要附加證明文件，有關 紀錄將於一日後更新。 • 請注意，當有其他資料具報已遞交至保監局而仍在處理中時，「資料更改之具報」 功能會暫時不能被使用。 ------------------------------------------------完------------------------------------------------ 11

s: To： 致 Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited and Manulife (International) Limited (collectively “Manulife”) 宏利公積金信託有限公司及宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（統稱「宏利」） Subject： MPF e-services of ec-Work Mobile App 主題 易做好手機應用程式之強積金電子化服務 Scheme 計劃： Manulife Global Select (MPF) Scheme 宏利環球精選（強積金）計劃 Employer (Company) Name 僱主（公司）名稱： Sub-Scheme No. (if any) 附屬計劃編號（如有）： I/We hereby register with Manulife for the use of the MPF e-services of the ec-Work Mobile App. I/We will be submitting our employees’ enrolment information including enrolment forms through the ec-Work Mobile App. I/We agree to be bound by the terms (including the declaration given by me/us) of the enrolment forms as if the enrolment forms are duly signed by the employer’s authorized signatory and affixed with our company chop. I/We therefore instruct Manulife to accept such enrolment forms. 本人／吾等謹此向宏利登記使用易做好手機應用程式之強積金電子化服務。本人／吾等將透過易做 好手機應用程式遞交僱員的參加資料包括參加表格。本人／吾等同意受參加表格上的條款（包括本 人／吾等作出的聲明）約束，如同參加表格已獲僱主授權人士簽署妥當並蓋上公司印章，因此本人 ／吾等指示宏利接受該等參加表格。 Company Chop 公司印章 Employer’s Authorized Signature 僱主授權人士簽署 Name and Title (in Block Letters) 姓名及職銜（正楷） Date 日期 Note: The use of the MPF e-Services requires the support from Manulife to make necessary arrangement to accept the enrolment information/forms submitted electronically and Manulife may, at its discretion, suspend or discontinue such support at any time. In this circumstance, the employer/company should submit the enrolment information/forms using other means/channels provided by Manulife. 注意：使用強積金電子化服務需要宏利的支援，作出必需的安排以接受經由電子途徑遞交的參加資料／表格， 而宏利可隨時按其酌情權暫停或終止該支援。在此情況下，僱主／公司應採用宏利提供的其他方式／ 途徑遞交參加資料／表格。 042018

s: 委任主事人委任持牌保險中介人 進行一個或多於一個業務系列的受規管活動之具報 根據《保險業條例》(第41章) 第 64Q 條作出 C 核對 SA 更新 供有關部門使用 LN 核實 請以正楷填寫所有項目。所有修改均須由有關人士簽署確認並須提交已簽署的正本。 I. 持牌保險中介人資料 保險中介人牌照號碼 名稱 † 牌照類別 ☐ 保險代理機構 ☐ 個人保險代理 ☐ 業務代表 (代理人) ☐ 業務代表 (經紀) 表格 N2 II. 持牌保險中介人的委任主事人及其將會獲委任進行的業務系列詳情 委任主事人名稱 你是否持牌保險中介人的 現有委任主事人? 指定持牌保險中介人將會為委任 主事人進行的所有業務系列* 指定持牌保險介人將會 為委任主事人進行所有 業務系列的日期# ☐ 是☐ 否 ☐ 是☐ 否 ☐ 是☐ 否 ☐ 是☐ 否 * 請列明持牌保險中介人，以委任主事人的代理身份，將會進行的業務系列的數字代號。 1. 一般業務 2. 不包括相連長期業務的長期業務 3. 包括相連長期業務的長期業務 4. 一般業務及不包括相連長期業務的長期業務 5. 一般業務及包括相連長期業務的長期業務 6. 有限制旅保業務 # 委任主事人必須在作出委任最少14日前，向保險業監管局 (「保監局」)具報作出委任持牌保險中介人進行保險業務系的意向。 若中介人的詳情（例如業務地址、電話號碼或電子郵件地址等）有任何改變，中介人應在發生改變的14日內向保監局遞交已填妥 的表格N3(適用於個人)或N4(適用於商業實體)，以具報該項改變 。 † 請剔選適當的方格。 版本：2020 年 12 月 1 III. 持牌保險中介人的聲明 表格 N2 本人 / 我們， 持牌保險中介人的名稱 ，謹此聲明及確認：  本人 / 我們同意或繼續獲委任，以委任主事人的代理身份，進行於上文第II部分所列明的業務系列。  本人 / 我們已獲得本人 / 我們的現有委任主事人 (如有) 的同意，讓本人 / 我們獲委任或繼續獲委任，以委任主事人的代理身 份，進行於上文第II部分所列明的業務系列。  本人 / 我們明白，保監局可作出其認為適當的查詢及尋求其認為適當的進一步資料或文件。  本人 / 我們已細閱、明白並同意隨附的《收集個人資料聲明》。 ________________________________________________ 持牌保險中介人簽名 (持牌保險代理機構須提供公司印鑑) _________________________________ 日期 IV. 現有委任主事人的聲明 (如適用) 持牌保險中介人的所有現有委任主事人 (如有) 必須填寫本聲明。 我們謹此確認：  我們同意持牌保險中介人，以委任主事人的代理身份，獲委任或繼續獲委任進行上文第II部分所列明的業務系列。  於本具報內提交的所有資料均屬完整、真實及準確。  我們明白，保監局可就本具報作出其認為適當的查詢及尋求其認為適當的進一步資料或文件。 現有委任主事人1 參考號碼* 獲授權人士的姓名及職位 獲授權簽名** 聯絡人資料 現有委任主事人2 參考號碼* 獲授權人士的姓名及職位 獲授權簽名** (公司印鑑) 電郵地址 電話號碼 V. 新委任主事人的聲明 (如適用) 持牌保險中介人的所有新委任主事人 (如有) 必須填寫本聲明。 我們謹此確認：  我們將於上文第II部分所指定的日期委任持牌保險中介人，以委任主事人的代理身份，進行業務系列的受規管活動。  我們明白及接受，持牌保險中介人獲上文第IV部分所列明的現有委任主事人委任，以現有委任主事人的代理身份，進行受規 管活動。  我們聲明，據我們所知和所信，於本具報 (或支持本具報) 所提交的所有資料及文件均屬完整、真實及準確。  我們明白，保監局可就本具報作出其認為適當的查詢及尋求其認為適當的進一步資料或文件。  我們明白，保監局可對就本具報提供虛假或誤導的資料或遺漏具體的資料的人士採取紀律行動。  我們相信，持牌保險中介人是一名「適當人選」的人士以進行上文第II部分所列明的業務系列的受規管活動。  就有關從持牌保險中介人處收集的任何個人資料，我們將遵守《個人資料 (私隱) 條例》(第 486 章) 及由香港個人資料私隱專員 公署發出的所有相關的指引。 新委任主事人1 參考號碼* 獲授權人士的姓名及職位 獲授權簽名** 聯絡人資料 姓名 日期 職位 (公司印鑑) 電郵地址 電話號碼 版本：2020 年 12 月 3 表格 N2 新委任主事人2 參考號碼* 獲授權人士的姓名及職位 獲授權簽名** 聯絡人資料 新委任主事人3 參考號碼* 獲授權人士的姓名及職位 獲授權簽名** 聯絡人資料 姓名 姓名 日期 職位 日期 職位 (公司印鑑) 電郵地址 電話號碼 (公司印鑑) 電郵地址 電話號碼 新委任主事人4 參考號碼* 獲授權人士的姓名及職位 獲授權簽名** 聯絡人資料 姓名 日期 職位 (公司印鑑) 電郵地址 電話號碼 備註： * 參考號碼. – 就獲授權保險人而言，為公司註冊編號；就持牌保險代理機構 / 持牌保險經紀公司而言，則為保險中介人牌照號碼。 ** 就獲授權保險人而言，本具報表格須經其董事 / 負責管理中介人的管控要員 / 獲其董事局會授權的人士簽署。就持牌保險代理機構 / 持牌經紀公司而言，本具報表格須經其負責人 / 董事 / 獲其董事局會授權的人士 / 獨資經營人 / 合夥人（倘適用）簽署。 版本：2020 年 12月 4 收集個人資料聲明 為遵從《個人資料（私隱）條例》（第 486 章）（簡稱《私隱條例》）的通知規定，保險業監管局（「保監局」）制定本《收集個人資料聲明》。 本聲明載述保監局有關你個人資料（定義見《私隱條例》）的政策及常規、保監局收集和使用你個人資料的目的，以及可獲轉移你個人資料的人 士，謹請細閱。 收集目的 保監局可就下列其中一個或多個目的，使用並持有你或任何其他人士於本申請中所提供（及補充證明）的個人資料： (a) 實施及／或執行保監局依據其獲賦予的權力所制定或頒布且於相關時間生效的任何相關條例 （包括《保險業條例》（第 41 章）（簡稱《條 例》））及任何規例、規則、守則、指引及通函的規定，以及履行其作為保險業監管機構的職能，包括： (i) 依據《條例》處理你可能向保監局提出或保監局所接獲的任何申請； (ii) 依據《條例》評核你有關申請牌照或獲批准（視所屬情況而定）的適當人選資格； (iii) 依據《條例》監察你是否繼續持牌或獲批准（視所屬情況而定）的適當人選； (iv) 依據《條例》考慮你可能在其他方面與之有關的任何申請； (v) 依據《條例》於所備存的公眾登記冊中展示和發布個人資料（如適用）； (vi) 調查投訴和處理查詢； (vii) 展開法律訴訟、查察、調查，以及採取執法行動或紀律處分； (b) 在任何適當的時候，以及在香港法律允許的範圍內，配合並協助香港或香港以外任何地方的任何其他監管機構及／或執法機構； (c) 統計和研究；及／或 (d) 香港法律允許的任何其他目的。 你須按保監局的要求提供所需的個人資料，以便保監局行使其權力或履行其職能（包括處理你的申請）。若未能提供所需的個人資料，則可能導致 保監局無法行使其權力或履行其職能（包括處理你的申請），並可能影響保監局依據《條例》評核你的適當人選資格。 轉移／核對個人資料 保監局根據相關法律及規例履行職能時，可就上述目的將所持你的個人資料披露或轉移予任何第三方，包括香港的金融監管機構 包括但不限於強制 性公積金計劃管理局、證券及期貨事務監察委員會及香港金融管理局）、香港或香港以外的教育機構／考試機構（以便進行資格考核或核實學術／ 專業資格）、相關委任主事人 （獲授權保險人、持牌保險代理機構及／或持牌保險經紀公司（視所屬情況而定））、旅行代理商註冊處、香港旅遊 業議會、執法機構、法庭、審裁處及委員會，及／或（在香港法律容許及／或有所規定的情況下）依據保監局與（香港或香港以外的）監管機構或 監管／政府／司法部門之間的任何監管／監督／調查協助安排，披露或轉移予該等機構／部門或獲保監局委聘協助其履行職能的人士。 保監局亦可就對有關資料進行比較、核實及／或核對程序1的目的使用個人資料及／或將個人資料披露或轉移予上述各方。 公眾登記冊 保監局須依據《條例》或任何相關附屬法例備存公眾登記冊，當中載有與持牌保險中介人有關的指定資料。任何公眾人士均可免費查閱公眾登記 冊，以確定與其處事的人士就任何受規管活動而言是否持牌保險中介人或獲持牌保險代理機構／保險經紀公司認可的負責人員，以及確定有關人士 獲發牌照成為持牌保險中介人及／或獲核准成為負責人員的詳情。 查閱資料 根據《私隱條例》，你有權要求查閱及／或更正保監局所持你的個人資料。請填寫「查閱資料要求表格」（可於保監局網站查閱），並以郵遞方式 寄送至保監局的個人資料私隱主任（地址為香港黃竹坑香葉道41號19樓），以便處理你的要求。保監局有權就處理任何有關要求收取合理的費 用。 查詢 任何有關保監局收集、使用或轉移個人資料的查詢，或有關查閱及／或更正保監局所持你個人資料的要求，應以書面形式向以下人士提出： 個人資料私隱主任 保險業監管局 香港黃竹坑香葉道 41 號 19 樓 保監局的私隱政策可於保監局的網站查閱。 1 「核對程序 」的定義見《私隱條例》第 2 條。

t: Policy No. 保单编号： CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - CANCER 重病保障索偿表格 － 癌 症 PART II –
s: Policy No. 保单编号： CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - CANCER 重病保障索偿表格 － 癌 症 PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense 第二部分 – 本应诊医生报告必须由受保人自费聘请之合资格注册医生填写 1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份证号码 3. Age 年龄 4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 阁下是否病人之私人医生？  No 否  Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，请填写有关资料。 Period of Consultation (DD/MM/YYYY) 应诊期间（日/月/年） Past Health History 病人过往健康情况 5. a) Date on which you first attended the patient for this disease (Cancer). 首次为病人诊治是项病症（癌症）之日期。(DD日/MM月/YYYY年) b) How long had the patient been experiencing the symptoms/complaints before the first consultation? 病人在首次求诊前已患有症状／主诉多久？(DD日/MM月/YYYY年) c) Symptoms (s) / complaint(s) of the patient relating to this disease (cancer) 病人就是项病症（癌病）所出现的症状/主诉 d) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何时通知病人诊断结果？（请填写准确日期）(DD日/MM月/YYYY年) 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 请详尽填写明确诊断资料。 7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人过往曾否患有上述疾病或有关疾病？  No 否  Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 如果「有」，请填写明确诊断资料。 Name of Attended Physician(s) and /or Hospital(s) Date of Consultation (DD/MM/YYYY) 应诊医生姓名及/或医院名称 诊治日期（日/月/年） Address(es) 地址 Exact Diagnosis 明确诊断资料 8. Is there anything in the patient's family history which would have increased the risk of Cancer? 病人的家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上癌症机会的事项？ n No 否 n Yes 有 If "Yes ", give details 如果「有」，请填写有关资料。 9. Did or does the patient have any habits in relation to drinking, drug taking and smoking. 病人是否或曾有饮酒、吸毒或吸烟的习惯？ Duration 持续时间 From 从 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) To 至 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Consumption Per Day 每天用量： a) Drinking 饮酒 n No 否 n Yes是 b) Drug taking 吸毒 n No 否 n Yes是 c) Smoking 吸烟 n No 否 n Yes是 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人寿保险（国际）有限公司 C10_S (11/2025) 1 of 3 Policy No. 保单编号： 10.a) What was the site or organ involved and the precise histology of the tumor? 请填写肿瘤所处的位置或受影响的器官，和详列肿瘤的组织结构? b) What tests were performed to confirm the diagnosis? 进行了哪些测试来确认此诊断？ Date of the Test 检验日期 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Test item 检验项目 Result 结果 c) What was the staging system used? 肿瘤的分期系统? (For cancer, pleases state stage under the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC) cancer staging system; for brain tumour, please state stage under World Health Organization Classification of Tumours; for Hodgkin lymphoma or Non-Hodgkin lymphoma, please state stage under the Lugano classification; for chronic lymphocytic leukaemia, please stage the Rai stage) (如属癌症，请根据美国癌症联合委员会 (American Joint Committee on Cancer) 癌症分期系统分类列出其级别 ;如属脑肿瘤，请根据世界卫生组织肿瘤分类 (WHO Classification of Tumours）列出其级别）; 如属何杰金淋巴瘤或非何杰金淋巴瘤，请根据卢加诺分期法 (Lugano Classification）列出其级别; 如属慢性淋 巴球白血病，请列出其Rai级别 d) Based on above staging system, what is the staging of the tumour? 根据以上分期系统，该肿瘤为第几级别? e) Is the disease completely localized? 病症是否完全局部化？ f) Is there uncontrolled growth and spread of malignant cells? 癌细胞是否不受控制地生长和扩散？ g) Is there an invasion and destruction of adjacent tissue by malignant cells? 癌细胞是否侵入和破坏邻近细胞组织？ h) Are regional lymph nodes involved? 是否影响邻近淋巴结？ i) Are there distant metastases? 是否距离性转移？ n No 否 n No 否 n No 否 n No 否 n No 否 n Yes是 n Yes是 n Yes是 n Yes是 n Yes是 11. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 请提供曾为病人诊治是项病症的医生资料。 (We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available （) 敬请提供任何有关医疗报告副本） Name of Physician(s) and /or Hospital(s) 医生姓名及／或医院名称 Address(es) 地址 Date of Consultation(s) and/or Period of Confinement(s) (DD/MM/YYYY) 诊治及／或留院日期（日/月/年） 12. What kind of treatment(s) is/are the patient receiving/had the patient received? 病人正／曾接受什么治疗? Treatment 治疗 Please list out the treatment dates, period, schedule and details of treatments 请列出治疗日期、期间、时间表和治疗详情 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) n Surgery 手术 n Radiotherapy 电疗 n Chemotherapy 化疗 n Targeted therapy 标靶治疗 n Bone marrow transplant 骨髓移植 n Proton therapy 质子治疗 n Immunotherapy 免疫治疗 n Cyber knife 数码导航刀 n Gamma knife 伽玛刀 n CAR-T cell infusion 嵌合抗原受体T细胞(CAR-T) 细胞滴注 n Hyperthermia therapy 高温热疗 n Photodynamic therapy (PDT) 光动力疗法(PDT) n Stem cell therapy 干细胞治疗 n Clinical trial cancer drug treatment 临床试验癌症药物治疗* n Off-label cancer drug treatment 非适应症癌症药物治疗* n Others, please specify 其他，请注明: * Please answer question 14 if patient is receiving/had received Clinical Trial Cancer Drug Treatment and/or Off-label Cancer Treatment 如病人正／曾接受「临 床试验癌症药物治疗」及/或「非适应症癌症药物治疗」，请回答问题14 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人寿保险（国际）有限公司 C10_S (11/2025) 2 of 3 Policy No. 保单编号： 13. Is the patient receiving End-of-life Care treatment? (ie. any treatment provided in hospital or a registered hospice specifically to relieve cancer symptoms in which the cancer is progressing due to lack of treatment to cure or control the cancer) 病人是否正接受晚期护理?（即在医院或注册善终院舍接受舒缓癌症症状的 治疗，而该癌症正在恶化且未有医治或控制该癌症的治疗方法） n No 否 n Yes 是 If "Yes ", please advise details of previous treatments given, current situation, prognosis and periods that the patient receives End-of-life Care treatment 如果是，请就曾提供的治疗、现时情况、预后和病人接受晚期护理治疗的时段提供更多详情 14. If patient is receiving/had received Clinical Trial Cancer Drug Treatment and/ or Off-label Cancer Drug Treatment, please provide the following documents. 如病 人正／曾接受「临床试验癌症药物治疗」及/或「非适应症癌症药物治疗」，请提供以下文件: - Medical journal 医学文献 - Clinical practice guidelines or protocol stipulated by a medical institution 医疗机构规定的临床实践指南或方案 - Drug insert 药物说明书 15. If there is any further information which, in your opinion, will assist us in assessing this claim, please furnish such information below. 阁下认为有否其他资料可协助 本公司审核是项索偿申请？请提供有关资料。 Name of Physician (with stamp) 医生姓名（连印章） Qualification of Physician 医生资格 Address 地址 Signature 签署 Date 日期 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Tel. No. 电话号码 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人寿保险（国际）有限公司 C10_S (11/2025) 3 of 3

s: APPLICATION FOR COMPASSIONATE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM 保單恩恤援助申請書 PART I: APPLICATION FORM 第一項：申請表 1. POLICY NO. 保單號碼 *2. AMOUNT OF LOAN REQUEST 申請貸款額 Branch code 分行編號 Advisor code 保險顧問編號 Advisor’s name 保險顧問姓名 Contact no. 聯絡電話 Location 地點 3. LIFE INSURED 受保人 FULL NAME 姓名 ADDRESS 地址 CHINESE NAME 中文姓名 TEL NO. 電話號碼 4. OWNER OF THE POLICY (COMPLETE IF OTHER THAN LIFE INSURED) 保單持有人（如等同於受保人則無需填寫此欄） FULL NAME 姓名 CHINESE NAME 中文姓名 TEL NO. 電話號碼 ADDRESS 地址 5. BENEFICIARY 受益人 FULL NAME 姓名 RELATIONSHIP TO LIFE INSURED 與受保人之關係 6. PAYMENT INSTRUCTIONS 付款指示 □ Cheque Payment 以支票形式付款 Cheque Currency (a) (for USD policy only) 支票幣值 (a（) 只適用於美元保單） □ USD Cheque (drawn in Hong Kong) 美元支票（由香港的銀行付款） □ USD Cheque (drawn in United States) 美元支票（由美國的銀行付款） □ HKD Cheque (b) 港元支票 (b) Notes 註: (a) In general, it takes a longer settlement period to clear a foreign cheque in Hong Kong. Bank charges may be incurred by client for clearing the cheque. 銀行通常需要較長的結算時間於香港兌現外幣支票；另銀行或會向客戶徵收兌現支票的相關手續費。 (b) The HKD equivalent will be based on the currency exchange rate provided by the Company at the time of issue of the cheque and it can be changed from time to time. 相等之港元將會以支票發出時的貨幣兌換率計算，而宏利將不時提供有關的貨幣兌換率。 * REMARKS: THE LOAN AMOUNT IS SUBJECT TO MANULIFE FINAL APPROVAL. 注意：援助貸款額以宏利保險最後批核為準。 The Chinese version of this form is for reference only. In the event of conflicts between the Chinese and the English versions, the English version shall prevail. 此表格之中文譯本只供參考之用，若與英文有異，一概以英文為準。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C16 (11/2025) 1 of 3 Declaration and Authorization 聲明及授權 I/We hereby declare that the answers to the above questions are full and true to the best of my/our knowledge. I/We further authorize any physician, hospital, insurance company, claims investigation company, government authority or organization that has any record or knowledge of me/us, my/our health or my/our activities (including records relating to Social Welfare, Workers’ Compensation, credit, financial, earnings and employment history) to furnish to Manulife (International) Limited (“Manulife”) or its authorized representative such information including without limitation all information with respect to any illness or injury, medical history, consultation, prescription or treatment and copies of all hospital or medical records. A photostatic copy of this authorization shall be as effective and valid as the original. 本人／我們特此聲明填報於本表格內之資料已是本人／我們所知之全部並為真實無訛。本人／我們茲授權任何醫生、醫院、保險公司、賠償調查公司、政府有關部門或其他持有本人／我們個人資料、健康狀 況或記錄（包括有關本人／我們所獲之社會福利及勞工賠償、本人／我們之存款、財政狀況、入息及就業記錄）之組織可以將該等資料，包括但不限於所有有關本人／我們之疾病或受傷，傷患之病歷、診斷報 告、藥方或治療及所有醫院或醫療記錄副本等資料予宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（“宏利”）或其代理人。此授權書之複製本與正本具同等效力。 Personal Information Collection Statement 個人資料收集聲明 I/we acknowledge that the personal data provided in this Form will be used by Manulife for the purposes of processing, adjudicating and investigating claims application(s) and request(s) for credit service, approving and underwriting insurance applications, administering and reinsuring policies, complying with applicable laws and other related purposes and for such purposes, may be transferred to such persons or entities (whether within or outside Hong Kong) as: (a) any person in connection with any claims made by or against or otherwise involving customers in respect of any products and/or services; (b) any agent, contractor or third party service provider who provides administrative, telecommunications, computer, information technology, payment, data processing or storage, marketing, mailing, printing, telemarketing, customer satisfaction analysis, or other services to Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies in connection with the operation of business, including any custodian, administrator, investment manager, investment advisor or distributor; (c) any credit reference agencies or, in the event of default, any debt collection agencies; (d) any advisor (including his or her employees) or other intermediary (including their employees); (e) reinsurers and medical service providers; (f) employers of the customers; (g) any person which has undertaken to Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies to keep such data confidential; (h) any actual or proposed assignee, transferee, participant or sub-participant of the rights or business of Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies ; (i) any member of Manulife's group of companies; (j) any person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies is under an obligation or otherwise required to make disclosure under the requirements of any law, rules, regulations, codes of practice, guidelines or guidances binding on or applicable to Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies including but not limited to any local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or industry recognised bodies; (k) any person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies is under an obligation or otherwise required to make disclosure pursuant to any contractual or other commitment or arrangement with local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or industry recognised bodies (whether within or outside Hong Kong) that is assumed by or imposed on Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies by reason of its financial, commercial, business or other interests or activities in or related to the jurisdiction of the relevant local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, industry recognised bodies. I/we understand that I/we am/are not obliged to provide such personal data as requested but if I/we refuse to provide such data, Manulife may not be able to proceed further on my/our application(s) and/or request(s) in this Form. I/we may request access to and correction of my/our personal data held by Manulife, by writing to Privacy Officer at Manulife (International) Limited, 22/F., Tower A, Manulife Financial Centre, 223-231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong. 本人／我們確認載於本表格內之個人資料將被宏利用以處理、判定及調查有關之索償及代繳費用服務申請，批核及承保保險申請，管理保單並安排

t: Policy No. 保單編號： CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - TOTAL AND PERMANENT DISABILITY 重
s: Policy No. 保單編號： CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - TOTAL AND PERMANENT DISABILITY 重病保障索償表格 - 完全及永久傷殘 PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense 第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫 1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份證號碼 3. Age 年齡 4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？  No 否  Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。 Period of Consultation (DD/MM/YYYY) 應診期間(日/月/年) Past Health History 病人過往健康情況 5. a) Date on which you first attended the patient for this disease (Total and Permanent Disability). 首次為病人診治是項病症（完全及永久傷殘）之日期。 b) What was the symptom(s) experienced prior to the first consultation? 病人首次求診前有何症狀？ c) How long had the patient been experiencing the symptom(s) before the first consultation? 病人在首次求診前已患有症狀多久? d) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果？（請填寫準確日期） 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. What kind(s) of disability do(es) the patient suffer from? 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。病人患有哪種傷殘？ 7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？  No 否  Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫確實診斷資料。 Name of Attended Physician(s) and /or Hospital(s) Date of Consultation (DD/MM/YYYY) 應診醫生姓名及/或醫院名稱 診治日期(日/月/年) Address(es) 地址 Exact Diagnosis 確實診斷資料 8. Is there anything in the patient's family history which would have increased the risk of Total and Permanent Disability? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上完全及永久傷殘機會之事項？ 9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C22 (11/2025) 1 of 2 Policy No. 保單編號： 10. Which of the following daily activities and the period is he/she NOT able to perform as a result of the disability? If the activity can be performed by using special equipment, then he/she is considered able to perform that activity. 他/她因殘疾而無法進行哪些日常生活之活動以及相關的時段? 若相關的日常生活之活動可通過使用特殊設 備進行仍可視為他/她能夠進行該活動。 If NOT able to perform below daily activities as a result of the disability, please tick below box(es) 如因殘疾而無法進行下列日常生活之活動, 請於以下的方格內填上“✓” 號 Period not able to perform as a result of the disability 因殘疾而無法進行此活動的時段 (DD日/MM月/YY年)  A) Washing - the ability to wash in the bath or shower (including getting into and out of the bath or shower) or wash satisfactorily by other means. 沐浴 － 浸浴或淋浴方式自我清洗（包括能進入及離開 浴缸或淋浴間）或以其他方式達到滿意自我清洗的能力。  B) Dressing - the ability to put on, take off, secure and unfasten all garments and, as appropriate, any braces, artificial limbs or other surgical appliances. 更衣 － 穿戴並固定及解開並脫下所有衣物及 任何矯正器、義肢或其他醫學用支架(視何者適用而定)的能力。  C) Transferring - the ability to move from a bed to an upright chair or wheelchair and vice versa. 行 動 － 從床移動至直立的椅子或輪椅上的能力，反之亦然。  D) Mobility - the ability to move indoors from room to room on level surfaces. 移動 － 於平坦地面之室 內由一個房間移動到另一房間的自由活動能力。  E) Toileting - the ability to use the lavatory or otherwise manage bowel and bladder functions so as to maintain a satisfactory level of personal hygiene. 如廁 － 自行如廁或能自我控制肛門及膀胱功能， 以保持合理程度之個人衛生的能力。  F) Feeding - the ability to feed oneself once food has been prepared and made available. 進食 － 自 行進食預先準備妥當及獲提供之食物的能力。 11. Is the patient suffered from total and permanent disability? If yes, how long has the patient suffered from this disability. If not, please explain. 病人是否完全及永久傷殘？如是，病人的傷殘情況已持續多久？如否，請加以說明。 12. Is the disability permanent in nature? 病人是否屬永久傷殘？ 13. In your professional opinion, is the patient unable to perform any work for remuneration or profit? If yes, please explain. 根據閣下的專業意見，病人是否無法從事任何可獲報酬或利潤之職業或工作？如是，請加以說明。 14. Please give details of radiological investigations, M.R.I., C T scan, laboratory evidence and any other test results for reference. 請提供放射檢驗、磁力共振、電腦斷層掃描、實驗室證據或其他檢驗結果的詳情以供參考。 15. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。 (We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available ) （敬請提供任何有關醫療報告副本） Name of Physician(s) and /or Hospital(s) 生姓名及／或醫院名稱 Address(es) 地址 Date of Consultation(s) and/or Period of Confinement(s) (DD/MM/YYYY) 診治及／或留院日期(日/月/年) 16. If there is any further information which, in your opinion, will assist us in assessing this claim, please furnish such information below. 閣下認為有否其他資料可協助本公司審核是項索償申請？請提供有關資料。 Name of Physician (with stamp) 醫生姓名（連印章） Qualification of Physician 醫生資格 Address 地址 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 C22 (11/2025) 2 of 2 Signature 簽署 Date 日期 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Tel. No. 電話號碼

Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？ No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。 Period of Consultation Past Health History 應診期間 病人過往健康情況 5. a) Date on which the patient first consulted you related to the condition (Heart Valve Surgery/Less Invasive Treatments of Heart Valve Disease). 病人就是項疾病（心 瓣手術/心瓣膜疾病的次級創傷性治療）首次向閣下求診的日期（DD日/ MM月/YY年）。 b) What were the symptoms? 病人之病徵？ c) How long had the patient been experiencing these symptoms before the first consultation? 病人在首次求診前已患有此病徵多久？ d) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果?（請填寫準確日期） 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。 7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？ No 否 Yes 有 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。 Name of Attended Physician(s) Date of Consultation Address(es) Exact Diagnosis 應診醫生姓名 診治日期 地址 確實診斷資料 8. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 10. Has the patient undergone surgical correction for heart valve disease? 病人有否就其心臟瓣膜疾病接受矯正手術？ Yes 有 No 沒有 If yes, the type of surgical correction performed? 如有，進行了何種矯正手術？ a) Through open-heart surgery to replace or repair heart valve defects/abnormalities 透過剖開心臟手術以置換心瓣或治療心瓣缺陷/異常 Yes 有 No 沒有 b) Through Intravascular procedures to perform percutaneous valvuloplasty, percutaneous valvotomy or percutaneous valve replacement 透過血管介入的程序進 行經皮穿刺瓣膜成形術，經皮穿刺瓣膜切除術或經皮穿刺瓣膜置換術 Yes 有 No 沒有 c) If any one of the above 2 questions is “Yes”, please specify the name of procedure done to correct the valvular problem: 如以上兩項任何一 項為 “有”, 請列出 矯正心臟瓣膜缺陷的手術程序的名稱： d) If none of the above surgeries has been done, please state what other types of surgery was performed. 如沒有進行上述手術，請列出所進行之其他矯正手術。 e) Date and place of surgery 手術日期及地點 Date of surgery 手術日期 : ( / / ) DD日/MM月/YY年 The hospital where the surgery was performed 手術醫院： Name of Surgeon 手術醫生姓名： 11. s: CLAIM FORM FOR MAJOR DISEASE - POLIOMYELITIS 重病保障索償表格 － 脊髓灰質炎（小兒麻痺症） Policy No. 保單編號： PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense 第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫 1. (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果?（請填寫準確日期） 6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。 7. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。 10. Current renal condition 現時腎病之狀況： Advanced Stage of Chronic Renal Insufficiency (Go to Question 11) 末期慢性腎功能不全（請回答第十一題。） One Kidney Surgically Removed (Go to Question 12) 完全切除一個腎臟（請回答第十二題。) Others (Go to Question 13) 其他（請回答第十三題。) 11. Mental illness (Please specify diagnosis) 患精神病 (請註明診斷) :  Schizophrenia 精神分裂症  Alzheimer’s Disease 阿爾茨海默氏病  Mixed-Type Dementia 綜合性腦痴呆症  Others: Please specify 其他: 請註明:  Delusional Disorder 妄想症  Vascular Dementia 血管型腦痴呆症  b. A state of arrested or incomplete development of mind, which amounts to a significant impairment of intelligence and social functioning, which is associated with abnormally aggressive or seriously irresponsible conduct 屬智力及社交能力的顯著減損的心智發育停頓或不完全的狀態，並有異常侵略性或 極不負責任的行為  c. Psychopathic Disorder 患精神病理障礙  d. Other disorder or disability of mind which does not amount to mental handicap 不屬弱智的任何其他精神失常或精神上無能力  Cerebral Vascular Accident / Haemorrhage (CVA) 中風 (腦血管意外 / 出血)  Acquired Brain Injury 獲得性腦損傷  A stroke causing some cognitive deficits 因中風引致認知不足  Persistent Vegetative State (PVS) 持續性植物狀態  Comatose / Semi-Comatose 昏迷 / 半昏迷  Others: Please specify 其他: 請註明:  e. 香港九龍觀塘偉業街223-231號宏利金融中心A座21樓 日期 重要事項 宏利可按於《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」）所述，處理從「付款結算書」收集的有關資料。假如您未有細閱該通知，您可從您的宏利中介人或透過宏利網址www.manulife.com.hk取得該通知。成員可以書面 向計劃管理人之個人資料主任更改及查閱其個人資料。獲授權人士的資料乃因應其職務身份而收集。 I. 填寫「付款結算書」 • 就個別支薪期，請分別遞交一份「付款結算書」。 • 請為所有僱員填報供款金額。如僱員於有關支薪期內並無「有關入息」，請於該欄填上「0」。 • 供款額應以小數點後兩位上調作匯報。 • 如填報之「總額」與各成員之供款數額總和不符，則就個別成員所填報的供款金額將被視作僱主之最後指示。 • 如需申報自願性供款，請使用「付款結算書（只供附有自願性供款安排之附屬計劃）」。 • 如以支票付款，請緊記於「付款結算書」上註明支票號碼。 II. 申報僱員終止受僱及最後供款 • 可採用「付款結算書」，為離職僱員申報離職資料及其最後供款。 • 然而，如離職僱員涉及長期服務金或遣散費之抵銷安排，則必須填妥「僱員終止受僱通知書」，由離職僱員及僱主授權人士簽署，並蓋上公司印章，將通知書正本寄回宏利處理。 • 僱主必須在非臨時僱員離職日期所屬公曆月完結後10日內，向宏利提供有關離職僱員之最後受僱日期及長期服務金或遣散費（如適用）資料。 III. 有關處理「付款結算書」的其他注意事項 • 如供款計算有誤，僱主會收到「計算差異報告」以作更正。 • 如宏利收到僱主繳交支票供款，而其不足以繳付「付款結算書」所載的全部成員供款，則宏利會以保障成員最佳利益為依歸，根據內部指引按比例分配有關供款至各成員帳戶內。 • 如僱主現金帳戶內存有款項（包括但不止於超額付款、非歸屬之自願性供款或長期服務金/遣散費之抵銷餘額等的結餘），宏利或會根據欠交供款期之先後次序，自最早之供款期起作出分配。 • 「付款結算書」只作處理強積金供款之用。如有其他事宜，例如更改附屬計劃資料等，請於網上作出更新或以指定表格通知宏利。 遞交「付款結算書」 傳真：(852) 2104 3504 或 郵寄： 使用滙豐銀行的「入票易」服務以準時存入供款。 * 如作郵遞，請夾附「付款回條」及「付款結算書」(如適用) 並註明支票號碼、預留充足的郵遞時間及貼上足額郵票。 2. 自動轉帳 * 請確保銀行戶口備有足夠款額以繳付供款。 (CQM Guide-CHI) 重要提示：按法例要求，僱主必須準時為所有有關僱員作出強積金供款。如宏利於供款日之後收到供款款項，則必須依法向強制性公積金計劃管理局（「積金局」）匯報逾期供款個案，僱主將被徵收相等於拖久供款金額5%的附加費，並可能會 遭積金局採取其他行動（例如罰款）。請注意宏利強積金中介人並非遞交強積金供款支票和「付款結算書」的正式途徑，懇請僱主直接遞交供款及有關文件予宏利。同時，僱主亦可登入僱主網頁定期檢視供款狀況及查看帳戶最新資料。 MPF RS_CHI (02/2022) 2 of 2 (僱主網上服務示範) ContX 1-pg (C) 僱主熱線 : (852) 2108 1234 節約用紙，實行強積金行政電子化 ! 大部份強積金行政程序均可透過僱主網上服務處理，立即登入您的網上帳戶，享受箇中便捷! 傳真 : (852) 2104 3504 宏利網站 : www.manulife.com.hk

(2) Return completed form to us either by fax to 2104 3504 or by mail to our address as appeared at the bottom of this form. (3) Keep an active bank account in the company's name to facilitate cheque deposit of refund (if any). (4) Authorized signature and company chop should match that in Manulife's record. (5) This form is NOT applicable for scheme termination due to Plan Transfer Out. (6) All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the “Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance” (“Notice”). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice from your Manulife's intermediary or through Manulife's website at www.manulife.com.hk. (7) By writing to the Privacy Of cer of Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, you can correct and have access to your personal data. (8) The information of the contact person(s)/authorized person(s) is collected in their of cial capacities. 注意事項 (1) 請以正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格內加 號。 (2) 請將填妥的表格傳真至2104 3504或交回於本表格底部所述之宏利通訊地址。 (3) 請保留貴司之銀行帳戶，以便貴司存入退款支票(如適用)。 (4) 僱主的獲授權人簽署及公司印章必須與宏利之記錄相符。 (5) 本表格不適用於因計劃轉移而終止之計劃。 (6) 宏利可按於《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」） 所述，處理有關資料。假如閣下未有細閱該通知，閣下可從閣下的宏利中 介人或透過宏利網址www.manulife.com.hk取得該通知。 (7) 閣下可以書面向宏利公積金信託有限公司之個人資料主任更改及查閱閣下 之個人資料。 (8) 聯絡人／獲授權人士的資料乃因應其職務身份而收集。 A. t: 請勿撕去 < FNA_CHI (05/2026) > 保單編號 （公司專用） 請以正楷填寫，並在適當的地方加上 ✓。 財務需要分析表格 重要說明 此財務需要分析
s: 請勿撕去 < FNA_CHI (05/2026) > 保單編號 （公司專用） 請以正楷填寫，並在適當的地方加上 ✓。 財務需要分析表格 重要說明 此財務需要分析為確定您的理財需要和目標。此分析是基於由申請人（保單持有人）提供的資料而進行。如有未披露任何重要事實或資料，可能 會影響您的需要評估。請定期評估您的財務需要。如對您的財務需要有任何問題，請諮詢您的理財顧問之意見。宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 （簡稱「宏利」）不保證所提供的結果的資料準確性和可靠性。 請您填寫此表格前，細閱《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」）。該通知可於宏利網址 (www.manulife.com.hk) 或向您的宏利顧問 索取。透過填妥及交回此表格，即表示您同意該通知之內容。本財務需要分析表格旨在協助尋找適合的保險產品，以滿足您就每次投保申請的 需要及情況。如您計劃提交多於一份投保申請，請就另一份申請填寫另一份財務需要分析表格以作更全面的分析。請回答本表格所述的所有問 題。請勿於未完成回答本表格的所有問題或於任何問題被刪除的情況下簽署本表格。請勿在空白的表格上簽署。如在本表格中提供的資料有任 何重大變更，請告知宏利。如果您不按照規則填寫此表格，我們可能無法處理您的申請甚或拒絕您的申請。 第一部分 — 個人資料 保單持有人姓名（如身份證明文件所示，以姓氏先排）： 第二部份 — 財務目標及需要分析 1.1 您選購保險產品的目標為？（就下列目標 A – F 您可選多於一項） 註：就保單簽發後的更改（例如萬用壽險額外供款或傳統產品之保險金額改變）而言，基於其目標為加強現有保障，因此將一併考慮額外 供款 / 保險金額改變及現有計劃的整體金額。 A) 為應付不時之需提供財務保障（例如：身故、意外、殘疾等） A1 如您需要為未來準備人壽（身故）保障，考慮到現已持有的保單後，就此次投保，您的淨人壽（身故）保障需要約為 港幣 。 B) 為未來提供定期的收入（例如：退休收入等） C) 為未來需要作儲蓄（例如：子女教育，退休等） C1 就此次投保，您期望達至約港幣 的儲蓄目標。 C2 為達至上述的儲蓄目標，您的目標儲蓄期為多久？（請只選一項） a) 1-5 年 b) 6-10 年 c) 11-15 年 d) 16-20 年 e) > 20 年 f) 終身 D) 投資 D1 為實現上述「投資」的目標，您希望如何管理保險產品下的不同投資選項（如有）？（請只選一項） i. 本人願意按個人決定（毋須獲授權保險人及 / 或持牌保險中介人提供任何專業意見的情況）選擇及管理保險產品項下的 不同投資選項（如有），並且願意在保險產品的目標利益 / 保障期的整個期間作出此決定。 ii. 本人願意按個人決定（經獲授權保險人及 / 或持牌保險中介人提供專業意見的情況）選擇及管理保險產品項下的不同投 資選項（如有），並且願意在保險產品的目標利益 / 保障期的整個期間作出此決定。 iii. 本人不願意選擇或管理保險產品項下的不同投資選項（如有）。 E) 為應付醫療保健需要（例如：危疾，住院等） E1 如您需要為未來準備危疾保障，考慮到現已持有的保單後，就此次投保，您的淨危疾保障需要約為 港幣 。 F) 其他（若有別於上述各項，請詳述： ） *OBJTFNA* *FNAVP* Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 FNA_CHI (05/2026) 第1頁/共6頁 保單編號 （公司專用） 1.2 就您對選擇保險產品的風險接受水平而言，您是否願意考慮具有非保證回報的保險產品？及若您有意考慮此類保險產品，您是否具備相 關的知識及經驗？ （注意：相關知識及經驗包括對具非保證回報的金融或保險產品的認識、曾購買或交易過具非保證回報的金融或保險產品，例如：股票、 互惠基金、外匯、債券、商品（例如黃金）、分紅保險產品、投資相連保險產品、其他投資等。） 是，我有意考慮具非保證回報的保險產品及我具有相關知識及 / 或經驗。 否，我無意考慮具非保證回報的保險產品； 或我有意考慮此類保險產品，但沒有相關知識及經驗。 如果「是」，請填寫以下問題 1.2.1 如果「否」，請轉至問題 2 1.2.1 （如問題 1.2 的答案為是）您是否接受在保險產品的有關 / 相關投資中，非固定收入資產組成比例可能超過 50% ？（注意：非固定收 入資產通常預期比固定收入資產波動性更高。） 是 否 2. 您投購保單的目標利益 / 保障年期為多久？（請只選一項）（如在問題 1 只選擇了選項 C，可跳過此問題） a) 1-5 年 b) 6-10 年 c) 11-15 年 d) 16-20 年 e) > 20 年 f) 終身 第三部份 — 財務負擔能力及評估 3. 您繳付保費的能力及意願： 可動用收入 3.1 在過去兩年內，計入所有收入來源（包括流動資產的收入），您的每月平均收入不少於 港幣 。 3.2 在過去兩年內，您的每月平均開支不多於港幣 。 註：每月開支包括所有財務支出，家庭開支（如每月基本生活費，房租 / 按揭還款，子女教育開支等）及保費（包括您持有的所有保 單）。 3.3.1 就您於宏利此次的投保（包括您正在投保的所有宏利保單），在整個保單期內，您能夠及願意以 每月可動用收入繳付保費。 註：每月可動用收入 = 每月平均收入（問題 3.1）– 每月平均開支（問題 3.2） 3.3.2 請註明您的資金來源（可選多於一項）： a) 薪金、花紅 b) 家用 f) 業務收入 g) 投資收入 c) 退休金 d) 佣金 h) 其他（請註明： e) 租金收入 %（百分比）的 ） 本人（保險顧問）確認上述產品建議表中所顯示的保險產品建議是基於本人對申請人需求和情況的評估（根據申請人在本次財務需求分析中 提供的資料）作出， 並考慮了相關因素， 包括申請人的年齡、 任何現有的有效保單記錄及以下所指明的原因（如有）。 1) 附加保障的保障年期與目標年期不同，因申請人已考慮了其理財目標、全面保障的需要、各需要的優先重要性及財務預算而作 出，申請人期望以上各方面取得平衡。 2) 此建議保障額低於申請人的全面保障需要，因為申請人有其他更優先之財務目標。 3) 此建議的儲蓄金額低於申請人的儲存目標，因為申請人有其他更優先之財務目標。 4) 申請人明白投資相連壽險保單 (ILAS) 的身故賠償金額取決於他 / 她所選擇的投資選項之相關基金表現以及相關的收費，因此可能 與他 / 她的目標身故保障額有所不同甚或遠低於其目標保障額。基於申請人優先考慮投資偏好，即使人壽保障額與目標保障額不 同仍決定作出此申請。 5) 保險顧問已向申請人解釋而且申請人明白所建議的分紅產品為滿足申請人的投資目標之投資相連壽險 (ILAS) 產品以外的另一選 擇，而該分紅產品的保費支付期較他 / 她所選擇的目標保費支付期長。保險顧問已披露當中的分別，並解釋由於宏利現時沒有任 何分紅產品能同時滿足申請人的投資偏好以及目標保費支付期，此分紅產品已為最接近的另一選擇。申請人明白該等分別，並 考慮到他 / 她自身需要及情況而決定作出此申請。 6) 由於申請人表示若所建議及選購之保險產品可使用保費融資，申請人有意使用保費融資作為是次擬購買保單的資金，顧問已向 申請人展示《重要資料聲明書 - 保費融資》及詳盡解釋了《重要資料聲明書 - 保費融資》內所包含的重要說明及影響，包括對申請人 的影響及相關風險。申請人亦確認了解他 / 她對償還貸款及任何相關利息的義務並同意他 / 她如繼續保費融資申請時應預留資金 以償還該等款項。 7) 保險顧問已向申請人解釋而且申請人明白所介紹的投資相連壽險 (ILAS) 產品在受保人年滿 65 歲的保單年度之後，將不再提供高 額人壽保障（即身故賠償最少為應繳總定期保費的 150%），而應付身故賠償金額可能會大幅減少。然而，即使 (i) 高額人壽保障並 非在整個保單年期內提供，而是只在受保人年滿 65 歲的保單年度或之前提供，及 (ii) 此投資相連壽險 (ILAS) 產品所提供的高額 人壽保障的實際年期可能未達到申請人就高額人壽保障的目標保障年期，但申請人仍因考慮到他 / 她自身需要及情況而決定作出 此申請。 8) 其他（請詳述）： 警告： 請小心細閱及填寫本財務需要分析表格。請不要留空任何問題。如有任何未回答的問題未被刪去，請不要在表格上簽署。 註：若財務需要分析表格上填報的資料有重大改變，您在保單未簽發前，必須通知本公司。 請勿撕去 < FNA_CHI (05/2026) > *OBJTFNA* *FNAVP* Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 FNA_CHI OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE 原有保障保單編號 EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE 原有保障生效日 PLAN NAME OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE 原有保障計劃名稱 CUSTOMER’S DECLARATION 客戶聲明 Every reference in this declaration to: 於本聲明內提及的: • “Original Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that is being exercised. 「原有保障」指提供有關之備用保障權益之保障。 • “New Coverage” means the coverage issued under the exercise of the Cover-Me-Again option. 「新保障」指根據行使有關之備用保障權益所發出之保障。 I, being the policyowner of the New Coverage, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following: 本人﹝新保障之保單持有人﹞謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列條款： PARTICULARS 詳情 In consideration for the exercise of Cover-Me-Again option, the Provision of the New Coverage shall be issued with the following amendments: 當行使有關之備用保障權益時，新保障的條款將加入以下修訂： • No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness, Juvenile Disease, Angioplasty Procedure or Gender Specific Illness which existed or the cause or signs or symptoms of which existed before the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. 本公司不會就新保障的簽發日或保單生效日前（以較後者為準）已經存在的任何危疾、兒童疾病、血管成形術及相關治療，或 男性及女性疾病，或引致有關危疾、兒童疾病、血管成形術及相關治療，或男性及女性疾病的已存在成因、症狀或病徵支付在 生利益賠償。 • No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness, Juvenile Disease, Angioplasty Procedure or Gender Specific Illness claimed under the Original Coverage and related illnesses determined by the Company. 本公司不會就任何曾於原有保障提出索償的危疾、兒童疾病、血管成形術及相關治療，或男性及女性疾病及本公司釐定的相關 疾病支付在生利益賠償。 • The claim amount payable for Death Benefit under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the date of death is within the first 12 months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Death Benefit, the New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no further benefit payable by the Company. 如受保人在新保障的簽發日或保單生效日後（以較後者為準）的首 12 個月內身故，本公司將賠償身故賠償額的 50%。本公司給 予身故賠償後，在不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司亦不會再作出任何賠償。 *OBJTSFORM856* *OBJTSFORM856* The Chinese version of this application is for reference only. t: Universal Life Pre-Underwriting Assessment form 萬用壽險初步核保評估表 The purpose of this
s: Universal Life Pre-Underwriting Assessment form 萬用壽險初步核保評估表 The purpose of this form is to provide the Universal Life underwriter with enough information to help determine the insurability of the proposed life insured, potential coverage amount and any underwriting requirements in addition to the routine requirements. 此評估表用以提供萬用壽險核保員足夠資料決定一般要求以外擬受保人的受保資格、可購保額及額外的核保要求。 The information collected in this form is for the purpose of processing pre-underwriting enquiries. Any information provided to Manulife will remain confidential and will be only kept for 30 days after receipt. 此評估表內所收集的資料將用作提供核保前的評估查詢，提供與宏利的資料將會保密及祇保存30天。 PROPOSED LIFE INSURED 擬受保人 NAME 姓名： AGE 年齡： SEX 性別： COUNTRY OF RESIDENCE 居住國家： ADVISOR 顧問 NAME 姓名： TEL NUMBER 電話號碼： EMAIL ADDRESS 電郵地址： Part 1 – Medical 第一部份 - 有關健康問題 Question 問題 Response 回應 1 What is the proposed life insured’s current height (cm) and weight (kg)? 擬受保人現時的身高（釐米）及體重（千克）？ cm 釐米/ 2 What is the proposed life insured’s most recent blood pressure reading? 擬受保人最近一次的血壓讀數是多少？ / Date 日期: 3 Has the proposed life insured used tobacco or nicotine products in the past 5 years? Yes 是/ If so, what product and when was it last used? 擬受保人有否於過去五年吸煙或使用含尼古丁物品？如「有」，何種物品及最近一次服用時間? Date of last used 最近一次服用時間 kg 千克 No 否 4 Does the proposed life insured drink alcohol? If yes, please specify the type of drink? How many drinks per day/week? Type 種類 擬受保人有否飲酒？如「有」，請列明種類，每天／星期多少次。 Yes 是/ No 否 ml per day 每日/per week 每星期 5 Has the proposed life insured received treatment for alcoholism in the past 10 years? 擬受保人有否於過去十年接受酗酒治療？ Yes 是/ No 否 6 Has the proposed life insured used any drugs (not prescribed by a doctor) or been treated for drug usage in the past 10 years? 擬受保人有否於過去十年服用藥物（非醫生處方）或因使用藥物而需接受治療？ Yes 是/ No 否 7 Has the proposed life insured ever had and / or been treated for and/or been told had diabetes (Diabetes Mellitus), cardiovascular (heart) disease (*), cerebrovascular disease (stroke/TIA) (**) or cancer(***)? See below for reference. 擬受保人是否有／或接受治療／或被告知有糖尿病、腦血管相關疾病(*)、腦血管病（中風／ TIA）(**)或癌症(***)？請參考下述。 Yes 是/ No 否 8 Have any of the proposed life insured’s parents or siblings died prior to age 60 due to stroke, cancer or coronary artery disease? 擬受保人的父母或兄弟姊妹有否於60歲前死於中風、癌症或冠心病？ Yes 是/ No 否 9 Is there any other medical history of the proposed life insured which we should be aware of? If yes, please give details in the “Additional Information” section. 是否有其他有關擬受保人的醫療記錄我們應加以留意？如「是」，請於「附加資料」列明詳 情。 Yes 是/ No 否 10 What medications is the proposed life insured currently taking, if any? 擬受保人現正服用甚麼藥物（如有）？ Reference 參考 * Chest pain 心痛, palpitation 心悸, high blood pressure 高血壓, angina 心絞痛, heart valve disease 心瓣病, heart murmur 心雜音, heart attack 心臟病, peripheral artery disease, any other disease or disorder of heart or blood vessels 外周血管疾病, 其他心臟或血管疾病或不適. ** Dizziness 暈眩, convulsion 痙攣, epilepsy 癲癇症, prolonged headache 持續頭痛, speech defect 語言缺陷, paralysis 癱瘓, stroke 中風 or transient ischaemic attack (Ischeamic Heart Disease 心肌缺氧). *** Cancer 癌症, tumour 腫瘤, growth of any kind including breast lumps, cyst or disorder or the skin or lymph gland 胸部硬塊、囊腫或皮膚或淋 巴腺等的增生. 下的任何一段、或不同意以下的任何特定段落、或閣下的持牌保險中介人的講述與閣下所閱讀或理解本聲 明的內容有異，請勿簽署確認或繳付此一筆過增額保費／定期增額保費。 閣下可向銷售的持牌保險中介人索取本文件的英文版本。You may request the English version of this statement from your licensed insurance intermediary. 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱 (1) 目標概要：請閣下列出購買此*（一筆過增額保費／定期增額保費）的原因╱考慮因素。持牌保險中 介人須就閣下列明的原因／考慮因素，以及其他相關資料，一併評估此（* 一筆過增額保費／定期增 額保費）是否適合閣下。（客戶必須列出自己的原因／考慮因素。） (2) 沒有資產擁有權及沒有投資回報保證：對於此投連壽險保單的相關投資資產，閣下均沒有任何權利 或擁有權。任何追索只可向宏利提出，而閣下亦須承擔宏利的信貸風險。投資回報並非保證。 ሗʶᅣ̘ *OBJTIFS* * 如不適用請刪除 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 IFSADTU_MIPLUS2_CHI (12/2025) 1 *OBJTIFS* 保單編號 （公司專用） 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（＂投連壽險＂）保單（續） 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱（續） (3) 計劃的長期性質： (a) 提早退保／提取保單款項的收費：若閣下在保單期滿前的指定時限內終止保單、退保或提取部 分保單款項，均須支付提早退保或提取保單款項的收費（“提早贖回費”），並可能因此損失獲得 獎賞的權利。提早贖回費的計算方法如下： 提早贖回費 = 贖回金額 X 提早贖回費率% 由每筆已繳保費的保費 存入日起計之年數# 少於 1年 少於 2年 少於 3年 少於 4年 少於 5年 5 年或 以上 提早贖回費率 (贖回金額之%) 5% 4% 3% 2% 1% 0% # 如閣下已繳付任何增額保費，所選定的投資選項之單位會按「先進先出」的原則進行贖回，而 該贖回金額將被徵收適用的提早贖回費，用以計算之提早贖回費率會按相關保費存入日起計 的年數而定。 (b) 迎新奬賞：閣下將享有迎新獎賞，惟於特定情況下將被收回。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產 品資料文件。 (c) 長期客戶獎賞：若閣下符合指定的要求，可享有長期客戶獎賞。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的 產品資料文件。 (4) 費用及收費：某些費用／收費將從閣下投連壽險戶口價值中扣減，並會減少可供投資的金額。因此， 閣下投連壽險保單的整體回報有可能遠低於閣下所選取的相關基金的回報。詳情請參閱此投連壽 險保單的產品資料文件。 (5) 轉換投資選項：若閣下轉換投資選項，可能需要支付相關收費，而閣下所承受的投資風險亦有可能 因而增加或減少。 (6) 有關以定期派發現金股息為目的之投資選項的相關風險：若閣下選擇任何以定期派發現金股息為 目的之投資選項，請注意有關的現金股息分派並非保證。此外，現金股息的分派亦有可能從／實際 上從投資選項之相應基金的資本中支付，因而或會導致投資選項的單位價格下跌。 (7) 提早終止風險：若有任何啟動保單自動提早終止的情況出現，閣下的投連壽險保單或會被自動提早 終止，而閣下亦會因此損失所有已繳付保費及累算權益。如閣下的戶口價值降至零（例如：投資表現 不理想等），此情況可能啟動保單自動提早終止。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 2 IFSADTU_MIPLUS2_CHI (12/2025) 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（＂投連壽險＂）保單（續） 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱（續） (8) 持牌保險中介人的酬勞：若閣下選擇繳付此*（一筆過增額保費／定期增額保費），持牌保險代理人 將會就閣下每繳付$100美元保費金額中，獲取平均$2.6美元的酬勞。 持牌保險中介人的酬勞是基於閣下會在整個保費繳付期內繳付所有供款的假設下，計算所得的平 均值。該酬勞包括所有直接因繳付此增額保費而向持牌保險代理人支付的款項（包括前期及其後的 佣金、花紅及其他獎金）。 某些無關重要、並非直接因繳付此（* 一筆過增額保費／定期增額保費）而支付及難以兌現為現金的 酬勞並不包括在計算當中。 突發的開支。可預期及突發的開支包括（但不限於）以下項目： • 家庭生活開支、按揭供款、租金、貸款還款、保險費用及物業維修費用等； • 門診醫療開支及定期身體檢查費用等； • 緊急資金以應付各種突發及不幸的情況，例如患上任何一種嚴重疾病、家庭成員身故或喪失定期收 入等。 本人確認本人已考慮此投連壽險保單的提早贖回費及本人的財政能力以應付在未來５年內可預期及突發的 開支，並願意申請此投連壽險保單。 s: < IFSAD_MATRIX_CHI (12/2025) > 保單編號 邁駿投資理財計劃 - 自選額外投資保費 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（＂投連壽險＂）保單 第一部 : 重要資料聲明書 閣下應細閱本聲明書及產品資料文件（包括產品說明書、投資選項手冊及產品資料概要）。若閣下不明白以 下的任何一段、或不同意以下的任何特定段落、或閣下的持牌保險中介人的講述與閣下所閱讀或理解本聲 明的內容有異，請勿簽署確認或購買此後自選額外投資保費。 閣下可向銷售的持牌保險中介人索取本文件的英文版本。You may request the English version of this statement from your licensed insurance intermediary. 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱 (1) 目標概要：請閣下列出購買此自選額外投資保費的原因／考慮因素。持牌保險中介人必須就閣下列 明的原因／考慮因素，以及其他相關資料，一併評估此自選額外投資保費是否適合閣下。（申請人必 須列出自己的原因／考慮因素。） (2) 沒有資產擁有權及沒有投資回報保證：對於此投連壽險保單的相關投資資產，閣下均沒有任何權利 或擁有權。任何追索只可向宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（「宏利」）提出，而閣下亦須承擔宏利的信 貸風險。投資回報並非保證。 ሗʶᅣ̘ *OBJTIFS* Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 IFSAD_MATRIX_CHI (12/2025) 1 *OBJTIFS* 保單編號 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 提早贖回費比率# 6% 5% 4% 3% 2% * 年期由實際認購日期計算 # 於尊尚投資帳戶提取款項以「先入先出」的原則進行 (b) 獎賞：若閣下符合指定的要求，可享有周年獎賞。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 (4) 費用及收費：某些費用／收費將從閣下所選取計劃的價值中扣減，有關費用及收費會減少可供投資 的金額。因此，閣下投連壽險保單的整體回報有可能遠低於閣下所選取的相關基金的回報。詳情請 參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 (5) 轉換投資選項：若閣下轉換投資選項，可能需要支付相關收費，而閣下所承受的投資風險亦有可能 因而增加或減少。 (6) 與風險承擔能力不相符的相關風險：如果閣下打算在保單生效後選擇認購的相關投資選項組合或 者在保單生效後轉入的相關投資選項組合，與閣下的風險承擔能力及知識（包括對衍生產品的相關 投資知識）不相符，則閣下可能需承受額外相關風險。 Manulife (International) Limited 宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司 2 IFSAD_MATRIX_CHI (12/2025) 保單編號 《重要資料聲明書》及《投保人聲明書》 投資相連壽險計劃（＂投連壽險＂）保單（續） 此乃重要資料 閣下必須細閱（續） (7) 提早終止風險：若有任何啟動保單自動提早終止的情況出現，閣下的投連壽險保單或會被自動提早 終止，而閣下亦會因此損失所有已繳付保費及累算權益。此可能啟動保單自動提早終止的情況包括 ：閣下未能支付保費（定期保費），或閣下的保單總值處於十分低或負數的水平（例如：投資表現不理 想或於行使保費假期後等）。詳情請參閱此投連壽險保單的產品資料文件。 (8) 持牌保險中介人的酬勞：若閣下選擇繳付此自選額外投資保費，持牌保險代理人將會就閣下每繳付 $100美元保費金額中，獲取平均$3.0美元（適用於美元保單）或每繳付$100港元保費金額中，獲取 平均$3.0港元（適用於港元保單）的酬勞。 持牌保險中介人的酬勞是基於閣下會繳付整個供款期內所有供款的假設下計算所得的平均值。該 酬勞包括所有直接因銷售此自選額外投資保費而向持牌保險代理人支付的款項（包括前期及其後 的佣金、花紅及其他獎金）。 持牌保險代理人實際應收取的酬勞金額可能會因年度而異，並且在第一個保單年度／早期保單年 度較高。 某些無關重要、並非直接因銷售此保單而支付及難以兌現為現金的酬勞並不包括在計算當中。 如果閣下希望進一步了解閣下的持牌保險代理人就此保單可能取得的酬勞，閣下有權向閣下的持 牌保險代理人查詢。 DECLARATION AND AUTHORIZATION 聲明及授權 It is understood and agreed that 1. I have obtained all necessary authorization from my dependent (if applicable) to supply their information to Manulife if my dependent is to be covered. I also understand that the information requested in this questionnaire is required in order for Manulife to process my application. Failure to disclose any material facts or information which may influence or which Manulife would regard as likely to influence the assessment and acceptance of my application, may render voidable by Manulife the insurance coverage that may be issued pursuant to this application. In the event of doubt as to whether a fact or information is material, it should be disclosed in this questionnaire. 2. Information collected from me and in respect of me and/or my dependent can enable Manulife to carry on its insurance/financial business and may be: (i) used by Manulife or its associated companies for the purpose of (a) approving and administering the policy or any alterations, cancellation or renewal of it; (b) underwriting and any claims or analysis of it; (c) statistical or actuarial research of Manulife, Manulife’s associated companies or the insurance/ financial industry; and/or (ii) transferred to (a) any related company or other company carrying on insurance or reinsurance related business or an intermediary or a claims or investigation or other service provider providing services relevant to insurance business or any regulatory bodies, association or federation of insurance companies that exists or is formed from time to time; (b) any person/organization to fulfill any of the above purposes and/or for the purpose of data verification by way of matching procedures or otherwise; and/or reinsurance of the policy. All data processes may involve a transfer of information to places either within or outside the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region/Macau Special Administrative Region. 3. By writing to the Privacy Officer of Manulife, I can request access to and correction of my personal data (if appropriate). 4. All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the “Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance” (“Notice”) – (for Hong Kong Policy) / “Manulife Personal Information Collection Statement” (“Statement”) – (for Macau Policy). In case I have not read the Notice/Statement before, I can obtain such Notice/Statement from my Manulife’s intermediary or through Manulife’s website at www.manulife.com.hk. 5. I certify that all information provided by me in this questionnaire is complete and true to the best of my knowledge and belief. 6. I authorize any physician, medical practitioner, hospital, clinic or other medically related facility, insurance company or other organization, institution or person that has any records or knowledge of me or my dependent to provide to Manulife any such information. Such authorization shall survive me and shall be irrevocable. A photocopy of this authorization shall be as valid as the original. 7. I undertake that if there is any change in the information provided, I shall notify Manulife as soon as reasonably practicable. I also undertake to supply additional information in respect of me to Manulife upon request for the purpose of complying with the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Financial Institutions) Ordinance (for Hong Kong policy)/Guidelines on Prevention and Combating Money Laundering and Financing of Terrorism in Insurance (for Macau policy). 本人明白並同意下列各項 1. 本人已向所有受保家屬取得授權（如適用），可向宏利提供其資 料。本人亦明白本問卷內提供的資料是讓宏利作處理本人的申 請之用。如未有披露任何重要事實或資料，而該等重要事實或 資料足以影響宏利評估及接受本人的申請，宏利有權將所簽發 的保險宣告無效。假如未能確定事實或資料重要性，則須於本 問卷披露該等事實或資料。 2. 從本人收集及關於本人及 / 或受保家屬的資料，旨在確保宏利的 保險業務得以順利運作，而該等資料可供： (i) 宏利或其聯營公司作以下用途：(a) 批核及管理本保單，或 其後進行任何修訂、取消保單或續保事宜；(b) 核保、分析 及處理賠償申請；(c) 供宏利、聯營公司或保險 / 金融業作 統計或精算研究用途；及 / 或 (ii) 轉交予 (a) 任何有關連公司；其他從事與保險或再保險有關 業務之公司；或中介人、提供理賠、調查或其他保險業相關 服務之供應商或現時已存在或日後組成之監管機構、保險公 司聯會或組織；(b) 任何人士 / 機構以作上述用途及 / 或以配 對或其他方法核實資料；與及安排再保險。 所有資料處理過程或會涉及資料移轉至香港特別行政區或澳門 特別行政區境內外的地方。 3. 本人有權以書面通知宏利之個人資料主任，要求索閱及更改個 人資料（如需要）。 4. 宏利可按於《有關〈個人資料（私隱）條例〉的客戶通知》（「通知」）（適用於香港保單）/《宏利個人資料收集聲明》（「聲明」）（- 適用於 澳門保單）所述，處理有關資料。假如本人未有細閱該通知 / 聲 明，本人可從本人的宏利中介人或透過宏利網址 www.manulif

(b) Please use BLOCK LETTERS to complete this Form and initial next to any corrections you make. (c) *means delete whichever is inappropriate. Please insert "N.A." if not applicable. (d) The information collected from you and in respect of you in support of this election of transfer can be used by Manulife, trustee(s), relevant service provider(s), and the government or regulatory bodies including the MPFA in activities relating to the processing of your election(s) of transfer as requested in this Form. The information may be transferred to other division(s) within Manulife, the relevant trustee(s), government or regulatory bodies including the MPFA or other parties including delegates, intermediaries or any service providers of Manulife or the relevant trustees, for such purpose(s) or for a purpose directly related to such purpose(s). All data processes may involve a transfer of information to places either within or outside the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. You are required to supply the information in this Form and failure to do so may result in your transfer being delayed. (e) The MPFA and other regulatory bodies in any jurisdiction shall be authorized to inspect any information under the scheme. (f) By writing to the Privacy Of cer of Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited, you can correct and have access to your personal data. (g) All information may be treated by Manulife in the same manner as mentioned in the "Notice to Customers relating to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance" ("Notice"). In case you have not read the Notice before, you can obtain such Notice through Manulife's website at www.manulife.com.hk. If more than one instruction of the same type from the same member is received by Manulife at or before the cut-off time on the same dealing day*, only the rst one will be processed while the later one will generally be processed on the next dealing day*.
